title: Electricity generation lifts India’s Industrial Growth to 5.1 percent in May
description: India’s Index of Industrial Production (IIP) expanded 5.1 percent year-on-year in May 2026, driven by robust momentum in manufacturing, water supply and a surge in electricity generation, according to government data released by the Ministry of Statistics and Programme Implementation (MOSPI) on Monday.The headline figure marks a pickup from the 4.9 percent growth recorded in April. The May figure is also higher than the 3.4 percent growth recorded in the same month last year.The May reading is the second data release under the new IIP series with the base year of 2022-23, which MOSPI first published on June 1. Alongside the headline numbers, the Ministry announced a significant methodological revision by switching from the Wholesale Price Index (WPI) to the Output Producer Price Index as the deflator, a price index that strips out the effect of inflation to reveal actual production volumes, for 234 of the 463 item groups in the basket. The change supersedes the earlier WPI-based series. “This has led to material changes in growth across segments such as manufacturing and is also likely to lead to revisions in the GDP data,” says Rahul Agrawal, principal economist at ICRA.Also Read: New IIP Series Shows India’s Industrial Production Rising 4.9% in AprilElectricity Surges, Mining SlipsElectricity and gas supply was the fastest-growing major sector, recording 9.9 percent growth in May, driven by elevated temperatures as well as a low base. Within the segment, renewable electricity generation rose 18 percent, continuing the strong momentum seen in April. Electricity from non-renewable sources grew 8.8 percent, higher than the 2.8 percent growth seen in the previous month. Overall, electricity generation grew 11.1 percent, though gas supply contracted 7.1 percent. “This segment pushed up the headline IIP print by as much as 57 basis points between these months,” says Agrawal.Manufacturing output grew 5.5 percent in May, with 16 of the 23 industry groups posting growth. The May figure was lower than the 6.1 percent growth recorded by the sector in April. The standout performers were electrical equipment, which surged 20.8 percent; motor vehicles, trailers and semi-trailers, which rose 14.5 percent; and the manufacture of fabricated metal products, which grew by 15.5 percent. Basic metals registered a more modest 4.6 percent growth.A government note released along with the data shows that within the automobile sector, passenger cars, commercial vehicles and auto components all contributed meaningfully to growth, signalling that domestic demand for vehicles remains firm. In electrical equipment, switchgear and circuit breakers, transformers and UPS systems were among the key drivers, reflecting continued investment in power infrastructure.Within manufacturing, some sectors showed a contraction in output, such as textiles (-1.6 percent), wearing apparel (-8.8 percent), leather and wood products (-4.1 percent each), printing of recorded media (-10.3 percent), the manufacture of petroleum products (-4.7 percent) and the manufacture of chemical products (-1.3 percent).Water supply, sewerage and waste management posted 5.5 percent growth in May, with sewerage and waste management, at 6.9 percent, outpacing water supply, at 4.3 percent.Mining and quarrying was the lone weak spot, contracting 1.6 percent. Output from fuel minerals and non-metallic minerals both contracted by over 6 percent, offsetting a strong 18.3 percent increase in metallic minerals, including rare earth minerals.Investment Goods Outpace ConsumptionOn a use-based breakdown, capital goods emerged as the strongest category, with growth of 12.9 percent, pointing to continued investment activity in the economy. Infrastructure and construction goods rose 5.9 percent, consumer durables climbed 7.2 percent, and intermediate goods grew 5.8 percent. Primary goods and consumer non-durables were the laggards, at 2.6 percent and 3.6 percent respectively.

title: ‘I’m done seeking validation’: Bhumi Satish Pednekkar
Relocating trust: Why India is no longer an alternative
description: In the boardrooms of global corporations, one phrase has followed India for decades: Cost arbitrage.It was a polite way of saying that India's main advantage was its vast reservoir of English-speaking graduates willing to do what their counterparts in New York, Frankfurt or Tokyo simply could not afford to do at scale. For a long time, that narrative served its purpose. It built an industry, seeded an ecosystem and put India on the map of global commerce.But that story is now being quietly and irrevocably retired.What is replacing it is something far more consequential and durable. The decisive factor in where global corporations choose to plant their intellectual and operational flags is no longer how much they save. It is how much they can trust. The question CEOs are asking has changed. It is no longer, 'Where is it cheapest?' It now is, 'Where is it safest to invest?'Also Read: India’s GCC story going “positively”: Nirmala SitharamanThe Architecture of UncertaintyWe are navigating one of the most significant realignments of the global economic order since 1991, as supply chains that were built purely on efficiency have proven somewhat brittle.While recent global pandemics and escalating geopolitical tensions, including situations in West Asia, which serve as temporary blips, they have underscored a broader need for structural resilience. The initial reactionary strategy of ‘China+1’ may now be hitting a wall.The framework treated emerging markets as interchangeable fallbacks. The narrative has now fundamentally shifted. Capital and intellectual property are no longer seeking a geopolitical hedge. They are seeking a high-trust default, a standard that India now uniquely defines.Manufacturing Has Found a New LogicIndia's manufacturing story was earlier underwritten by two arguments: Demographic scale and policy incentives. Both continue to remain relevant, but they are no longer the main drivers. Today, global manufacturers across electronics, pharmaceuticals, semiconductors, and precision engineering are being drawn to India for something harder to replicate and easier to trust. Global corporations are increasingly drawn by India's stable, rules-based environment, a deepening alignment with Western supply chains, and an institutional framework that they can navigate with confidence.The production-linked incentive schemes have catalysed investment across 14 sectors, attracting global names in mobile manufacturing, speciality chemicals, medical devices and solar modules. But the strategic shift is more significant. India is now part of global conversations about critical supply chains, including semiconductors, aerospace components and defence manufacturing, not as a cost destination, but as a geopolitical partner.Also Read: India's moment is not about austerity. It is about productive powerThe Digital Infrastructure BetThere are very few signals of structural confidence as strong as a data centre investment. And India is witnessing one of the highest investment commitments to digital infrastructure in the Asia-Pacific region. Hyperscalers, global technology firms and institutional capital are committing to India's data centre ecosystem at a pace that shows their long-term conviction.This is not accidental. The country's data localisation framework, growing regulatory alignment with global data governance norms and its large digitally active population make it both a strategic necessity and a commercial imperative. For global corporations across multiple jurisdictions, India's maturing digital infrastructure offers something rare: Scale with trust.Intellectual Capital Is Moving TooPerhaps the most underappreciated dimension of India's rise is the nature of what is actually being relocated. The economy of intellectual capital, including R&D mandates, product development ownership, AI and engineering leadership, is shifting to India in an unprecedented manner.The most legible proof of this is the fast-evolving ecosystem of Global Capability Centres (GCCs). GCCs accounted for around 35 to 40 percent of total office absorption in India in 2025. In 2026 too, they are likely to have a share of over 40 percent. These are not back-office expansions. They are strategic bets: centres co-owning product development, driving R&D mandates and, in some cases, functioning as secondary headquarters for entire business verticals. Sectors that were once peripheral to this conversation, namely semiconductors, aerospace and advanced manufacturing, are now among its fastest-growing contributors.The startup ecosystem in the country further reinforces the thesis from a different perspective. With one of the largest pools of technology startups globally and a rapidly growing pipeline of deep-tech ventures in areas from space to quantum computing, India is not only executing global ideas but actively generating them.A Trust Geography Is Taking ShapeA common thread emerges all these vectors. This time, India's rise as a primary global node is qualitatively different from its earlier emergence as an outsourcing hub. The nature of what is being committed is materially different: intellectual property, data, strategic infrastructure and long-cycle R&D. You do not put these in a low-trust geography.For the better part of the last decade, India has worked on building the institutional infrastructure to meet these demands. Its data protection framework is maturing. Its position as a preferred partner in Western semiconductor supply chains is strengthening. Its democratic credentials, common law tradition and deepening integration into the rules-based international order are evolving from diplomatic talking points into commercially legible factors.In a world where the old rules of globalisation are under stress, markets that offer structural stability may acquire a premium. India is in a strong position to earn that premium.The Decade AheadThe era of viewing global expansion through a comparative lens may well be over. The location of intellectual capital and future corporate growth is not dictated by a distinct, self-sustaining logic.Global boards are no longer seeking a temporary hedge to mitigate risk; they are seeking a foundational anchor for their global operations. India has unequivocally emerged as that answer, and increasingly, the world's most critical enterprises are architecting their futures around this new reality.(The author is the Chairman & CEO—India, South-East Asia, Middle East & Africa, CBRE)

title: Watch: కొండచరియల్లో కొట్టుకుపోయిన బైకర్‌.. తర్వాత ఏం జరిగిందంటే?
description: Biker Swept Away | వర్షాల వల్ల కొండచరియలో ఏర్పడిన బురదతో నిండిన ఇరుకైన రహదారిపై ఒక బైకర్ ప్రయాణించాడు. ఉన్నట్టుండి కొండచరియలతో సహా ఆ బురద ప్రవాహంగా మారింది. దీంతో ఆ బైకర్‌ కొంతదూరం కొట్టుకుపోయాడు. అయితే అదృష్టవశాత్తు అతడు ప్రాణాలతో బయటపడ్డాడు.
content:
ఇటానగర్‌: వర్షాల వల్ల కొండచరియలో ఏర్పడిన బురదతో నిండిన ఇరుకైన రహదారిపై ఒక బైకర్ ప్రయాణించాడు. ఉన్నట్టుండి కొండచరియలతో సహా ఆ బురద ప్రవాహంగా మారింది. దీంతో ఆ బైకర్‌ కొంతదూరం కొట్టుకుపోయాడు. అయితే అదృష్టవశాత్తు అతడు ప్రాణాలతో బయటపడ్డాడు. (Biker Swept Away) ఈ వీడియో క్లిప్‌ సోషల్‌ మీడియాలో వైరల్‌ అయ్యింది. అరుణాచల్ ప్రదేశ్‌లోని లోయర్ సియాంగ్ జిల్లాలో ఈ సంఘటన జరిగింది.
జూన్ 28న సిజీలో కురిసిన భారీ వర్షానికి కొండచరియ ప్రాంతం తడిసి బురదమయంగా మారింది. అక్కడి ఇరుకైన మార్గంలో ఒక బైకర్‌ ప్రయాణించాడు. అయితే బురదమయమైన కొండచరియ అకస్మాత్తుగా కుంగిపోయింది. ఆ బురద ప్రవాహంలో బైకర్‌ కొంతదూరం కొట్టుకుపోయాడు. అయితే అదృష్టవశాత్తు ఆ వ్యక్తి ప్రాణాలతో బయటపడ్డాడు.
కాగా, చాలా దూరం నుంచి ఒక వ్యక్తి తన మొబైల్‌ ఫోన్‌లో రికార్డ్‌ చేసిన ఈ వీడియో క్లిప్‌ సోషల్‌ మీడియాలో వైరల్‌ అయ్యింది. దీంతో అదృష్టవశాత్తు ప్రాణాలు దక్కించుకున్న ఆ బైకర్‌పై నెటిజన్లు పలు కామెంట్లు చేశారు. ఆ వ్యక్తి రాబోయే దశాబ్దానికి సరిపడా తన అదృష్టం మొత్తాన్ని వాడేసుకున్నాడని ఒకరు చమత్కరించారు.

title: RS Praveen Kumar | ప్రైవేట్ స్కూళ్ల ఫీజుల పెంపును అదుపు చేయలేని చేతకాని దద్దమ్మ రేవంత్ రెడ్డి : ఆర్‌ఎస్ ప్రవీణ్ కుమార్
description: RS Praveen Kumar | గద్వాల చేనేత కార్మికులు గురుకుల విద్యార్థులకు అందించే బట్టలను నేయొద్దా..? వాళ్లు టవల్స్‌ను, బెడ్‌షీట్లను, దుప్పట్లను నేయలేరా.. ? అన్నీ నేయగలరు. కానీ అవన్నీ తీసుకపోయి మఫత్‌లాల్‌కు ఇచ్చారు.. మరిరాష్ట్రంలో మఫత్‌లాల్‌నే మంత్రిగా పెడితే అయిపోతుంది కదా అని  బీఆర్ఎస్ జనరల్ సెక్రటరీ ఆర్‌ఎస్ ప్రవీణ్ కుమార్  మండిపడ్డారు.
content:
RS Praveen Kumar | గద్వాల చేనేత కార్మికులను అవమానించి..గురుకులాల్లో చదివే విద్యార్థులకు సప్లయ్ చేసే యూనిఫాం, దుప్పట్లు, టవల్స్ ను గద్వాల నేతన్నలు, సిరిసిల్ల నేతన్నలు తయారు చేయకుండా కాంట్రాక్టును బాంబేలో ఉండే మఫత్‌లాల్‌కు ఇచ్చారని బీఆర్ఎస్ జనరల్ సెక్రటరీ ఆర్‌ఎస్ ప్రవీణ్ కుమార్ ఆరోపించారు.
గద్వాలలో సోమవారం ఏర్పాటు చేసిన మీడియా సమావేశంలో ఆయన మాట్లాడుతూ.. గద్వాల చేనేత కార్మికులు గురుకుల విద్యార్థులకు అందించే బట్టలను నేయొద్దా..? వాళ్లు టవల్స్‌ను, బెడ్‌షీట్లను, దుప్పట్లను నేయలేరా.. ? అన్నీ నేయగలరు కానీ అవన్నీ తీసుకపోయి మఫత్‌లాల్‌కు ఇచ్చారు.. మరిరాష్ట్రంలో మఫత్‌లాల్‌నే మంత్రిగా పెడితే అయిపోతుంది కదా అని మండిపడ్డారు.
డ్రగ్స్ కేసులో దొరికిన నిరంజన్ కుమార్ జైన్‌కు మీరు ట్రంకు పెట్టెల కాంట్రాక్టులను ఇచ్చారు. అంటే ఆయన ట్రంక్ పెట్టెల్లో విద్యార్థినీ విద్యార్థులకు గంజాయి్ సప్లై చేయడం కోసమా..? ఇయ్యాళ్ల ప్రభుత్వ స్కూళ్లలో పరిస్థితులు బాగా లేవని తల్లిదండ్రులంతా కూడా ప్రైవేట్ స్కూళ్లకు పంపిస్తుంటే ప్రైవేట్ స్కూల్‌వాళ్లు సందట్లో సడేమియాలా స్కూల్ ఫీజుల రేట్లు పెంచేశారు. పిల్లల తల్లిదండ్రులు ఎక్కడి నుంచి తీసుకొస్తరని ప్రశ్నించారు. ప్రభుత్వ పాఠశాలలను నాశనం చేస్తూ, ప్రైవేట్ పాఠశాలల ఫీజుల పెంపును అదుపు చేయలేని చేతకాని దద్దమ్మ రేవంత్ రెడ్డి అని ఆర్‌ఎస్ ప్రవీణ్ కుమార్ ధ్వజమెత్తారు.
 

గద్వాల చేనేత కార్మికులను అవమానించి..
గురుకులాల్లో చదివే విద్యార్థులకు సప్లయ్ చేసే యూనిఫాం, దుప్పట్లు, టవల్స్ కాంట్రాక్టును ఇతర రాష్ట్రాలకు చెందిన మఫత్‌లాల్ కు ఇచ్చారు.
అంటే గద్వాలలో ఉండే చేనేత కార్మికులు వాటిని సప్లయ్ చేయలేరా?
డ్రగ్స్ కేసులో దొరికిన స్మగ్లర్లకు గురుకులాల్లో… pic.twitter.com/l1ESkGFFDg
— BRS Party (@BRSparty) June 29, 2026

 India’s Market | మ‌ళ్లీ ఐదో ర్యాంకుకు చేరిన భార‌త ఈక్విటీ మార్కెట్‌.. కార‌ణాలు ఇవే..!

title: കാന്‍സര്‍ രോഗികള്‍ക്കായി സാഹസം; 24 മണിക്കൂറില്‍ മൂന്ന് കൊടുമുടികള്‍ കീഴടക്കി ബ്രിട്ടനിലെ കേറ്റ് രാജകുമാരി
description: 2024 മാര്‍ച്ചിലായിരുന്നു തനിക്ക് കാന്‍സര്‍ ബാധിച്ചതായും കീമോതെറാപ്പിക്ക് വിധേയയാകുകയാണെന്നും കേറ്റ് ലോകത്തെ അറിയിച്ചത്. തുടര്‍ന്ന് ഒരു വര്‍ഷത്തോളം നീണ്ട ചികിത്സ. അതിനുശേഷം താന്‍ പൂര്‍ണ്ണമായും രോഗമുക്തയായതായി അവര്‍ അറിയിച്ചു.
content: <p>ലണ്ടന്‍: മൂന്ന് കൊടുമുടികള്‍ 24 മണിക്കൂറിനുള്ളില്‍ കീഴടക്കി ബ്രിട്ടനിലെ കേറ്റ് രാജകുമാരി. രണ്ട് വര്‍ഷം മുന്‍പ് താന്‍ കാന്‍സര്‍ രോഗത്തിന് ചികിത്സ തേടിയ ആശുപത്രിയെ സഹായിക്കാനായിരുന്നു കഠിനമായ കൊടുമുടി ചലഞ്ച്.</p><p>ഇംഗ്ലണ്ട്, സ്‌കോട്ട്ലന്‍ഡ്, വെയില്‍സ് എന്നീ രാജ്യങ്ങളിലെ ഏറ്റവും ഉയര്‍ന്ന മൂന്ന് കൊടുമുടികളാണ് വെയില്‍സ് രാജകുമാരി കേറ്റ് മിഡില്‍ട്ടണ്‍ 24 മണിക്കൂറിനുള്ളില്‍ നടന്ന് കയറിയത്. ലണ്ടനിലെ ചെല്‍സിയിലുള്ള ദി റോയല്‍ മാര്‍സ്ഡന്‍ കാന്‍സര്‍ ചാരിറ്റി എന്ന സ്‌പെഷ്യലിസ്റ്റ് കാന്‍സര്‍ സെന്ററിന് ധനസമാഹാരണത്തിന് വേണ്ടിയായിരുന്നു 44-കാരിയായ രാജകുമാരിയുടെ പര്‍വ്വതാരോഹണം.</p><p>ചലഞ്ച് പൂര്‍ത്തിയാക്കിയ ശേഷം കേറ്റ് ഒരു വീഡിയോ സന്ദേശം പോസ്റ്റ് ചെയ്തു. 'ഞാന്‍ എന്തിനാണ് ഈ വെല്ലുവിളി ഏറ്റെടുത്തതെന്ന് പലരും ചോദിച്ചു. വ്യക്തിപരമായി പറഞ്ഞാല്‍, ഞാന്‍ ഇന്ന് ജീവനോടെയുള്ളതിനും ഈ കുന്നുകള്‍ നടന്നു കയറാനുള്ള ആരോഗ്യം തിരികെ ലഭിച്ചതിനും ഞാന്‍ ദൈവത്തോട് നന്ദിയുള്ളവളാണ്. പകരമായി കാന്‍സര്‍ പ്രതിരോധ പ്രവര്‍ത്തനങ്ങള്‍ക്ക് എന്തെങ്കിലും തിരികെ നല്‍കാന്‍ ഞാന്‍ ആഗ്രഹിച്ചു'- രാജകുമാരി വീഡിയോയില്‍ പറഞ്ഞു.</p><p>2024 മാര്‍ച്ചിലായിരുന്നു തനിക്ക് കാന്‍സര്‍ ബാധിച്ചതായും കീമോതെറാപ്പിക്ക് വിധേയയാകുകയാണെന്നും കേറ്റ് ലോകത്തെ അറിയിച്ചത്. തുടര്‍ന്ന് ഒരു വര്‍ഷത്തോളം നീണ്ട ചികിത്സ. അതിനുശേഷം താന്‍ പൂര്‍ണ്ണമായും രോഗമുക്തയായതായി അവര്‍ അറിയിച്ചു. രോഗമുക്തിക്ക് ശേഷം രാജകീയ ചുമതലകളിലേക്ക് സാവധാനം മടങ്ങിയെത്തിയ കേറ്റ്, കാന്‍സര്‍ രോഗബാധിതരെ സഹായിക്കുന്ന പ്രവര്‍ത്തനങ്ങളില്‍ സജീവമായി. കേറ്റും ഭര്‍ത്താവ് വില്യം രാജകുമാരനും ഈ കാന്‍സര്‍ ചാരിറ്റിയുടെ സംയുക്ത രക്ഷാധികാരികളാണ്.</p><p>ആകെ 3,064 മീറ്റര്‍ ഉയരം വരുന്ന കൊടുമുടികള്‍ ഒറ്റയ്ക്കാണ് കേറ്റ് നടന്നു കയറിയത്. ചലഞ്ച് ം പൂര്‍ത്തിയാക്കി മടങ്ങിയെത്തിയ രാജകുമാരിയെ സ്വീകരിക്കാന്‍ ഭര്‍ത്താവ് വില്യം, മക്കളായ ജോര്‍ജ്ജ്, ഷാര്‍ലറ്റ്, ലൂയിസ് എന്നിവരും കേറ്റിന്റെ മാതാപിതാക്കളും സഹോദരനും എത്തിയിരുന്നു.</p><p>&nbsp;</p>

Kulgam follows Ladakh, enforces single-use plastic ban
description:
Srinagar, June 29: The Kulgam district administration on Monday stepped up enforcement of the ban on single-use plastic (SUP) items and polythene carry bags, ordering inspections, seizures and legal action against violators.
The move comes 10 days after the Ladakh administration imposed a similar ban on identified single-use plastic products across the Union Territory.
The directions were issued in a public notice by the Additional District Magistrate by order of the District Magistrate.
"The manufacture, stocking, sale, distribution, transportation and use of banned polythene carry bags and single-use plastic items are strictly prohibited within the district Kulgam," the order said.
The ban applies to shopkeepers, vendors, wholesalers, retailers, government offices, institutions and the general public.
The administration said the indiscriminate use of single-use plastic "poses a serious threat to the environment, public health, water bodies, chokes our drainage system, disturbs wildlife and causes ecological imbalance."
“The prohibition is backed by the Plastic Waste Management Rules, 2016 (as amended), the J&K Non-Biodegradable Material (Management, Handling and Disposal) Act, 2007, and subsequent government notifications. It also cited the Centre's May 18 notification empowering district collectors to implement the Solid Waste Management Rules, 2026,” the order read.
Residents have been advised to use cloth, jute and paper bags and other eco-friendly alternatives.
"Any person or organization found violating the provisions of the ban shall be liable for action under the Plastic Waste Management Rules, 2016 (as amended) and the EPA, 1986 and other relevant laws in force," the order said.
Block Development Officers (BDO’s) and Executive Officers (EO’s) of Municipal Committees have been directed to inspect shops and marketplaces, seize banned plastic items and recommend action under Section 5 of the Environment (Protection) Act.
They have also been asked to submit monthly compliance reports to the Deputy Commissioner's office through the Additional District Development Commissioner.

title: ‘Elle’ review: ‘Legally Blonde’ prequel is a peppy, hot pink delight
description:
The new series gives Reese Witherspoon's iconic character a modern makeover
The post ‘Elle’ review: ‘Legally Blonde’ prequel is a peppy, hot pink delight appeared first on NME.
content:
When it comes to millennial nostalgia, there are few more beloved films than Legally Blonde. Reese Witherspoon’s hijinks as a pink-obsessed California girl turned hotshot lawyer were a box office sensation when it premiered in 2001. In this age of reboots and spinoffs, it’s not surprising that Witherspoon has leveraged her cultural cachet to resurrect the franchise but as we’ve seen so many times before, getting a prequel series right is a delicate balancing act – one that Elle manages to mostly pull off.

READ MORE: The best TV shows of 2026… so far!

This iteration of the character is played by Lexi Minetree, who looks uncannily like a younger Witherspoon and nails her mannerisms down to a tee. When we start the show (which is set sometime in the early noughties), Elle is celebrating her ‘sweet sixteen’, has big plans for orchestrating a first kiss and is looking forward to being one of the juniors at high school. But every hero needs a challenge. Instead of living out her LA dreams, Elle’s plastic surgeon father botches a celebrity nose job and forces the family to go into hiding until the scandal blows over.
Say goodbye to the original LA candy-pink aesthetic and hello to the grunge capital of the world. Apparently everybody in Seattle has a penchant for flannel shirts, indie music and skateboarding – and they love dunking on the new girl. “Seattle isn’t a costume,” one of the mean girls sneers at Elle when she tries to fit in with a new outfit. But Elle makes it look like it is.

Despite the clumsy stereotyping, there is plenty to love about Elle. People looking for more Legally Blonde can rest easy: the series boasts much the same premise as the original film (the fish out of water trope is present here throughout) but it’s been gently massaged for a modern day audience.
This version of Elle wears Nirvana t-shirts, is a proud ally to the LGBTQ+ community and fundraises for the underpaid teaching staff at her new school. All that, and she’s still a die-hard fan of Cosmo magazine, relentless positivity and a hot pink lip – though the show takes advantage of the eight-episode runtime to give her more depth than we’ve previously seen. Well-meaning but flawed, Elle leaves disasters in her wake as she attempts to fit into her new life. It’s a change that makes it easier to root for her as she lurches from calamity to calamity and the show certainly serves up plenty of that. However, local bully Kimberly (Chandler Kinney) is so relentlessly mean that it feels completely unrealistic.
It’s just as well that we also get plenty of time with Elle’s accidentally hilarious mother (June Diane Raphael) to balance things out. “I think it’s feminism,” she comments at one point on the quirks of Elle’s new school. “That’s very in right now.” The gentle humour is all part of this show’s charm. In Elle’s world, anybody can be won over with the power of optimism, a wisecrack and a shared love of Chanel. Simpler times? Certainly. There are no hotshot lawyers here, but it’s still an arresting watch.
‘Elle’ is on Amazon Prime Video from July 1
The post ‘Elle’ review: ‘Legally Blonde’ prequel is a peppy, hot pink delight appeared first on NME.

title: Supreme Court Rejects Trump's Bid to Overturn $5 Million E. Jean Carroll Sexual Abuse Verdict
description: The U.S. Supreme Court has chosen not to review Donald Trump's appeal regarding a $5 million civil judgment awarded to E. Jean Carroll, confirming the jury's finding of his liability for sexual abuse and defamation.
content: The U.S. Supreme Court on Monday declined to hear President Donald Trump's appeal seeking to overturn the $5 million civil judgment awarded to writer E. Jean Carroll, leaving intact a jury verdict that found Trump liable for sexually abusing and defaming the longtime columnist.The court's decision effectively ends Trump's challenge to the May 2023 verdict, which required him to pay Carroll approximately $5 million in damages after a federal jury concluded that he sexually abused her in a department store dressing room in the mid-1990s and later defamed her by publicly denying the allegations.As is customary, the Supreme Court did not provide an explanation for declining to take up the case.Jury Found Trump LiableThe civil trial was held in federal court in New York under the state's Adult Survivors Act, which temporarily allowed victims of sexual abuse to file lawsuits over decades-old claims.After hearing testimony from both Carroll and Trump, the jury concluded that Trump was liable for sexual abuse and defamation, though it did not find him liable for rape under New York law.The jury awarded Carroll approximately $2 million for the sexual abuse claim and nearly $3 million for defamation, bringing the total judgment to roughly $5 million.Trump's Appeal RejectedTrump appealed the verdict, arguing that the trial court improperly admitted evidence, including testimony from other women who accused him of sexual misconduct, as well as the now-infamous "Access Hollywood" recording.His legal team also challenged several procedural rulings and sought a new trial.However, the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Second Circuit upheld the verdict, concluding that the trial had been conducted fairly and that the disputed evidence was properly admitted.After that setback, Trump petitioned the Supreme Court to review the case. The justices declined to hear the appeal, allowing the lower court's ruling to stand.Separate Defamation JudgmentThe Supreme Court's action concerns only the $5 million civil judgment.Trump also faces a separate judgment requiring him to pay $83.3 million to Carroll in another defamation case arising from statements he made in 2019 after she first publicly accused him of sexual assault.That case remains subject to ongoing legal proceedings.Carroll's AllegationsCarroll alleged that Trump sexually assaulted her inside the dressing room of the Bergdorf Goodman department store in Manhattan during the mid-1990s after the two encountered each other while shopping.Trump has consistently denied the allegations, maintaining that he never assaulted Carroll and claiming he did not know her. He has repeatedly described the accusations as false and politically motivated.Carroll welcomed the original jury verdict as a measure of accountability, while Trump's legal team has continued to criticize the rulings and deny any wrongdoing.Legal SignificanceThe Supreme Court's refusal to hear the appeal leaves the jury's findings intact and marks another legal setback for Trump in one of the highest-profile civil cases brought against him.Because the court declined to review the case, the Second Circuit's decision affirming the verdict remains the final word on the $5 million judgment, bringing that chapter of the long-running legal dispute to a close.

title: Metallica donate £20,000 to Cardiff foodbank with “empty shelves” after sell-out gig
description:
It came after the foodbank were forced to appeal for donations on social media just weeks before the metal band hit the city for their 'M72' date
The post Metallica donate £20,000 to Cardiff foodbank with “empty shelves” after sell-out gig appeared first on NME.
content:
Metallica have donated £20,000 to a foodbank in Cardiff after playing in the city on Sunday night (June 28).

READ MORE: Metallica live in Amsterdam: still the greatest heavy metal band around

They made a stop there as part of the ongoing ‘M72 World Tour’, which so far has also seen the band become the first-ever metal group to collaborate with UK blood services as part of a charitable effort to urge fans to donate blood and plasma around their UK tour dates.
Now, it’s emerged that they also donated to Cardiff Foodbank through their All Within My Hands foundation.
“We had an email saying ‘This isn’t a scam, please get in touch with the foundation’,” Rachel Biggs, CEO of Cardiff Foodbank told the BBC. “They said, ‘We are going to donate £20,000 to you’.”
It came after the foodbank were forced to appeal for donations on social media, saying they were “very worried” because they had never seen their warehouse so empty. “It’s an incredible amount of money which will make such a difference and replenish our empty shelves,” Biggs added.

  










View this post on Instagram

























Cardiff Foodbank supports 20,000 people a year and has eight centres across the city, as well as a mobile service delivering pre-packaged bags.
Metallica now joined Taylor Swift in donating to the cause, after she made her own donation in 2024 after her ‘Era’s Tour’ stop at the Principality Stadium.
Having described the latest donation from Metallica as their “largest celebrity donation”, they added: “What’s great for us [is] it helps raise the profile and what Metallica are doing is mobilising their fans, mobilising the local community.”
Before the Cardiff stop, the band hit Dublin and Glasgow, covering The Proclaimers’ ‘I’m Gonna Be (500 Miles)’ and The Pogues‘ ‘Dirty Old Town’.
At their first show in Dublin on June 19, Hammett fell from the stage during ‘Seek & Destroy’, with the guitarist losing his footing near the edge of the stage, before being helped back up and continuing the song. He later joked about the moment on Instagram, captioning a clip: “Slip & Destroy.”
That came days after Hammett drew criticism from Swift fans for wearing a T-shirt reading “Taylor Swift Is A CIA Psyop” at a June 13 show in Budapest. Hammett appeared to address the controversy in a recent interview, criticising the current state of popular music by claiming: “Right now, songwriting and pop music is crap.”
“I’m hoping that all these great musicians who can teach themselves through the internet step up and put all that great learning and all that great inspiration into creating new stuff, new songs, the future of music, and at a higher standard than what it is now,” he added. “Because I’ll say it again, K-R-A-P. Crap. Sorry for all you pop fans out there.”
Metallica are currently on the UK and European leg of their ‘M72’ world tour, which began in 2023 in support of their 11th studio album ‘72 Seasons’. Remaining UK and European dates are:
JULY 
3 – London, London Stadium
5 – London, London Stadium
Find any remaining tickets here.
In a four-star review of Metallica’s ‘M72’ tour opener in Amsterdam, NME wrote: “Metallica have always been a gateway band for heavy music, but there’s a renewed excitement around them now. Tonight’s surprising, ambitious and giddy gig matches that energy at every turn.”
“From the gorgeous ‘Nothing Else Matters’ through to the unifying ‘Seek & Destroy’, the majesty of heavy music is on full display throughout the gig as Metallica prove why they’re clearly still the greatest metal band around.”
The band also released ‘Reload (Remastered)’, an expanded reissue of their 1997 album featuring previously unreleased demos, rough mixes, live performances and more, yesterday (June 26).
The post Metallica donate £20,000 to Cardiff foodbank with “empty shelves” after sell-out gig appeared first on NME.

title: Alpha: Alia Bhatt-Sharvari Film Rated UA 16+ By CBFC; Runtime, Plot Summary Revealed
description: Alpha, starring Alia Bhatt and Sharvari, has been cleared by the CBFC with a UA 16+ certificate. Also featuring Bobby Deol and Anil Kapoor, Alpha is set to arrive in theatres on July 3.
content: Alia Bhatt and Sharvari's upcoming YRF Spy Universe film Alpha has been certified by the Central Board Of Film Certification (CBFC). Directed by Shiv Rawail, Alpha received a UA 16+ rating by the censor board. Slated to hit theatres worldwide this Friday, July 3, Alpha sparked conversations across social media platforms with its first teaser and trailer, which presented Alia in a full-fledged action avatar for the first time.Alpha Plot Summary, Runtime RevealedAlong with the UA 16+ certificate, Alpha has also locked its runtime, which is 140 minutes (2 hours and 20 minutes). With Bobby Deol and Anil Kapoor rounding up the cast, the actioner is now ready to explode on the big screen.The censor certificate on the CBFC website also carries the official plot summary of the film. It hints at Alia Bhatt's Sita being a fierce addition to YRF spies after Tiger, Kabir, and Pathaan. The plot summary read, "Driven by revenge, a young girl destroys anyone in her path until her journey uncovers the hidden truths of her own life. She is bold, cold, and ready to cross any line, hurting anyone who stands in her way."Take a look at the censor certificate here -           Why Is Alpha An Important Film For YRF And Alia Bhatt?Alpha is the 4th standalone film in the YRF Spy Universe and seventh overall after Ek Tha Tiger, Tiger Zinda Hai, War,  Pathaan, Tiger 3, and War 2. It will introduce Alia Bhatt as the first female spy of the spyverse, which has the likes of Salman Khan, Shah Rukh Khan, and Hrithik Roshan.It is as important a project for YRF and Aditya Chopra as it is for Alia. After the underwhelming response to the last two spyverse movies, Tiger 3 and War 2, the banner will be hoping to bounce back strongly with Alpha and revive the fabled universe.On the other hand, after the failure of Jigra, Alia would be looking to score a success before moving on to Love & War alongside her husband Ranbir Kapoor and Vicky Kaushal.The response to the film's assets so far has been mixed. In a unique move, the makers have not unveiled any songs from the movie, keeping them as a surprise for the theatre audience. Whether the move will pay off or not remains to be seen. Alpha will be facing stiff competition from Welcome To The Jungle, which is currently going strong at the box office. Plus, with Dhamaal 4 arriving on July 10, it won't be an easy road for Alpha.

title: Donald Trump | అమెరికా, ఇరాన్ మ‌ధ్య పెరుగుతున్న ఉద్రిక్త‌త‌లు.. డొనాల్డ్ ట్రంప్ కీల‌క ప్ర‌క‌ట‌న‌
description: Donald Trump | అమెరికా, ఇరాన్ (US, Iran) దేశాల మధ్య ఉద్రిక్తతలు మరోసారి పెరుగుతున్నాయి. ఈ తరుణంలో అమెరికా అధ్యక్షుడు (US President) డొనాల్డ్‌ ట్రంప్ (Donald Trump) కీలక ప్రకటన చేశారు. తాజా అంశాలపై చర్చించేందుకు రావాలని ఇరాన్‌ కోరిందన్నారు. టెహ్రాన్‌ అభ్యర్థన మేరకు ఖతార్‌ రాజధాని దోహా (Doha) వేదిగా మంగళవారం సమావేశం ఉంటుందని సోషల్‌ మీడియాలో ఆయన పోస్టు చేశారు.
content:
Donald Trump : అమెరికా, ఇరాన్ (US, Iran) దేశాల మధ్య ఉద్రిక్తతలు మరోసారి పెరుగుతున్నాయి. ఈ తరుణంలో అమెరికా అధ్యక్షుడు (US President) డొనాల్డ్‌ ట్రంప్ (Donald Trump) కీలక ప్రకటన చేశారు. తాజా అంశాలపై చర్చించేందుకు రావాలని ఇరాన్‌ కోరిందన్నారు. టెహ్రాన్‌ అభ్యర్థన మేరకు ఖతార్‌ రాజధాని దోహా (Doha) వేదిగా మంగళవారం సమావేశం ఉంటుందని సోషల్‌ మీడియాలో ఆయన పోస్టు చేశారు. ఇరుదేశాల ప్రతినిధులు ఇందులో పాల్గొంటారని చెప్పారు.
ఈ సమావేశంలో తుది ఒప్పందంపైనా చర్చించే అవకాశం ఉన్నట్లు తెలుస్తోంది. కాగా ఖతార్‌లో ఈ వారం ఇరాన్, అమెరికా బృందాల మధ్య సమావేశాలు నిర్వహించే ప్రణాళికలేవీ లేవని ఇరాన్ ఉప విదేశాంగ మంత్రి కాజెమ్ ఘరిబబాడి పేర్కొన్నారు. తమ హామీల అమలుకు సంబంధించి అమెరికా తీసుకుంటున్న చర్యల పర్యవేక్షణ, ఖతార్‌తో సంప్రదింపులు యథావిధిగా కొనసాగుతున్నాయని అన్నారు. అయితే దోహాలో మంగళవారం ఇరుదేశాల ప్రతినిధుల మధ్య చర్చలు జరగనున్నట్లు వస్తున్న వార్తలను తాము ధ్రువీకరించలేమని తెలిపారు. పరిస్థితులు చక్కబడిన తర్వాతే చర్చలు జరుగుతాయని స్పష్టంచేశారు.

title: अकोला मनपा को विधायक पठान की चेतावनी, एक सप्ताह में समस्याएं नहीं सुलझीं तो होगा आंदोलन
description: Akola Civic Issues: अकोला के विधायक साजिद खान पठान ने पहली बारिश के बाद शहर में जलभराव, जर्जर सड़कों और अधूरी नाला सफाई को लेकर मनपा प्रशासन को एक सप्ताह में समस्याएं दूर करने की चेतावनी दी।
content:
Akola Municipal Corporation: पहली ही बारिश में अकोला महानगरपालिका के विकास कार्यों और नाला सफाई के दावों की पोल खुलने के बाद पश्चिम अकोला के विधायक साजिद खान पठान ने सोमवार को कांग्रेस के पार्षदों के साथ मनपा आयुक्त सुनील लहाने से मुलाकात कर शहर की विभिन्न समस्याओं को लेकर प्रशासन को कड़ी चेतावनी दी। उन्होंने स्पष्ट कहा कि यदि एक सप्ताह के भीतर नागरिकों की समस्याओं का समाधान नहीं किया गया, तो संबंधित अधिकारियों और कर्मचारियों को उनकी कुर्सियों पर बैठने नहीं दिया जाएगा।
मनपा आयुक्त के कक्ष में आयोजित बैठक में विधायक पठान ने शहर की जर्जर सड़कों, अधूरी नाला सफाई, भूमिगत गटर परियोजना की अव्यवस्था और नागरिकों को हो रही परेशानियों का मुद्दा प्रमुखता से उठाया। उन्होंने कहा कि पहली ही बारिश में कई क्षेत्रों में नालों का पानी सीधे लोगों के घरों में घुस गया, जिससे मनपा द्वारा नाला सफाई के किए गए दावों की वास्तविकता सामने आ गई।
पहली बारिश में खुली मनपा की पोल
परियोजना के तहत बिना स्वीकृत निधि वाले कई मार्गों की खुदाई किए जाने पर भी गंभीर आपत्ति जताई। उन्होंने कहा कि ठेकेदार ने बिना योजना के सड़कें खोदकर छोड़ दी है। स्थायी मरम्मत होने तक सड़कों पर मुरूम डालकर उन्हें यातायात योग्य बनाने के निर्देश देने की भी मांग की।
ये भी पढ़े:  नसरापुर कांड में कोर्ट का बड़ा फैसला, दोषी भीमराव कांबले को सुनाई मौत की सजा, 3 साल की मासूम से की थी हैवानियत 
नए आउटलेट बनाने की मांग
विधायक साजिद खान पठान ने कहा कि शहर के अनेक नालों की सफाई अधूरी रहने के कारण बारिश का पानी सीधे लोगों के घरों में प्रवेश कर रहा है। उन्होंने सभी नालों की युद्धस्तर पर पुनः सफाई कराने तथा जल निकासी की समस्या वाले क्षेत्रों में नए आउटलेट बनाकर स्थायी समाधान करने की मांग की। बैठक के दौरान मनपा आयुक्त ने सभी मुद्दों को गंभीरता से सुनते हुए चार दिनों के भीतर आवश्यक कार्रवाई करने का आश्वासन दिया।

title: Hera Pheri 3 Movie Update: ‘हेरा फेरी 3’ को लगा एक और बड़ा झटका! प्रियदर्शन के बाहर होने से बढ़ीं टेंशन
description: Priyadarshan Leaves Hera Pheri 3 Movie: फेमस डायरेक्टर प्रियदर्शन ने खुद को 'हेरा फेरी 3' से अलग कर लिया है। उन्होंने फिल्म के कानूनी विवादों और आंतरिक कलह के कारण इसके कभी रिलीज न होने की आशंका जताई।
content:
Akshay Kumar Hera Pheri 3: कॉमेडी के शौकीनों के लिए &#8216;हेरा फेरी&#8217; फ्रेंचाइजी एक ऐसी फिल्म है, जिसके तीसरे भाग का लोग सालों से इंतजार कर रहे हैं। बाबू भैया, राजू और श्याम की तिकड़ी को दोबारा बड़े पर्दे पर देखने की उम्मीदों को अब एक बहुत बड़ा झटका लगा है। इस कल्ट कॉमेडी फिल्म के ओरिजिनल डायरेक्टर प्रियदर्शन ने खुद को इस प्रोजेक्ट से पूरी तरह अलग कर लिया है।
फिल्म के निर्माता फिरोज नाडियाडवाला ने हाल ही में एक इंटरव्यू में इस ओर इशारा किया कि फिल्म के डायरेक्टर अब इस नए प्रोजेक्ट का हिस्सा नहीं हैं। इस बात पर मुहर लगाते हुए प्रियदर्शन ने खुद एक बातचीत में साफ किया कि फिरोज का दावा बिल्कुल सच है और वे अब इस फिल्म से किसी भी रूप में जुड़े हुए नहीं हैं।
प्रियदर्शन ने खुद किया हैरान करने वाला बड़ा खुलासा
प्रियदर्शन ने निराशा जाहिर करते हुए एक बेहद चौंकाने वाली बात कही कि इस प्रोजेक्ट से जुड़े कई कानूनी पचड़े और आपस के झगड़े इतने गंभीर हैं कि शायद यह फिल्म कभी भी सिनेमाघरों का मुंह नहीं देख पाएगी।
डायरेक्टर प्रियदर्शन के अनुसार अब इस बात से कोई फर्क नहीं पड़ता कि वे इस फिल्म का हिस्सा हैं या नहीं, क्योंकि असली संकट इसके वजूद पर ही मंडरा रहा है।
म्यूजिक और राइट्स के जाल में फंसी फिल्म
इस साल शुरू होने वाली फिल्म &#8216;हेरा फेरी 3&#8217; की शूटिंग के टलने के पीछे कॉपीराइट और म्यूजिक राइट्स का एक गहरा दलदल है। टी-सीरीज के मालिक भूषण कुमार ने  इस फिल्म के संगीत अधिकारों पर अपना मालिकाना हक जताया है, जिसे सुलझाए बिना फिल्म का आगे बढ़ना मुश्किल होगा।
इतना ही नहीं, &#8216;सेवन आर्ट्स इंटरनेशनल&#8217; नाम के एक प्रोडक्शन हाउस ने कानूनी तौर पर दावा किया है, कि फिल्म मेकर फिरोज नाडियाडवाला के पास केवल मलयालम फिल्म &#8216;रामजी राव स्पीकिंग&#8217; का हिंदी रिमेक बनाने का अधिकार था। उन पर आरोप है कि उन्होंने &#8216;फिर हेरा फेरी&#8217; बनाकर और इस फ्रेंचाइजी के अधिकार अक्षय कुमार की कंपनी को ट्रांसफर करके पुराने समझौते का पूरी तरह से तोड़ दिया है।
ये भी पढ़ें: पाकिस्तान में ब्लॉकबस्टर, भारत में फ्लॉप रही थी ‘आवारापन’, 19 साल बाद इमरान हाशमी को मिल रहा है दूसरा मौका
करोड़ों का हर्जाना और अंदरूनी कलह से बढ़ी मुश्किलें
यह पहली बार नहीं है जब &#8216;हेरा फेरी 3&#8217;  को लेकर इतना बड़ा तमाशा खड़ा हुआ है। इससे पहले पिछले साल अभिनेता परेश रावल द्वारा फिल्म छोड़ने की खबरें भी काफी चर्चा में थीं। उस दौरान सुपरस्टार अक्षय कुमार ने उनके खिलाफ करीब 25 करोड़ रुपये के हर्जाने की मांग करते हुए अदालत का दरवाजा खटखटाया था।
हालांकि बाद में आपसी बातचीत से अक्षय कुमार ने अपना मुकदमा वापस ले लिया था। मगर एक विवाद खत्म होते ही जिस तरह से नए कानूनी विवाद और मालिकाना हक की जंग शुरू हो गई है, उसे देखकर लगता है कि दर्शकों को हंसाने वाली यह मशहूर फ्रेंचाइजी खुद कानूनी उलझनों में बुरी तरह रो रही है और इस साल तो इसका काम शुरू होना नामुमकिन है।

title: Tamil Nadu to promote e-cooking in hotels, cloud kitchens
description: Applications for new service or load enhancement for electric cooking to be given priority

title: Odisha ganja seizure ଗଞ୍ଜାମ ଓ ସୁବର୍ଣ୍ଣପୁର ଜିଲ୍ଲାରୁ ୧୨୨ କିଗ୍ରା ଗଞ୍ଜେଇ ଜବତ, ୫ ଗିରଫ
description:
କଟକ: ଆନ୍ତଃରାଜ୍ୟ ବେଆଇନ ଗଞ୍ଜେଇ ଚାଲାଣ ବିରୋଧରେ ଗଞ୍ଜାମ ଓ ସୁବର୍ଣ୍ଣପୁର ପୁଲିସକୁ ବଡ଼ ସଫଳତା ମିଳିଛି। ପୃଥକ ପୃଥକ ଚଢ଼ାଉରେ ପ୍ରାୟ ୧୨୨ କିଲୋଗ୍ରାମ୍‌ ଗଞ୍ଜେଇ ଜବତ କରିବା ସହ ଏହି ମାମଲାରେ ୫ଜଣଙ୍କୁ ଗିରଫ କରାଯାଇଛି।
ରାଜ୍ୟ ପୁଲିସ ମୁଖ୍ୟାଳୟରୁ ଜାରି ସୂଚନାନୁସାରେ, ଗଞ୍ଜାମ ବଡ଼ଗଡ଼ ଥାନା ପୁଲିସ ଏକ ଫର୍ଡ ଏଣ୍ଡେଓଭର ଗାଡ଼ିକୁ ସନ୍ଦେହରେ ଅଟକାଇ ଯାଞ୍ଚ କରାଯାଇଥିଲା। ଗାଡ଼ିରେ ସ୍ୱତନ୍ତ୍ର ଭାବେ ନିର୍ମିତ ଏକ ଗୁପ୍ତ ଚାମ୍ବର ଭିତରେ ଗଞ୍ଜେଇ ଲୁଚାଇ ରଖାଯାଇଥିଲା। ଏଥିରୁ ୧୦୦ କେଜି ଗଞ୍ଜେଇ ଜବତ କରିବା ସହ ଘଟଣାରେ ସଂପୃକ୍ତ ୪ ଜଣ ଅଭିଯୁକ୍ତଙ୍କୁ ଗିରଫ କରିଛି। କାର୍‌ ସହ ଘଟଣାରେ ବ୍ୟବହୃତ ଦୁଇଟି ଆପାଚି ମୋଟରସାଇକେଲ  ଜବତ କରାଯାଇଛି। ଗିରଫ ଅଭିଯୁକ୍ତମାନେ ହେଲେ ମୁରଲୀଧର ସେଠୀ (୪୦), ଗୋପାଳ ଗମାଙ୍ଗ (୫୪), ମିଖାଲ ଗମାଙ୍ଗ (୪୦) ଏବଂ ଈଶା ଜାନି (୨୮)।
ଏହି ଘଟଣାରେ ବଡ଼ଗଡ଼ ଥାନାରେ ମାମଲା ନଂ-୨୪୪, ତାରିଖ ୨୮.୦୬.୨୦୨୬ ଅନୁଯାୟୀ ଏନ୍ଡିପିଏସ୍ ର ଧାରା ୨୦(B)(ii)(C) ଓ ୨୯ ରେ ମାମଲା ରୁଜୁ କରାଯାଇଛି। ସମସ୍ତ ଅଭିଯୁକ୍ତଙ୍କୁ କୋର୍ଟକୁ ପଠାଯାଇଛି।
ତଦନ୍ତରୁ ଜଣାପଡ଼ିଛି ଯେ, ଏହି ଗଞ୍ଜେଇ ଗଞ୍ଜାମ ଜିଲ୍ଲାର ନାକଟିରି ଗ୍ରାମରୁ ସଂଗ୍ରହ କରାଯାଇଥିଲା ଏବଂ ବ୍ରହ୍ମପୁର ଦେଇ ଗୁଜରାଟକୁ ଚୋରାଚାଲାଣ କରାଯାଉଥିଲା।  
ପୋଲିସ ଏହି ଆନ୍ତଃରାଜ୍ୟ ଚୋରାଚାଲାଣ ଚକ୍ରର ସମ୍ପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ନେଟୱର୍କ, ଯୋଗାଣକାରୀ, ଗୁଜରାଟରେ ଥିବା ଗ୍ରହଣକାରୀ ଏବଂ ଏଥିରେ ସଂପୃକ୍ତ ଅନ୍ୟମାନଙ୍କ ସମ୍ପର୍କରେ ଅଧିକ ତଦନ୍ତ ଜାରି ରଖିଛି।
ସେହିଭଳି,  ୨୮ ଜୁନରେ ସୁବର୍ଣ୍ଣପୁର  ଜିଲ୍ଲାର ବିଭିନ୍ନ ଥାନା ଅଞ୍ଚଳରେ ଗଞ୍ଜେଇ ଓ ବେଆଇନ ମଦ କାରବାର ବିରୋଧରେ କଡ଼ା କାର୍ଯ୍ୟାନୁଷ୍ଠାନ ଗ୍ରହଣ କରାଯାଇଛି।
ଡୁଙ୍ଗୁରିପାଲି ଥାନା ମାମଲା ନଂ-୧୬୩, ତା. ୨୮.୦୬.୨୦୨୬, ଧାରା ୨୦(ବି)(ii)(ସି)/୨୫/୨୯ ଏନ୍ଡିପିଏସ୍ ଆଇନ ଅନୁଯାୟୀ ୨୨.୫୭୮ କିଲୋଗ୍ରାମ ଗଞ୍ଜେଇ ଏବଂ ଏକ ମହିନ୍ଦ୍ରା ସ୍କର୍ପିଓ ଗାଡ଼ି ଜବତ କରାଯାଇଛି। 
ଏହି ଘଟଣାରେ ବଲାଙ୍ଗିର ଜିଲ୍ଲା ଅଗଲପୁର ଥାନା ଉଚ୍ଛବାହାଲ ଗ୍ରାମର ମୋହନ ସାହୁ (୪୩)ଙ୍କୁ ଗିରଫ କରି କୋର୍ଟ ଚାଲାଣ କରାଯାଇଛି।
ତରଭା ଥାନା ମାମଲା ନଂ-୨୪୩, ତା. ୨୮.୦୬.୨୦୨୬, ଧାରା ୫୨(ଏ) ଓଡ଼ିଶା ଅବକାରୀ ଆଇନ ଅନୁଯାୟୀ ବୌଦ୍ଧ ଜିଲ୍ଲା କଣ୍ଟାମାଳ ଥାନା ଅଇଳାଚୂଆଁ ଗ୍ରାମର ଖଗେଶ୍ୱର ରଣା (୩୫)ଙ୍କୁ ଗିରଫ କରି କୋର୍ଟ ଚାଲାଣ କରାଯାଇଛି। ତାଙ୍କଠାରୁ ୮୫ ଲିଟର ଦେଶୀ ମଦ ଏବଂ ଏକ ହିରୋ ଗ୍ଲାମର ମୋଟରସାଇକେଲ ଜବତ କରାଯାଇଛି।
ସେହିପରି ଉଲୁଣ୍ଡା ଥାନା ମାମଲା ନଂ-୧୨୮, ତା. ୨୮.୦୬.୨୦୨୬, ଧାରା ୫୨(ଏ) ଓଡ଼ିଶା ଅବକାରୀ ଆଇନ ଅନୁଯାୟୀ ସୁବର୍ଣ୍ଣପୁର ଜିଲ୍ଲା ବାଦଲି ଗ୍ରାମର ବାସୁଦେବ ସେଠ (୪୫)ଙ୍କୁ ଅନୁରୋଧ ଗିରଫ କରି କୋର୍ଟ ଚାଲାଣ କରାଯାଇଛି। ତାଙ୍କ ନିକଟରୁ ରବର ଟ୍ୟୁବରେ ଥିବା ୯୦ ଲିଟର ଦେଶୀ ମଦ ଏବଂ ନମ୍ବର ପ୍ଲେଟ୍ ନଥିବା ଧୂସର ରଙ୍ଗର ହିରୋ ହୋଣ୍ଡା ପ୍ୟାସନ୍ ପ୍ଲସ୍ ମୋଟରସାଇକେଲ ଜବତ କରାଯାଇଛି।

title: Kawhi Leonard reveals only team he will sign a long-term extension with if traded
description: Kawhi Leonard’s future with the Los Angeles Clippers appears to be one of the bigger storylines in the NBA right now, and a new report has added an intriguing twist to the speculation. According to a recent report, Leonard has…
content: Kawhi Leonard’s future with the Los Angeles Clippers appears to be one of the bigger storylines in the NBA right now, and a new report has added an intriguing twist to the speculation. According to a recent report, Leonard has identified just one team outside of Los Angeles that he would be willing to commit to on a long-term contract if he were traded: the Toronto Raptors. It’s a surprising development considering how his first stint in Toronto ended.MORE: LeBron James reportedly has a familiar suitor this offseasonCould History Repeat Itself?Jun 13, 2019; Oakland, CA, USA; Toronto Raptors forward Kawhi Leonard (2) and Toronto Raptors center Serge Ibaka (9) celebrate with the Larry O’Brien Trophy after the Golden State Warriors in game six of the 2019 NBA Finals at Oracle Arena. Mandatory Credit: Kyle Terada-Imagn ImagesLeonard spent just one season with the Raptors, but it couldn’t have gone much better. He led Toronto to the first NBA championship in franchise history, cementing his place as one of the greatest players to ever wear a Raptors uniform despite playing only a single season with the organization.Following that championship run, Toronto made every effort to keep Leonard in Canada. However, his focus never wavered. He wanted to return home to Southern California, ultimately signing with the Clippers in free agency. Now, years later, the possibility of a second chapter in Toronto appears to be on the table.A Change May Be ComingReports have suggested the Clippers are expected to explore trading Leonard this offseason, potentially signaling the end of an era in Los Angeles. While Kawhi has remained one of the league’s elite players when healthy, the Clippers have fallen short of the championship expectations that accompanied his arrival. Injuries and playoff disappointments have prevented the franchise from reaching the heights many envisioned when he signed.If the Clippers decide it’s time to move in a different direction, Leonard has reportedly made it clear where he’d be willing to stay long term.Why Toronto Makes SenseJun 5, 2019; Oakland, CA, USA; Toronto Raptors forward Kawhi Leonard (2) shoots the ball against Golden State Warriors guard Stephen Curry (30) in game three of the 2019 NBA Finals at Oracle Arena. Mandatory Credit: Kyle Terada-USA TODAY SportsUnlike the Raptors team Leonard left in 2019, today’s version of Toronto is once again trending in the right direction. The Raptors surprised many observers with their progress this past season and appear to have assembled a young, competitive roster capable of taking another step forward.Adding a proven playoff performer and Finals MVP like Leonard would instantly elevate the team’s ceiling while bringing back one of the most beloved players in franchise history.A Reunion Worth WatchingNothing is guaranteed until a trade actually materializes, and there will likely be several teams interested if Leonard becomes available. Still, the fact that Toronto is reportedly the only non-Los Angeles destination where he would sign a long-term extension dramatically changes the conversation.Nearly a decade after choosing California over Canada, Kawhi Leonard may be ready to revisit the decision that once disappointed an entire country. If the Raptors decide to pursue a reunion, one of the most memorable partnerships in recent NBA history could be given a second chance.— Enjoy free coverage of the top news & trending stories on The Big Lead —

Viktor Hovland beats Scottie Scheffler in dramatic Travelers Championship playoff
description: Hovland came out on top against Scheffler in a dramatic playoff on Monday
content: Viktor Hovland secured a dramatic victory at the Travelers Championship, sinking a crucial 7-foot birdie putt on the first playoff hole on Monday morning. His triumph came after Scottie Scheffler, his formidable opponent, narrowly missed a 4-foot birdie attempt that would have extended the contest.The playoff itself was a result of Scheffler's clutch performance on Sunday night, where he holed an 8-foot par putt in near darkness to force the extra hole. Returning to the par-4 18th, both golfers found the center of the fairway. Scheffler’s approach shot landed just four feet from the pin, igniting cheers from approximately 3,000 fans surrounding the green. Hovland, mirroring his Sunday rally where he overcame a two-shot deficit, responded by placing his own approach within six feet. Scottie Scheffler had to settle for a runner-up finish (Getty)His downhill birdie putt, featuring a sharp left-to-right break, just caught the inside right edge of the cup. Scheffler’s subsequent putt, played outside the left edge with too much pace, rolled past.This marks Hovland’s tenth worldwide victory and eighth on the PGA Tour, with his last win being the Valspar Championship in March 2025. For Scheffler, it was his fourth runner-up finish this year, following an opening season win at The American Express.Scheffler was also in contention at the Masters and the US Open earlier this year, but was unable to secure victory in either tournament. The playoff was charged with energy, as Norwegian fans, fresh from the World Cup in Boston, chanted "Hov-land!" in their soccer jerseys. American supporters quickly countered with "Scot-tie Scheff-ler!" chants, reminiscent of the partisan atmosphere at last year's Ryder Cup. Norway's next World Cup match is set for Dallas, Scheffler's hometown, when they take on Ivory Coast in the round of 32.Meanwhile, Mauricio Pochettino’s USA are due to face Bosnia and Herzegovina on Wednesday night.

title: AP POLYCET 2026 Online Web Option Filling Begins: Seat Allocation on July 6 for Diploma Admission
description: AP POLYCET 2026 counselling online web option filling has started for diploma admissions at polytechnic colleges in Andhra Pradesh. Students can fill options up to July 3, while seat allocation will be done on July 6.
content: The Andhra Pradesh State Board of Technical Education and Training (SBTET) has initiated the web option filling procedure for AP POLYCET 2026 counselling, an important step for getting admission in diploma programmes at various polytechnic colleges of the state.Those students who have passed the entrance test can choose the desired colleges and programmes from the counselling website.Important Dates and TimingsAccording to the official counselling schedule:Admission process: June 24 to June 30, 2026Verification of certificates: June 25 to July 1, 2026Web options entry: June 29 to July 3, 2026Changing options: July 4, 2026Allotment of seats: July 6, 2026Self-reporting and college reporting: July 7 to July 10, 2026Start of classes: July 7, 2026What is Web Options Entry?Web option entry refers to that point where students have to select their preferred polytechnic institutions and diploma programs in the order of preference. These selections become very important in deciding their seat allotment.Students will be able to login to the website using their credentials and can select several options at once. They can even change their preferences until the deadline.Eligibility for CounsellingFor being a part of the counselling procedure, candidates have to meet the following criteria:Clear AP POLYCET 2026 exam and secure valid rankPass SSC or equivalent examinationBe domicile of the stateCounselling FeesThere is an application fee that the candidates have to pay as follows:OC/BC candidates: ₹700SC/ST candidates: ₹250 Moreover, once seat allotment takes place, candidates will have to pay admission fees (approximately ₹800).Understanding the Counselling ProcedureThe process of AP POLYCET counselling comprises the following steps:Online Registration and Payment of FeeVerification of Certificate at Helpline CentresWeb Option Entry or Choice FillingSeat Allotment by Rank, Category, PreferencesSelf Reporting Online and Reporting at College of Seat Allotment Documents RequiredThe aspirants have to carry the below-mentioned documents at the time of verification and admission:AP POLYCET 2026 hall ticket and rank cardClass 10 marksheetStudy/Bonafide certificatesCaste and income certificate (if required)Transfer certificateSpecial category certificates (if required) As soon as seat allotment will be announced on July 6, the candidates have to:Download allotment letterSelf-reporting through online modeAttend the allotted college physically within the deadlineIn case of failure in both processes, the seat allotment may get cancelled.Now that web option entry is being done, it can be said that the AP POLYCET 2026 counselling procedure has entered into a decisive stage. The students have to choose their preferences carefully, as seat allotment will depend on their choice.

title: Hoopaholic’s Gazette: DM, PK, NCAA, WC & BS
description: So be true to your school now/ Just like you would to your girl (or guy) OK, maybe the wisdom of Brian Wilson doesn’t have much if anything to do with today’s entry. But I did hear it on the radio today, and the Bard of 60s teen culture was all that and fostered us […]
content: So be true to your school now/ Just like you would to your girl (or guy)OK, maybe the wisdom of Brian Wilson doesn’t have much if anything to do with today’s entry. But I did hear it on the radio today, and the Bard of 60s teen culture was all that and fostered us to become fully Cali in my day. He was deceptively wise.Plus I’ve been wanting to weigh in on the whole not-so-true-to-his-school Dusty May to Dallas deal.At least as much as we know.It’s been what, ten days or so since the word broke that the two year coach of the national champs was deep ditching Ann Arbor to mentor Cooper Flagg and the Dallas Mavericks.No official word that I’ve seen from the NBA franchise.Nor from May, though there he was at the Draft, his team grabbing one of his Wolverines with their first pick.Nor any announcement from Michigan about a replacement.Though there was a story recently in which assistant Mike Boynton, formerly head man at Oklahoma State, acknowledged he’d been asked to run the show on an interim basis.So, what’s the hold up on official announcements out of Big D?Contract negotiations is my guess. Salary issues? Roster control parameters?Of course, we’re anxious to see if May says it was the whole NIL quagmire that accelerated his jump to the next level, which most observers believe was inevitable in Brad Stevens fashion at some juncture.I love that May won’t be in the college game. Being the next Coach K and all.The take on the matter that made me smile came from an IU diehard. Who like most Crimson & Cream fanatics remain pissed that the Hoosiers didn’t pull the plug on Mike Woodson when former manager May was available to return to his alma mater.He wants him to become disenchanted with the NBA and return to Bloomington.Stranger things have happened.What we do know is that the haughty maize and blue gang have lost three high level coaches in recent times. John Beilein and Jim Harbaugh having bailed before May. * * * * *May’s move also adds a wrinkle to the reality that he was just that close to being U of L’s coach.Landing Pat Kelsey, who has the energy for yearly roster flips and the current craziness of college sports, appears luckier than ever.We love the one we’re with. * * * * *Yes I’m a hoopaholic 24/7/365, but I must admit I’m diggin’ the scene with a futbol lean.More than comfortable am I to admit that the World Cup, for oh so many reasons, is The Best Sporting Event In The World. Easily the biggest.Remember having a holiday in Spain with my bride and friends during the ’06 WC. In Granada, the streets were empty one afternoon when the Spanish side was in action. Except for bars and restaurants which were jammed; people crowded outside watching on TVs in the windows.Got a sense of that global obsession the other late afternoon, when I stopped by Adelita for some carry out. It’s the marvelous little family-run Mexican restaurant on Frankfort Ave and Ewing.The whole fam, including grandma usually in the kitchen cooking, were sitting in front of a big screen watching Ecuador vs. Germany on Telemundo. My guy, usually behind the counter, advised he had a five game parlay going.For probably the first time ever (for men) that fervor is catching on universally around here. Given that the USMNT is legit, and North America’s the host.Rest easy. As much as I’m locked in, not going to try and convince you to watch if you don’t wanna.But of interest in our b-ball obsessive minds: There has been a fascinating conversation about the expanded World Cup Finals and the expanding NCAA tournament.How if the b-ball guys handle it in the same manner as FIBA, there’ll be more underdogs who might surprise.Like Ivory Coast and Cape Verde, who made the knockout round of 32.Bosnia-Herzegovina is in.Long time power Italy didn’t even make to the final 48.Selection committee, you payin’ attention? Take heed. Do it right.Merrimack, not 17-17 Auburn. * * * * *For Cardinal fans looking for a rooting interest other than USA, here’s a couple.Flory Bigunga’s Congo DR.Alvaro Folgueiras’s Spain. * * * * *Oh yeah, the BS. (A football aside.)Brendan Sorsby.No NCAA. Ever.No NFL. At least for a year.No help from NFLPA.No CFL.Chris Redman, say no.Kid’s getting an abject lesson in the realities of recovery from addiction.He’s not in charge.There shall be ongoing consequences for his behavior.Recovery is not immediate.Certainly hope his life finds ballast.Though, shame on me, I’m getting a small kick from his comeuppance. Having experienced it as part of my own recovery from addiction starting in the early 80s and ongoing.The hubris of his “team” brings a bemused smile. Cody Campbell, there are things money cannot buy. * * * * *Now for gratuitous self promotion.I recently posted a piece about my favorite summer album.You can read it here.— c d kaplan

title: Mother blows kiss to son, 14, charged with murder of teenage girl
description: Police believe a body found in south Wales last week is Lilly Jones, 14, who was reported missing.

title: മാന്നാർ തോട്ടുമുഖപ്പ് കടവിൽ മാലിന്യനിക്ഷേപം രൂക്ഷം; പ്രദേശവാസികൾ ദുരിതത്തിൽ
description: മാന്നാറിലെ പമ്പാ നദിയുടെ തോട്ടുമുഖപ്പ് കടവിൽ ഭക്ഷണാവശിഷ്ടങ്ങളും ഇറച്ചിമാലിന്യങ്ങളും തള്ളുന്നത് രൂക്ഷമായിരിക്കുന്നു. ഇത് പ്രദേശവാസികൾക്കും സമീപത്തെ കോളേജ് വിദ്യാർത്ഥിനികൾക്കും ദുർഗന്ധവും ബുദ്ധിമുട്ടുകളും സൃഷ്ടിക്കുന്നു
content: <p><strong>മാന്നാർ: </strong>കുളിക്കുന്നതിനും തുണി അലക്കുന്നതിനുമായി സ്ത്രീകളടക്കം നിരവധിയാളുകൾ ദിനംപ്രതി ആശ്രയിക്കുന്ന പമ്പാ നദിയിലെ തോട്ടുമുഖപ്പ് കടവിൽ മാലിന്യനിക്ഷേപം രൂക്ഷമാകുന്നു. മാന്നാർ പഞ്ചായത്ത് അഞ്ചാം വാർഡിൽ ടൗണിനോട് ചേർന്ന് കിടക്കുന്ന പ്രധാന കുളിക്കടവിലാണിത്. പ്ലാസ്റ്റിക് കവറുകളിൽ നിറച്ച ഭക്ഷണാവശിഷ്ടങ്ങളും ഇറച്ചിമാലിന്യങ്ങളുമാണ് കുളിക്കടവിലും പമ്പാ നദിയുടെ കൈവരിയായ തോട്ടുമുഖപ്പ് തോട്ടിലും കൂടുതലായി വലിച്ചെറിയുന്നത്. ഇതുമൂലം പ്രദേശത്ത് രൂക്ഷമായ ദുർഗന്ധമാണ് വമിക്കുന്നത്.</p><p>തൊട്ടടുത്തുള്ള നഫീസത്തുൽ മിസ്‌രിയ ഇസ്ലാമിക് ആൻഡ് ആർട്സ് കോളജിലെ വിദ്യാര്‍ത്ഥിനികൾക്കും പ്രദേശവാസികൾക്കും മാലിന്യനിക്ഷേപവും ദുർഗന്ധവും വലിയ ബുദ്ധിമുട്ടാണ് സൃഷ്ടിക്കുന്നത്. പഞ്ചായത്ത് മുൻകൈയെടുത്ത് ഇവിടെ കാമറകൾ സ്ഥാപിച്ച് മാലിന്യം തള്ളുന്നവരെ കണ്ടെത്തി കർശന നടപടി സ്വീകരിക്കണമെന്നാണ് നാട്ടുകാരുടെ പ്രധാന ആവശ്യം.</p><p>ടൗണിനോട് ചേർന്ന് കിടക്കുന്ന വിശാലമായ തോട്ടുമുഖപ്പ് കടവിലെ മാലിന്യങ്ങൾ നീക്കം ചെയ്ത് സൗന്ദര്യവൽക്കരണം നടത്തിയാൽ നാട്ടുകാർക്ക് മികച്ചൊരു വിശ്രമകേന്ദ്രമാക്കി മാറ്റാൻ കഴിയും. ഇരിപ്പിടങ്ങളും ലൈറ്റുകളും സ്ഥാപിച്ച് ഇവിടം മനോഹരമാക്കിയാൽ മാലിന്യനിക്ഷേപത്തിന് ഒരു പരിധിവരെ തടയിടാനാകും. കുട്ടനാട് പാക്കേജിൽ ഉൾപ്പെടുത്തി മൂന്ന് കോടി രൂപയുടെ ഭരണാനുമതി ലഭിച്ച പമ്പാ തോട്ടുമുഖപ്പ്-കോയിക്കൽ ഭാഗം തോട് നവീകരണം കൂടി യാഥാർഥ്യമായാൽ മാന്നാർ ടൗണിലെ പ്രധാന വിശ്രമകേന്ദ്രമായി ഈ കടവ് മാറും.&nbsp;</p><p>&nbsp;</p><p>&nbsp;</p>

title: Marcel Schäfer outlines expectations as Demichelis begins tenure as RB Leipzig head coach
description: After being appointed as RB Leipzig’s successor to Ole Werner as head coach a week ago, Martin Demichelis officially began his work at his new club on Monday.In an interview with Bild, RB Leipzig ma...
content: Marcel Schäfer outlines expectations as Demichelis begins tenure as RB Leipzig head coachAfter being appointed as RB Leipzig’s successor to Ole Werner as head coach a week ago, Martin Demichelis officially began his work at his new club on Monday.In an interview with Bild, RB Leipzig managing director for sport Marcel Schäfer spoke in detail about the appointment and outlined what he expects the former Argentina international to bring to the team.“We want to win matches. That comes through a tactical component, a physical component. And there is also this enthusiasm, this fire, this passion. Martin combines all of that. He has experienced a lot in his career, has played under many coaches at the highest level. And he has taken something from all of them. He knows pressure situations, when you have to deliver,” Schäfer said. “His basic style of football stands for incredibly high intensity, high pressing and winning the ball back early. He wants to play forward immediately after regaining possession. An ‘attack mode’ style of football. That is something that convinced us in the discussions, the analysis and the observations.”Demichelis arrives after a short spell as head coach of RCD Mallorca, where he was unable to prevent relegation despite winning five and drawing three of his 12 matches in charge.That his stint in Mallorca ended in relegation is not a concern for Schäfer.“Yes, he was relegated with Mallorca. But he only coached the team for twelve matches and achieved a points average that would have been enough to qualify for Europe in La Liga. We improved a lot last year, built a very solid foundation, and of course we now want to take another step forward in terms of intensity, pressing, physical dominance, passion and enthusiasm," he said.The success Xabi Alonso achieved at Bayer Leverkusen and the impact Vincent Kompany has made at Bayern Munich have highlighted the potential benefits of appointing former players as head coaches in the Bundesliga in recent years. Asked whether Leipzig expect something similar from Demichelis, Schäfer urged caution.“First of all, I believe that Martin will simply do us good with his experience and his character traits. Of course, you can see a trend where Kompany and Alonso have brought certain things that not only shaped their respective clubs but also the league. But that is no guarantee. Therefore, I would be cautious with premature comparisons.”

title: Enzo Maresca hired by Manchester City to anger of Chelsea
description: Enzo Maresca has been hired by Manchester City as Pep Guardiola’s replacement on a three-year contract.The Italian returns for his third spell at the club, having served as Guardiola’s assistant m...
content: Enzo Maresca hired by Manchester City to anger of ChelseaEnzo Maresca has been hired by Manchester City as Pep Guardiola’s replacement on a three-year contract.The Italian returns for his third spell at the club, having served as Guardiola’s assistant manager before becoming Chelsea’s head coach in 2024 and lifting the Europa Conference League and Club World Cup in 2025.He would remain at the Blues until January 2026, when his relationship broke down with the club’s hierarchy to an extent that he saw fit to resign from his position on New Year’s Day.Maresca’s move to Manchester was stalled by his former club negotiating for a compensatory package should their former boss join the Cityzens.On joining the eight-time Premier League winners, Maresca said: “Manchester City is a club I know very well and to have the chance to manage this team is a brilliant opportunity for me.“City is an incredibly well-run football club. Everything they do is innovative, planned and purposeful. For a manager, that is a dream situation. It provides the consistency I need to do my job effectively.“I know this Club, I know the demands and I know the expectations. The quality of the people who work here is what makes it so special, and I want to thank them for showing faith in my ability.“I cannot wait to start coaching the players. I want us to win, play good football and enjoy the pressure of representing Manchester City.”Chelsea have since released a statement appearing to pin blame for their poor season on Maresca and his ambition to succeed Guardiola motivating him to terminate his contract, which the club believes “he had no right to terminate”.The London club wrote: “In autumn last year, the club was informed by our former head coach [Maresca] that there might be an opportunity for him to succeed Pep Guardiola at the end of the season.“It became clear to us that it was his strong desire to succeed Guardiola and that he was fully committed to pursuing the opportunity, despite the fact he was under a long-term contract which he had no right to terminate.“In December 2025, our head coach unexpectedly and abruptly resigned from his position. Obviously, we felt let down as we believed that his head and heart were focused on another club and another opportunity, despite having just arrived at Chelsea the year before.“No club wants to change its head coach midway through a season. However, in light of his decision not to continue fulfilling his responsibilities through to the end of the season, the club was left with no choice but to protect our players, our supporters, and the badge and accept his resignation.”Xabi Alonso was since hired to replace Maresca following his dismissal by Real Madrid in the final months of the 2025/26 La Liga season, in which Los Blancos went trophyless.Manchester City Chairman Khaldoon Al Mubarak believes City and Maresca are a perfect match, and said the style of football the Italian favours is a reflection of the club’s values.“Enzo is someone who has always sought out opportunities to challenge himself and succeed in his managerial career. He brings a personality, passion and intelligence completely aligned to our needs,” he said.“He is re-joining an organisation that is entirely in lock-step with his ambition and hunger for achievement and his return to Manchester City is therefore a welcome natural next step for both him and the Club.“Enzo inherits a squad and football organisation perfectly suited to reflect and evolve his brand of football, and we are all very much looking forward to seeing the impact he can have in building further on the Club’s success.“Welcome home Enzo.”For more detailed reports, reaction, and analysis of the World Cup as it happens, head to our website and favourite our page on OneFootball.

title: Brazil legend Romario heaps praise on Vinicius: ‘One of the five best players in this World Cup’
description: Vinicius Jr. has taken matters into his own hands for Brazil in the ongoing FIFA World Cup, and it is safe to say that he has been central to all of the team’s success so far.In his team’s three g...
content: Brazil legend Romario heaps praise on Vinicius: ‘One of the five best players in this World Cup’Vinicius Jr. has taken matters into his own hands for Brazil in the ongoing FIFA World Cup, and it is safe to say that he has been central to all of the team’s success so far.In his team’s three games so far, the Real Madrid superstar already has four goals and an assist to his name and has directly contributed to five of his team’s seven goals.His form has been impressive, not only in terms of his attacking forays but also his clinical finishing, and Real Madrid will be pleased to see how he has rediscovered his best under the highest of pressure.In fact, his performances have even led to a renewed interest in the Real Madrid board to speed up the star’s contract renewal – something that has been at a standstill for months now.Stepping up for Brazil. (Photo by Megan Briggs/Getty Images)Romario’s praiseBrazilian legend Romario spoke to the media in a recent interview where he commented on his nation’s performances at the FIFA World Cup so far and the players who have stood out.Commenting specifically on which player is currently the Selecao’s most important figure, he had no hesitation in naming Real Madrid’s Vinicius Jr.“Vini Jr is Brazil’s main man. He really is,” he told RMC Sport.Elaborating on how good the left-winger has been for Brazil in the ongoing event, Romario said,“He’s one of the five best players in this World Cup, and he has everything to be the main protagonist of this entire tournament.”Vinicius has scored four goals at the World Cup. (Photo by Dan Mullan/Getty Images)For such words to come from the mouth of a legend like Romario, needless to say, speaks highly of the winger’s talent and influence.Where do Vinicius and Brazil stand?Brazil qualified for the knockout stages of the FIFA World Cup quite comfortably and are one of the favourites to advance deep into the competition.Their first test in the knockouts, however, sees them face off against Japan later tonight in the Round of 32, and it is clear that the game will be anything but simple.With Barcelona star Raphinha suffering an injury, Vinicius now has more responsibility than ever before in the national team. His performance today, needless to say, may well be what makes the difference.

title: Coimbatore Corporation eyes December deadline to complete Phase II biomining at Vellalore dump yard
Lord Jagannath: ସ୍ନାନ ପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣିମାରେ ଭକ୍ତିମୟ ପରିବେଶ, ଆତ୍ମବିଭୋର ହେଲେ ଶ୍ରଦ୍ଧାଳୁ
description:
ରାଇରଙ୍ଗପୁର (ତୁ‌ଷାର କାନ୍ତ ମହାନ୍ତ): ମୟୂରଭଂଜ ଜିଲ୍ଲା ରାଇରଙ୍ଗପୁରଜଗନ୍ନାଥ ମନ୍ଦିରରେ ମହାପ୍ରଭୁଙ୍କ ପବିତ୍ର ଦେବସ୍ନାନ ପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣିମା ଉତ୍ସବ ଅନୁଷ୍ଠିତ ହୋଇଯାଇଛି। ବର୍ଷକରେ ଥରେ ସ୍ନାନବେଦୀକୁ ଆସି ୧୦୮ କଳସ ସୁବାସିତ ଜଳରେ ସ୍ନାନ କରିଛନ୍ତି ଚତୁର୍ଦ୍ଧାମୂରତି। 
ଆଜି ସ୍ନାନ ପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣିମା ଅବସରରେ ଭୋର୍‌ରୁ ଶ୍ରୀଜିଉଙ୍କ ମଙ୍ଗଳ ଆଳତି ଓ ଅନ୍ୟାନ୍ୟ ନୀତିକାନ୍ତି ଶେଷ ହେବା ପରେ ପହଣ୍ଡିରେ ସ୍ନାନବେଦୀକୁ ବିଜେ କରିଥିଲେ ମହାପ୍ରଭୁ। ସ୍ନାନମଣ୍ଡପରେ ଜଳାଧିବାସ ନୀତି ସମ୍ପନ୍ନ ହେବା ପରେ ସୁବର୍ଣ୍ଣ କୂପରୁ ଅଣାଯାଇଥିବା ୧୦୮ କଳସ ସୁବାସିତ ଜଳରେ ମହାପ୍ରଭୁଙ୍କୁ ମହାସ୍ନାନ କରାଯାଇଛି।

ଚଳିତ ବର୍ଷ ବେଶ୍ ଉତ୍ସାହର ସହ ହଜାର ହଜାର ଭକ୍ତଙ୍କ ସମାଗମ ଦେଖିବାକୁ ମିଳିଛି ରାଇରଙ୍ଗପୁରରେ। ମହାପ୍ରଭୁଙ୍କ ଏହି ସ୍ନାନ ରୂପ ଦେଖି ଭକ୍ତମାନେ ଆତ୍ମବିଭୋର ହୋଇପଡ଼ିଛନ୍ତି। ତେବେ ତା ପୂର୍ବରୁ ଭକ୍ତଙ୍କୁ ଦର୍ଶନ ଦେବା ପାଇଁ ପ୍ରଭୁ ଧାରଣ କରିବେ ସେହି ଦେବଦୁର୍ଲ୍ଲଭ ଗଜାନନ ବା ହାତୀ ବେଶ। ଏହି ଅଲୌକିକ ଦୃଶ୍ୟକୁ ନୟନଭରି ଉପଭୋଗ କରିବା ପାଇଁ ଏବେ ମନ୍ଦିର ପରିସରରେ ଭକ୍ତଙ୍କ ଭିଡ଼ ଜମିବାରେ ଲାଗିଛି। ପ୍ରଶାସନ ଓ ମନ୍ଦିର କମିଟି ପକ୍ଷରୁ ସୁରକ୍ଷା ଓ ଶୃଙ୍ଖଳିତ ଦର୍ଶନ ପାଇଁ ବ୍ୟାପକ ବ୍ୟବସ୍ଥା ଗ୍ରହଣ କରାଯାଇଛି।
ତେବେ ମହାପ୍ରଭୁଙ୍କ ଏହି ପବିତ୍ର ସ୍ନାନଯାତ୍ରା ସମଗ୍ର ରାଇରଙ୍ଗପୁର ଅଞ୍ଚଳରେ ଏକ ଭକ୍ତିମୟ ପରିବେଶ ସୃଷ୍ଟି କରିଛି। ଶ୍ରଦ୍ଧାଳୁମାନଙ୍କୁ ମନ୍ଦିର ପ୍ରଶାସନ ପକ୍ଷରୁ ଅନ୍ନ ପ୍ରସାଦ ବଣ୍ଟନ କରାଯାଇଥିଲା। ଏହି ଅବସରରେ ରାଇରଙ୍ଗପୁରସ୍ଥ ବିପ୍ର ଫାଉଡେସନ ତରଫରୁ ଭକ୍ତମାନଙ୍କୁ ଦହି ଓ ଲେମ୍ବୁ ସରବତ ବଣ୍ଟନ କରିଥିଲେ। ଏଥିରେ ମନ୍ଦିର ମୁଖ୍ଯ ପୂଜକ ଦେବବ୍ରତ ରଥ ଶର୍ମା, ପୁରୋହିତ ପ୍ରଣବ ହୋତା, ଡାହୁକ କୃଷ୍ଣ ବିହାରୀ ମହାନ୍ତି ଓ ଅଭିଷେକ କୁମାର ମହାନ୍ତି, ରଥ କମିଟିର ଅଧ୍ଯକ୍ଷ ତଥା ମୟୂରଭଞ୍ଜ ଲୋକସଭା ସାଂସଦ ନବଚରଣ ମାଝୀ, ରାଇରଙ୍ଗପୁର ବିଧାୟକ ଜଲେନ ନାଏକ, ମୟୂରଭଞ୍ଜ ଜିଲ୍ଲା ପିଡ଼ି ଧର୍ମାନନ୍ଦ ବେହେରା, ମନ୍ଦିର ପରିଚାଳନା କମିଟି ସଭାପତି ବାମନଘାଟୀ ଉପଖଣ୍ଡ ଉପଜିଲ୍ଲାପାଳ ଉଗ୍ରସେନ ଓରାମ, କାର୍ଯ୍ଯକାରୀ ସଦସ୍ଯ ନବୀନ ରାମ, ମନୋଜ ଦାସ, ନିରଜ ପଣ୍ଡା, ବିକାଶ ମହାନ୍ତ, କିଶୋର କୁମାର ରଜକ, ବିକି ଶର୍ମା, ଗୌରବ ଅଗ୍ରଓ୍ବାଲ, ନିହାର ବେହେରା, ଅବସରପ୍ରାପ୍ଚ ପ୍ରଧାନଶିକ୍ଷକ ଦିଲ୍ଲୀପ କୁମାର ମହାନ୍ତିଙ୍କ ସମେତ ଅନ୍ୟ ସଦସ୍ୟମାନେ ଉପସ୍ଥିତ ଥିଲେ।
Debasnana Purnima 2026: ମହାପ୍ରଭୁଙ୍କ ସ୍ନାନଯାତ୍ରା: ଗଜପତି ମହାରାଜାଙ୍କୁ ଭେଟିଲେ ମୁଖ୍ୟମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ, ହାତୀବେଶରେ ଦର୍ଶନ ଦେଲେ ମହାପ୍ରଭୁ

title: Where to watch Brazil vs. Japan live stream, TV channel, start time for World Cup Round of 32 match
description: Here's everything you need to know to watch the Brazil vs. Japan World Cup match, including where to watch on TV or live stream, what time the game starts and more.
content:
Where to watch Brazil vs. Japan live stream, TV channel, start time for World Cup Round of 32 match originally appeared on The Sporting News.
                Add The Sporting News as a Preferred Source by clicking here.A compelling clash of tournament pedigrees takes center stage in Houston as five-time champions Brazil prepare to square off against a history-chasing Japan side in the Round of 32.The Seleção cruised through the group stage on the back of consecutive 3-0 shutouts against Haiti and Scotland, shaking off an opening 1-1 draw with Morocco.Japan found its way through the group stage following draws with the Netherlands and Sweden, as well as a 4-0 dismantling of Tunisia.Brazil's high-octane attack is ignited by Vinícius Júnior — whose four goals have him as an early Golden Boot contender — and clinical front-man Matheus Cunha, who has chipped in three of his own.Japan is led by Ayase Ueda (who's scored twice in this tournament), Daizen Maeda and Takefusa Kubo.While the star-studded Brazilians are hunting for their 16th trip deep into the knockout rounds, the Samurai Blue are desperate to shatter their own ceiling, aiming to finally advance past the Round of 16 for the first time in their nation's history.Here's everything you need to know to watch the Brazil vs. Japan World Cup match, including where to watch on TV or live stream, what time the game starts and more.LIVE: Follow Brazil vs. Japan updates from 2026 World Cup knockoutsBrazil vs. Japan live stream, TV channelTV channel: FOXLive stream: fubo, Fox One, Fox Sports app/websiteBrazil vs. Japan will be broadcast on FOX in the United States with streaming options available on its dedicated platforms.The best place to catch the match is on streaming service fubo, with new customers able to sign up for a FREE trial.Fubo offers a free trial for new subscribers, so you can try the service before you buy. Stream ESPN, ABC, CBS, Fox and 100+ top channels of live TV and sports without cable. (Participating plans only. Taxes and fees may apply.)What time does Brazil vs. Japan start?Brazil vs. Japan kicks off Monday, June 29, at 1 p.m. ET at NRG Stadium in Houston, Texas.Here's how that time translates across the United States time zones:DateKickoff timeEastern TimeMonday, June 291 p.m.Central TimeMonday, June 2912 p.m.Mountain TimeMonday, June 2911 a.m.Pacific TimeMonday, June 2910 a.m.World Cup schedule today and tomorrowAll times Eastern.Monday, June 29Brazil vs. Japan  (1 p.m.)Germany vs. Paraguay (4:30 p.m.)Netherlands vs. Morocco (9 p.m.)Tuesday, June 30Ivory Coast vs. Norway (1 p.m.)France vs. Sweden (5 p.m.)Mexico vs. Ecuador (9 p.m.)MORE:Complete World Cup schedule and fixtures2026 FIFA World Cup FAQsWhen is the 2026 FIFA World Cup?The 2026 FIFA World Cup is scheduled to run from June 11 through July 19, 2026. It will be the first World Cup hosted across three countries: the United States, Canada and Mexico.Where is the 2026 FIFA World Cup being played?The 2026 World Cup will be played across 16 host cities in North America, with matches taking place in the United States, Canada and Mexico. It will be the first men's World Cup hosted by three countries.The 16 host cities are Atlanta, Boston, Dallas, Houston, Kansas City, Los Angeles, Miami, New York/New Jersey, Philadelphia, San Francisco and Seattle in the United States; Toronto and Vancouver in Canada; and Guadalajara, Mexico City and Monterrey in Mexico.How many teams are in the 2026 World Cup?The 2026 FIFA World Cup will feature 48 teams, expanding from the 32-team format used in previous tournaments. The larger field also means more matches, more knockout-round games and more countries involved than ever before.The 48 teams are Algeria, Argentina, Australia, Austria, Belgium, Bosnia and Herzegovina, Brazil, Cape Verde, Canada, Colombia, Croatia, Curaçao, Czechia, DR Congo, Ecuador, Egypt, England, France, Germany, Ghana, Haiti, Iran, Iraq, Ivory Coast, Japan, Jordan, Mexico, Morocco, Netherlands, New Zealand, Norway, Panama, Paraguay, Portugal, Qatar, Saudi Arabia, Scotland, Senegal, South Africa, South Korea, Spain, Sweden, Switzerland, Tunisia, Türkiye, United States, Uruguay and Uzbekistan.How many games are in the 2026 World Cup?There will be 104 matches at the 2026 FIFA World Cup. That includes the group stage, knockout rounds and the final.Can I stream the 2026 World Cup?Yes. Streaming options will depend on the match, language and broadcast partner. In the U.S., Fox Sports lists FOX and FS1, which are available on fubo for English-language coverage, while Telemundo will stream every match live on Peacock and the Telemundo App for Spanish-language coverage.What channel is the 2026 World Cup on?In the U.S., English-language matches are expected across FOX and FS1, which are available on fubo for those without cable, while Spanish-language coverage will air on Telemundo and Universo, which you can stream on DIRECTV and Peacock. Check the schedule for the specific match you want to watch.When is the 2026 World Cup final?The 2026 FIFA World Cup final is scheduled for Sunday, July 19, 2026. The match will be played at New York-New Jersey Stadium, FIFA's tournament name for MetLife Stadium.What time do World Cup games start?Kickoff times vary by date, host city and round. Because the tournament is being played across multiple time zones in the United States, Canada and Mexico, fans should check the official match schedule for start times in their local time zone.Is the United States playing in the 2026 World Cup?Yes. The United States automatically qualified for the 2026 World Cup as one of the three host nations, along with Canada and Mexico.

title: Can AI Catch Scammers? Japan Enlists Virtual Police Chief To Tackle Financial Fraud
description: Japan’s AI police chief AIko joins Osaka Prefectural Police on YouTube, teaching viewers how to spot imposter scams and protect against rising online fraud.

title: సాయికృష్ణ కేసులో కీలక మలుపు.. లొంగిపోయిన హెడ్ కానిస్టేబుళ్లు
description: Sai Krishna death Case: విజయవాడ నగరంలో తీవ్ర కలకలం రేపిన సాయికృష్ణ లాకప్ డెత్ కేసులో సోమవారం నాడు ఒక కీలక మలుపు తిరిగింది. ఈ...
content:
Sai Krishna death Case: విజయవాడ నగరంలో తీవ్ర కలకలం రేపిన సాయికృష్ణ లాకప్ డెత్ కేసులో సోమవారం నాడు ఒక కీలక మలుపు తిరిగింది. ఈ కేసులో నిందితులుగా ఉంటూ, ఘటన జరిగినప్పటి నుండి పరారీలో ఉన్న హెడ్ కానిస్టేబుళ్లు అశోక్, జంగం నాని ఎట్టకేలకు పోలీసుల ఎదుట లొంగిపోయారు. కృష్ణలంక పోలీస్ స్టేషన్‌లో విధులు నిర్వహిస్తున్న వీరిద్దరూ.. ఇన్నాళ్లూ అజ్ఞాతంలో ఉండి ఇవాళ అకస్మాత్తుగా అధికారుల ముందుకు రావడం సంచలనంగా మారింది.







read also: Gade Saikrishna Death Case: సీఐ నాగరాజు కస్టడీ పిటిషన్ విచారణకు వాయిదా



 ఏసీపీ కార్యాలయానికి ఆటోలో వచ్చి సరెండర్.. దర్యాప్తు ముమ్మరం చేసిన సిట్!



నగరం నడిబొడ్డున ఉన్న సౌత్ జోన్ ఏసీపీ కార్యాలయానికి అశోక్, జంగం నాని ఒక ఆటోలో చేరుకున్నారు. అక్కడ నేరుగా ఉన్నతాధికారుల చాంబర్‌కు వెళ్లి లొంగిపోతున్నట్లు ప్రకటించారు. ఈ కేసులో ప్రధాన నిందితుడిగా ఉన్న సీఐ నాగరాజును ప్రత్యేక విచారణ బృందం (SIT) అరెస్ట్ చేసిన వెంటనే ఈ ఇద్దరు హెడ్ కానిస్టేబుళ్లు అండర్‌గ్రౌండ్‌లోకి వెళ్లిపోయారు. సాయికృష్ణ మరణానికి కారణమయ్యారనే ఆరోపణలపై వీరిద్దరిపై ఇప్పటికే కేసులు నమోదవడంతో, పోలీసులు వీరి కోసం గాలింపు చర్యలు చేపట్టారు.



సాయికృష్ణ లాకప్ డెత్ వ్యవహారంలో సీఐ నాగరాజుకు వీరు పూర్తిగా సహకరించినట్లు సిట్ అధికారులు ప్రాథమికంగా గుర్తించారు. ప్రస్తుతం నిందితులను కస్టడీలోకి తీసుకున్న పోలీసులు, ఈ దారుణానికి సంబంధించిన మరిన్ని వివరాలను రాబట్టేందుకు విచారణను వేగవంతం చేశారు.

title: ഇലക്ട്രിക് വാഹനങ്ങൾക്ക് വൻ സബ്സിഡി, റോഡ് നികുതി നൽകേണ്ട; പുതിയ ഇലക്ട്രിക് വാഹന നയം, പെട്രോൾ വാഹനങ്ങൾക്ക് ബൈ ബൈ പറയാൻ ദില്ലി
description: ഇലക്ട്രിക് വാഹനങ്ങൾക്ക് വൻ നികുതിയിളവുകളും സബ്‌സിഡികളും വാഗ്ദാനം ചെയ്ത് പുതിയ ഇവി പോളിസി. ഈ നയപ്രകാരം പെട്രോൾ, ഡീസൽ ടൂവീലറുകൾ ഘട്ടം ഘട്ടമായി നിർത്തലാക്കുകയും പഴയ വാഹനങ്ങൾ പൊളിക്കുന്നതിന് ആകർഷകമായ സ്ക്രാപ്പേജ് ആനുകൂല്യങ്ങൾ നൽകുകയും ചെയ്യും.
content: <p>ദില്ലി: ദില്ലിയിലെ വാഹന വിപണിയിൽ വിപ്ലവകരമായ മാറ്റങ്ങൾക്ക് വഴിതുറന്ന് പുതിയ 'ഡൽഹി ഇവി പോളിസി 2026' പ്രഖ്യാപിച്ചു. 30 ലക്ഷം രൂപയോ അതിൽ കുറവോ ഉള്ള എല്ലാ ഇലക്ട്രിക് കാറുകൾക്കും റോഡ് നികുതിയിലും രജിസ്ട്രേഷൻ ഫീസിലും 100 ശതമാനം ഇളവ് നൽകും. ഇലക്ട്രിക് വാഹനങ്ങൾ വാങ്ങുന്നവർക്ക് ആദ്യ വർഷം 30,000 രൂപയും രണ്ടാം വർഷം 20,000 രൂപയും മൂന്നാം വർഷം 10,000 രൂപയും സബ്‌സിഡി നൽകും. 2028 ഏപ്രിൽ 1 മുതൽ ഇലക്ട്രിക് ഇരുചക്ര വാഹനങ്ങൾ മാത്രമേ രജിസ്റ്റർ ചെയ്യൂ. അടുത്ത വർഷം മുതൽ ഓട്ടോകളിൽ ഇലക്ട്രിക് ഓട്ടോറിക്ഷകൾക്ക് മാത്രമേ രജിസ്ട്രേഷൻ നൽകൂ. പെട്രോൾ, ഡീസൽ വാഹനങ്ങൾക്ക് ബൈ ബൈ പറയാൻ ഒരുങ്ങുകയാണ് ദില്ലി.</p><p>ദേശീയ തലസ്ഥാനത്തെ വാഹനങ്ങൾ പൂർണ്ണമായും ഇലക്ട്രിക് വാഹനങ്ങളിലേക്ക് മാറ്റുക എന്ന ലക്ഷ്യത്തോടെയാണ് ഈ പദ്ധതി തയ്യാറാക്കിയിരിക്കുന്നത്. 7,000 കോടി രൂപയുടെ വൻ നിക്ഷേപത്തോടെ നടപ്പിലാക്കുന്ന ഈ നയം 2030 മാർച്ച് 31 വരെ നിലവിലുണ്ടാകും. സാധാരണ ഇന്ധന വാഹനങ്ങൾക്ക് കടുത്ത നിയന്ത്രണങ്ങളും നിരോധനങ്ങളുമാണ് പുതിയ നയം മുന്നോട്ട് വെക്കുന്നത്. വരും മാസങ്ങളിൽ ഘട്ടം ഘട്ടമായി പെട്രോൾ, ഡീസൽ വാഹനങ്ങളുടെ രജിസ്ട്രേഷൻ പൂർണ്ണമായി നിർത്തലാക്കും. പഴയതും മലിനീകരണമുണ്ടാക്കുന്നതുമായ വാഹനങ്ങൾ റോഡിൽ നിന്ന് ഒഴിവാക്കുന്നതിനായി 1,500 കോടി രൂപയുടെ വിപുലമായ സ്ക്രാപ്പേജ് പാക്കേജാണ് സർക്കാർ പ്രഖ്യാപിച്ചിരിക്കുന്നത്. നിങ്ങളുടെ പഴയ പെട്രോൾ / ഡീസൽ വാഹനം പൊളിച്ച് പുതിയ ഇലക്ട്രിക് വാഹനം വാങ്ങുകയാണെങ്കിൽ വലിയ തുക ആനുകൂല്യമായി ലഭിക്കും. കാറുകൾക്ക് ഒരു ലക്ഷം രൂപയും ഇരുചക്ര വാഹനങ്ങൾക്ക് 10,000 രൂപയുമാണ് ലഭിക്കുക. ത്രീ-വീലറുകൾക്ക് 25,000 രൂപയും വാണിജ്യ ട്രക്കുകൾക്ക് 50,000 രൂപയും ഈ സ്ക്രാപ്പേജ് നയത്തിലൂടെ സ്വന്തമാക്കാം.</p>
