title: Rain Brings Relief to Delhi-NCR, Clouds Turn Grey in Noida - IMD Issues Warning
description: Delhi-NCR experienced rain on June 29 after extreme heat, bringing relief to residents. The India Meteorological Department (IMD) did not issue any alerts for Delhi, but has put Noida on "yellow alert",  warning of heavy rain and thunderstorms.
content: After sweltering heat in Delhi-NCR, rain has finally hit the national capital and surrounding regions on Monday evening (June 29). The India Meteorological Department (IMD) has not issued any alert; however, it has warned of clear skies and dropping temperatures. The met department has, however, issued a yellow alert for the coming days, warning of thunderstorms and heavy spells of rain. This comes just a day after Delhi recorded its warmest morning in two years. According to the forecast, the wet spell is likely to continue till July 4, with the city on alert on Wednesday and Thursday (June 6 and 7). On Sunday, Delhi's minimum temperature settled at 31.1 degrees Celsius, making it the city's warmest morning in two years. According to the IMD, the minimum temperature was 3.2 degrees Celsius above normal and the highest recorded since June 14, 2024, when it touched 33.3 degrees Celsius.However, unlike Sunday's intense heat, Monday began on a relatively pleasant note with cloudy skies and lower temperatures. The IMD has forecast a maximum temperature of around 40 degrees Celsius and a minimum of 29 degrees Celsius. Humidity is expected to remain between 35 and 55 per cent.The IMD has also forecast continued rainfall activity on July 2 and July 3. The maximum temperature is expected to fall further to 35 degrees Celsius on July 2 and 34 degrees Celsius on July 3, while thunderstorms with rain are likely to continue.With rainfall expected over the coming days, Delhi residents may finally get relief from the prolonged spell of hot and humid weather.Noida Weather, IMD Issues Rain Alert Meanwhile, rain also hit Noida after scorching heat during the afternoon hours. The temperature dropped to 37 degrees Celsius, with the IMD issuing a "yellow alert" for the city. "Thunderstorm accompanied by lightning & gusty winds (30- 40 kmph)," the met department noted. The coming days are also expected to see rain in Noida, with the IMD issuing a "yellow alert" from July 2 to July 5.

title: Xiaomi, Apple, Google Reportedly Join Hands to Advance Qi 50W Wireless Charging Standard
description: Xiaomi reportedly hosts key meeting on the Qi 50W charging standard
content: Xiaomi has hosted a Wireless Power Consortium meeting in Beijing to advance the upcoming Qi 50W wireless charging standard, according to a recent report. Apple, Google, Huawei, Oppo, Vivo, and several other companies participated in discussions, prototype testing, and interoperability verification. The report says the standard is expected to launch in 2028 after further development. Xiaomi is also promoting a small inductance, low voltage, and high power charging architecture that has already entered the Qi 50W standard drafting process.

title: Gold rebounds Rs 1,300 after three-day slide; silver slides Rs 2,000
description:
New Delhi, Jun 29: Snapping the three-day falling streak, gold prices rebounded by Rs 1,300 to Rs 1.46 lakh per 10 grams in the national capital on Monday on value buying by traders.
According to the All India Sarafa Association, gold of 99.9 per cent purity increased by Rs 1,300 to Rs 1,46,600 per 10 grams (inclusive of all taxes) from the previous close of Rs 1,45,300 per 10 grams on Thursday.
Bullion markets were closed on Friday for Muharram.
However, silver fell for the fourth consecutive session, declining by Rs 2,000 to Rs 2,24,000 per kilogram (inclusive of all taxes). In the previous session, the white metal had settled at Rs 2,26,000 per kg.
Analysts attributed the recovery in gold to bargain buying after the recent correction, while silver continued to mirror weakness in the overseas markets.
"Silver prices faced downward pressure in the domestic market on Monday amid ongoing global uncertainties," said Gaurav Garg, Research Analyst at Lemonn Markets Desk.
In the international markets, spot gold fell by USD 54.14, or 1.32 per cent, to USD 4,035.12 per ounce, and silver declined nearly 3 per cent to USD 57.62 per ounce.
"Crude oil prices in the global markets and US dollar index have edged higher on re-escalation of the US-Iran tensions during the weekend," Praveen Singh, Head of Commodities & Currencies at Mirae Asset Sharekhan, said.
Meanwhile, Washington and Tehran later agreed to halt hostilities after renewed military action threatened the fragile 60-day understanding; investors largely remained cautious, keeping pressure on bullion.
Market participants are awaiting the US economic data, particularly the nonfarm payrolls report and ISM Manufacturing PMI for fresh clues on the strength of the American economy and clues for the Federal Reserve's monetary policy path, Saumil Gandhi, Senior Analyst - Commodities at HDFC Securities, said.

title: Goldman Sachs turns bullish on Paytm, sees strong growth ahead - Check details
description: Goldman Sachs has raised Paytm's revenue and EBITDA estimates, citing market share gains in payments and financial services. The brokerage expects sustained growth, margin expansion and potential valuation re-rating if momentum continues.
content: Global brokerage Goldman Sachs has maintained a positive outlook on Paytm, raising its revenue and EBITDA estimates on the back of continued market share gains in payments and strong growth in financial services, ANI reported.The brokerage said Paytm's valuation multiple has room to re-rate if the company sustains revenue growth of over 20 per cent. It said it has increased its revenue estimates for Paytm by 2 per cent and EBITDA estimates by up to 6 per cent.According to Goldman Sachs, Paytm continues to gain market share in payments while witnessing strong traction in its financial services business. The brokerage expects this momentum to continue, supported by the company's ability to onboard online merchants again and further expansion in its postpaid product.It stated, "We view the regulatory environment for Paytm is stable, and in our view, a potential relaunch of wallet could further aid Paytm's earnings growth"Brokerage forecastsThe brokerage forecasts revenue growth of 24 per cent year-on-year for Paytm in FY27, compared with 22 per cent growth in FY26. It also expects EBITDA to more than double over the period, with EBITDA growing at a compound annual growth rate of more than 50 per cent between FY26 and FY30, according to PTI.The brokerage noted that Paytm currently trades at 40 times FY28 price-to-earnings (P/E) ratio, which is around the midpoint of its India internet coverage universe. It believes the stock's valuation could see further re-rating if the company sustains revenue growth with EBITDA margin reaching management guidance of 15-20 per cent in the next two to three years.Paytm's UPI market shareData from NPCI indicates that Paytm's UPI market share by value improved further to 6.7 per cent in April and May 2026, compared with 6.5 per cent in the quarter ending March 2026 and 5.5 per cent a year earlier.Goldman Sachs forecasts EBITDA of Rs 1.7 billion for Paytm in the first quarter of FY27, compared with Rs 1.3 billion in the fourth quarter. The improvement is expected to be driven by a higher contribution from financial services, growth in higher-margin payment products and operating leverage, as per PTI.Paytm's EBITDA margin to rise The brokerage expects Paytm's EBITDA margin to rise to 7.1 per cent in the first quarter of FY27 from 5.8 per cent in the previous quarter. For FY27, it forecasts an EBITDA margin of 10 per cent, representing an expansion of around 400 basis points compared with FY26.Goldman Sachs said it believes Paytm remains on track to achieve its guidance of 15-20 per cent EBITDA margin within the next 2.5 to 3 years, with projected margins of 15 per cent in FY28, 18 per cent in FY29 and 20 per cent in FY30 end, PTI report stated.It also expects net income of Rs 1.8 billion in the first quarter of FY27, up 13 per cent sequentially and 32 per cent higher year-on-year. The share price of One 97 Communications (Paytm) closed at Rs 1133 per share with a gain of 0.72 per cent on Monday. (With Agency Inputs)(Disclaimer: The above article is meant for informational purposes only, and should not be considered as any investment advice. ET NOW DIGITAL suggests its readers/audience to consult their financial advisors before making any money related decisions.)

title: డ్రగ్స్ మాఫియాపై ఉక్కుపాదం.. స్మగ్లర్ల ఆస్తుల జప్తు: అనిత
description: Vangalapudi Anitha: ఆంధ్రప్రదేశ్ రాష్ట్రాన్ని గంజాయి, మాదకద్రవ్యాల రహితంగా తీర్చిదిద్దడమే ధ్యేయంగా కూటమి ప్రభుత్వం పటిష్టమైన చర్యలు తీసుకుంటోంది. ప్రభుత్వ కఠిన నిర్ణయాల వల్ల రాష్ట్రంలో గంజాయి...
content:
Vangalapudi Anitha: ఆంధ్రప్రదేశ్ రాష్ట్రాన్ని గంజాయి, మాదకద్రవ్యాల రహితంగా తీర్చిదిద్దడమే ధ్యేయంగా కూటమి ప్రభుత్వం పటిష్టమైన చర్యలు తీసుకుంటోంది. ప్రభుత్వ కఠిన నిర్ణయాల వల్ల రాష్ట్రంలో గంజాయి సాగు దాదాపుగా తుడిచి పెట్టుకుపోయిందని ఏపీ హోంమంత్రి వంగలపూడి అనిత స్పష్టం చేశారు. మత్తు పదార్థాల నియంత్రణ వల్ల రాష్ట్రంలో నేరాల శాతం ఏకంగా 14 శాతం మేర తగ్గిందని ఆమె గణాంకాలతో సహా వెల్లడించారు.

‘ఈగల్’ టాస్క్‌ఫోర్స్ అద్భుత ఫలితాలు



రాష్ట్రంలో డ్రగ్స్, గంజాయి నెట్‌వర్క్‌ను పూర్తిగా నిర్మూలించేందుకు ఏర్పాటు చేసిన ప్రత్యేక విభాగం ‘ఈగల్’ (EAGLE) టాస్క్‌ఫోర్స్ క్షేత్రస్థాయిలో అద్భుతంగా పనిచేస్తోందని హోంమంత్రి కొనియాడారు. ఈ ప్రత్యేక ఆపరేషన్ల ద్వారా ఇప్పటివరకు సుమారు 1.20 లక్షల కిలోల గంజాయిని పట్టుకుని, నిబంధనల ప్రకారం దహనం చేసినట్లు పేర్కొన్నారు. కేవలం గంజాయిని సీజ్ చేయడమే కాకుండా, అంతరాష్ట్ర స్మగ్లర్ల వెన్నువిరిచేలా దాదాపు రూ. 24 కోట్ల విలువైన వారి ఆస్తులను ప్రభుత్వం అటాచ్ (జప్తు) చేసిందని వివరించారు.



యువత భవిష్యత్తును చిన్నాభిన్నం చేస్తున్న మత్తు మాఫియాపై రాబోయే రోజుల్లో మరింత ఉక్కుపాదం మోపుతామని అనిత హెచ్చరించారు. ముఖ్యంగా ఏజెన్సీ ప్రాంతాల్లో నిఘాను మరింత ముమ్మరం చేయనున్నట్లు తెలిపారు. ప్రజలు డ్రగ్స్ సమాచారాన్ని రహస్యంగా చేరవేసేందుకు వీలుగా ‘ఈగల్’ ప్రత్యేక వెబ్‌సైట్‌తో పాటు ఒక టోల్‌ఫ్రీ నంబర్‌ను కూడా అందుబాటులోకి తెచ్చినట్లు హోంమంత్రి వెల్లడించారు.

title: Khadge: ରାଜ୍ୟସଭା ସାଂସଦ ଭାବେ ଶପଥ ନେଲେ ଖଡ଼ଗେ ଓ ଅନ୍ୟ ୭ ଜଣ: କଂଗ୍ରେସ ମୁଖ୍ୟ ରାଜ୍ୟସଭାରେ ବିରୋଧୀ ଦଳ ନେତା ନିଯୁକ୍ତ
description:
ନୂଆଦିଲ୍ଲୀ: କଂଗ୍ରେସ ଅଧ୍ୟକ୍ଷ ମଲ୍ଲିକାର୍ଜୁନ ଖଡ଼ଗେ କର୍ଣ୍ଣାଟକରୁ ରାଜ୍ୟସଭାକୁ ପୁନଃନିର୍ବାଚିତ ହେବା ପରେ ସାଂସଦ ଭାବେ ଶପଥ ନେଇଛନ୍ତି। ଶପଥ ପାଠ ପରେ ଖଡ଼ଗେଙ୍କୁ ରାଜ୍ୟସଭାରେ ବିରୋଧୀ ଦଳ ନେତା ଭାବରେ ପୁନଃନିଯୁକ୍ତ କରାଯାଇଥିଲା। ଖଡ଼ଗେଙ୍କ ବ୍ୟତୀତ ବିଜେପି ନେତା ତରୁଣ ଚୁଘ ଓ ଅନ୍ୟ ଛଅ ଜଣ ରାଜ୍ୟସଭା ସଦସ୍ୟ ଭାବେ ଶପଥ ନେଇଥିଲେ।
ରାଜ୍ୟସଭା ଅଧ୍ୟକ୍ଷ ସିପି ରାଧାକ୍ରିିଷ୍ଣନ ସଂସଦ ଭବନରେ ତାଙ୍କ ଚାମ୍ବରରେ ଖଡ଼ଗେଙ୍କୁ ସ୍ବତନ୍ତ୍ର ଭାବେ ଶପଥ ପାଠ କରାଇଥିଲେ। ଖଡ଼ଗେ ହିନ୍ଦୀରେ ଶପଥ ନେଇଥିଲେ ଓ ହାତରେ ସମ୍ବିଧାନର ଏକ କପି ଧରିଥିଲେ। ଉପରାଷ୍ଟ୍ରପତି ରାଧାକ୍ରିଷ୍ଣନ ଖଡ଼ଗେଙ୍କୁ ଶୁଭେଚ୍ଛା ଜଣାଇଥିଲେ ଓ ସଂସଦର ଉପର ସଦନ ତାଙ୍କ ଦୀର୍ଘ ସଂସଦୀୟ ଅଭିଜ୍ଞତା ଦ୍ବାରା ଉପକୃତ ହେବ ବୋଲି କହିଥିଲେ। ଏହି ଅବସରରେ କଂଗ୍ରେସ ନେତ୍ରୀ ସୋନିଆ ଗାନ୍ଧୀ, ପ୍ରିୟଙ୍କା ଗାନ୍ଧୀ ଭଦ୍ରା, କେନ୍ଦ୍ରମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ଜେପି ନଡ୍ଡା, କିରେନ୍‌ ରିଜିଜୁ, ଅର୍ଜୁନ ରାମ ମେଘୱାଲ ଓ ରାଜ୍ୟସଭା ଉପାଧ୍ୟକ୍ଷ ହରିବଂଶ ମଧ୍ୟ ଉପସ୍ଥିତ ଥିଲେ। ଖଡ଼ଗେଙ୍କ ପତ୍ନୀ, ଝିଅ ଓ ଅନ୍ୟ ସମ୍ପର୍କୀୟ ମଧ୍ୟ ଉପସ୍ଥିତ ଥିଲେ।
ଆହୁରି ପଢନ୍ତୁ: Bridge Collapse ବାଗଲତା ପଡ଼ାରେ ଭାଙ୍ଗିଲା ପୋଲ, ଗାଁ ଲୋକଙ୍କ କଷ୍ଟ ବଢ଼ିଲା
ଖଡ଼ଗେଙ୍କ ଶପଥଗ୍ରହଣ ପରେ ଉପରାଷ୍ଟ୍ରପତିଙ୍କ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟାଳୟ ପକ୍ଷରୁ ‘ଏକ୍ସ’ରେ ଏସମ୍ପର୍କରେ ସୂଚନା ପ୍ରଦାନ କରାଯାଇଥିଲା। ଖଡ଼ଗେ ମଧ୍ୟ ‘ଏକ୍ସ’ରେ ପୋଷ୍ଟ କରି ରାଜ୍ୟସଭାରେ ବିରୋଧୀ ଦଳ ନେତା ଭାବରେ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟ ଜାରି ରଖିବାର ସୁଯୋଗ ପାଇଁ କୃତଜ୍ଞତା ପ୍ରକାଶ କରିଛନ୍ତି। ଏହାକୁ ଅପାର ଗର୍ବ ଓ ଦାୟିତ୍ୱର ବିଷୟ ବୋଲି କହିଥିଲେ। କଂଗ୍ରେସ ମୁଖ୍ୟ ପରେ କହିଥିଲେ ଯେ, ସେ ସଂସଦରେ ଜନସାଧାରଣଙ୍କ ଚିନ୍ତା, ଆକାଂକ୍ଷା ଓ ସ୍ୱରକୁ ସଚ୍ଚୋଟତା ଓ ଦୃଢ଼ତାର ସହିତ ଉଠାଇବେ ଓ ସରକାରଙ୍କ ଉତ୍ତରଦାୟିତ୍ବ ଦାବି କରିବେ।
ଆହୁରି ପଢନ୍ତୁ: Lord Jagannath:  ତାଳଚେର ଜଗନ୍ନାଥ ମନ୍ଦିରରେ ଶ୍ରୀବିଗ୍ରହଙ୍କ ଦେବସ୍ନାନ ପର୍ବ
ଖଡ଼ଗେଙ୍କ ବ୍ୟତୀତ ବିଜେପି ନେତା ତରୁଣ ଚୁଘ, ଅନ୍ୟ ଛଅ ଜଣ ରାଜ୍ୟସଭା ସଦସ୍ୟ ଭାବେ ଶପଥ ନେଇଥିଲେ। ସୋମବାର ଶପଥ ନେଇଥିବା ଅନ୍ୟ ସଦସ୍ୟମାନେ ହେଲେ ଜିତେନ୍ଦ୍ର ମେଘଜୀଭାଇ କାଞ୍ଜାରିଆ ଓ ମାନସିଂହ ମେରମାନ ପରମାର (ଗୁଜରାଟ), ଏମ୍‌ ନାଗରାଜ (କର୍ଣ୍ଣାଟକ), ରାଜେନ୍ଦ୍ର ହୀରାଲାଲ ଜୈନ (ମହାରାଷ୍ଟ୍ର), ଅଧିକାରୀମାୟୁମ୍ ଶାରଦା ଦେବୀ (ମଣିପୁର) ଓ ଅଲକା ସିଂହ (ରାଜସ୍ଥାନ)। ଆଜି ଶପଥ ନେଇଥିବା ୮ ସଦସ୍ୟଙ୍କ ମଧ୍ୟରୁ ୪ ଜଣ ହିନ୍ଦୀରେ, ଜଣେ କନ୍ନଡ଼, ଜଣେ ପଞ୍ଜାବୀ ଓ ଜଣେ ମଣିପୁରୀରେ ଶପଥ ନେଇଥିଲେ।

title: Current price of oil as of June 29, 2026
description: When oil prices change, it affects your energy costs—and even the price of everyday items. Here’s why.
content:
As of 8:50 a.m. Eastern Time today, oil sold for $74 per barrel (using Brent as the benchmark, which we’ll get into momentarily). That’s 15 cents lower than yesterday morning and approximately a $6.67 rise over the past year.



Oil price per barrel% ChangePrice of oil yesterday$74.15-0.20%Price of oil 1 month ago$95.86-22.80%Price of oil 1 year ago$67.33+9.90%



Will oil prices go up?



It’s impossible to predict the future of oil prices. Several factors determine the movement of oil, but it ultimately boils down to supply and demand. Again, when threats of economic downturn, war, etc. are high, the oil trajectory can turn rapidly.



How oil prices translate to gas pump prices



When you pay for gas at the pump, you’re paying for more than just the crude oil itself; you’re also springing for links along the chain, such as the refineries and wholesalers—not to mention taxes and local gas station markups.



Still, the crude oil aspect affects the final price most dramatically, as it typically accounts for more than half the price per gallon. When oil prices spike, so do gas prices. And frustratingly, when oil prices drop, gas prices tend to take their time drifting down to the lower price (sometimes referred to as “rockets and feathers”).



The role of the U.S. Strategic Petroleum Reserve



In case of emergency, the U.S. has a store of crude oil known as the Strategic Petroleum Reserve. Its primary purpose is energy security in case of disaster (think sanctions, severe storm damage, even war). But it can also go a long way toward softening crippling price hikes during supply shocks.



It’s not a long-term answer—more of an immediate relief to assist the consumer and keep critical parts of the economy running, like key industries, emergency services, public transportation, etc.



How oil and natural gas prices are linked



Oil and natural gas are both major energy fuels. A big change in oil prices can affect natural gas by extension. For example, if oil prices increase, some industries may swap natural gas for some segments of their operations where possible—which increases demand for natural gas.



Historical performance of oil



When examining oil’s performance, there are generally two major benchmarks:




Brent crude oil is the main global oil benchmark.



West Texas Intermediate (WTI) is the main benchmark of North America.




Between the two, Brent better represents global oil performance because it prices much of the world’s traded crude. And, it’s often the best way to track historical oil performance. In fact, even the U.S. Energy Information Administration now uses Brent as its primary reference in its Annual Energy Outlook.



Looking at the Brent benchmark across several decades, oil has been anything but steady. It’s seen spikes due to factors such as wars and supply cuts, and it’s also seen crashes from global recessions and an oversupply (called a “glut”). For example:




The early 1970s brought the first big oil shock when the Middle East cut exports and imposed an embargo on the U.S. and others during the Yom Kippur War.



Prices dropped in the mid-1980s for reasons such as lower demand and more non-OPEC oil producers entering the industry.



Prices spiked again in 2008 with increased global demand, but it soon plummeted alongside the global financial crisis.



During the 2020 COVID lockdown, oil demand collapsed like never before—bringing prices below $20 per barrel.




All to say, oil’s historical performance has been anything but smooth. Again, it’s hugely affected by wars, recessions, OPEC whims, evolving energy initiatives and policies, and much more.



Energy coverage from Fortune



Looking to stay up-to-date regarding the latest energy developments? Check out our recent coverage:




Markets feel relief as the U.S. and Iran agree to a ceasefire on their earlier ‘ceasefire’



Russia is ‘going through a difficult period’ as drone attacks cut off fuel supplies



Iran forcing the U.S. into an escalation trap as a ‘shadow war’ over Strait of Hormuz heats up




Frequently asked questions



How is the current price of oil per barrel actually determined?
The current price of oil per barrel depends largely on supply and demand, including news about potential future supply and demand (geopolitics, decisions made by OPEC+, etc.). In the U.S., prices also move based on how friendly an administration is to drilling, as it can affect future supply. For example, 2025 saw the Trump administration move to reopen more than 1.5 million acres in the Coastal Plain of the Arctic National Wildlife Refuge for oil and gas leasing, reversing the Biden administration’s policy of limiting oil drilling in the Arctic.




How often does the price of oil change during the day?
The price of oil updates constantly when the “futures” markets are open. A futures market is effectively an auction where people agree to buy or sell oil in the future. As long as people and companies are trading contracts, the oil price is changing.




How does U.S. shale oil production affect the current price of oil?
In short, shale is rock that contains oil and natural gas. Think of shale as energy yet to be tapped. The more shale the U.S. accesses, the more energy we’ll have—and the more easily oil prices can keep from spiking as much thanks to a greater supply.




How does the current price of oil impact inflation and the broader economy?
When oil is expensive, it tends to make everyday items cost more. This can be related to energy (your heating, gas utilities, etc.), but it’s also due to the logistics involved with making those items accessible to you. Shipping, for example, can affect the price of things at the grocery store, as it’s more expensive to get those products from warehouses and farms onto the shelf.

This story was originally featured on Fortune.com

title: Srinagar records season’s hottest day at 35.3°C
description:
Srinagar, June 29: Srinagar recorded the hottest day of the season on Monday as the mercury touched 35.3°C, with the Kashmir Valley reeling under an intense heatwave for the third consecutive day.
Officials at Meteorological Centre Srinagar said that hot and dry weather with heatwave-like conditions will continue across Jammu and Kashmir till June 30. Light rain or brief thundershowers with gusty winds may occur at scattered places during late-night and early morning hours. Pre-monsoon showers are also likely over the plains of Jammu.
Fresh spells of light to moderate rain and thundershowers are expected across J&K from July 1 to July 5, likely bringing relief from the heat. Heavy rainfall, intense showers, thunderstorms and gusty winds are likely at a few places, particularly on July 2 and 3.
From July 6 to July 8, weather is expected to remain hot and humid with intermittent rain or thundershowers at scattered places.
The MeT Department has advised caution, warning that heavy rain on July 2 and 3 may trigger flash floods, landslides, and mudslides in vulnerable areas of Jammu Division.
The department urged people to stay away from nallas, streams, and landslide-prone areas, and added, that temporary water-logging may occur in low-lying areas due to intense showers.

title: Ice Nine Kills on their “intense” ‘Dead By Daylight’ collab and why horror will never die
description:
Spencer Charnas tells us about 'Tony Hawk's Pro Skater', 'Scream' and the horror revival
The post Ice Nine Kills on their “intense” ‘Dead By Daylight’ collab and why horror will never die appeared first on NME.
content:
Ice Nine Kills’ Spencer Charnas has spoken to NME about their new single ‘Play Dead’ – which was created in collaboration with online survival horror multiplayer game Dead By Daylight – wanting to reconnect rock music with horror, and what the future of the band holds.

READ MORE: ‘KPop Demon Hunters’ Kevin Woo talks ‘Dead By Daylight’ collab

Dead By Daylight is the “most-played horror game in history” and sees groups of four players taking on the role of a survivor as they try to escape a killer. Over the course of the online game’s 10-year history, Dead By Daylight has featured collaborations with iconic horror franchises Stranger Things, Saw, Alien, Resident Evil and Silent Hill as well as bands such as Iron Maiden and Slipknot.
On Friday (June 26), Ice Nine Kills shared their new Dead By Daylight anthem ‘Play Dead’ alongside a gory video that features skating legend Tony Hawk, Final Destination actor Devon Sawa and Terrifier 3 star Krsy Fox
The Boston band have already released two horror-themed albums and contributed to the soundtracks of Scream 7 (‘Twisting The Knife’), Ready Or Not 2: Here I Come (‘Hell Of High Slaughter 2’) and Terrifier 3 (‘A Work Of Art’). This time around, they worked closely with longtime Dead By Daylight composer Michel F. April to “ensure the atmosphere, tension, and intensity felt authentic to the game.” They also spent time with the game’s creative team as well as diehard fans.

“Getting to collaborate with Dead By Daylight felt like entering a universe that already shared a lot of our creative DNA,” Charnas told NME. “It has built such a strong legacy, and we have a lot of respect for the game’s strange, sinister, and completely immersive atmosphere.”
“For us, the goal was to make the track feel less like something merely influenced by that world and more like something that could naturally exist inside it. That meant paying close attention to the details,” he continued.
Check out the full interview below, where Charnas talks about his love for the influential Tony Hawk’s Pro Skater games, what the band’s recent run of singles means for the future and why horror is so important when the world feels so uncertain.
NME: Hi Spencer, what makes horror, gaming and guitar music such a perfect combo?
Spencer Charnas: “My favourite albums and games are often the ones that show movies aren’t the only medium that can feel ‘cinematic’. At their best, each of those things is not only intense but completely immersive. It can be equally thrilling to get swept away into the stylistic storytelling of a great game, a killer movie, or a captivating song.
“There’s something to be said for how each of them can be relaxing, as well. So naturally, whether it’s the killer songs in the first Scream or the enchanting scores that drive hours of gaming, putting all those things together creates a trifecta of creative and aesthetic experiences that can cross over into different fandoms.”
What are your favourite scary video games?
“‘Rainy Day’ from ‘The Silver Scream 2: Welcome To Horrorwood’ was our homage to Resident Evil, both the film franchise and the game series that inspired it. Silent Hill is rightly always part of any conversation about horror gaming. I naturally gravitate towards games based on classic horror franchises, like the forthcoming Halloween: The Game, where I got to voice a character for the digital deluxe edition. Dead By Daylight, of course, is the reigning champion of the survival horror genre. And I must give a big shout-out to Five Nights At Freddy’s now that our beloved Scream icon and OG Ghostface, Matthew Lillard, is a major part of the movie adaptations.”

Ice Nine Kills, McKenna Grace and Matthew Lillard at the ‘Scream 7’ premiere. CREDIT: Han Kim
Do you play any non-spooky games?
“The old Tony Hawk games were essential to me, not only for the gameplay and graphics but also for the finely curated soundtracks. Those games were immersive pathways to musical discoveries, offering a chance to learn about bands that weren’t typically played on MTV or the radio. The first Tony Hawk’s Pro Skater game alone featured Goldfinger, Dead Kennedys, Suicidal Tendencies and The Vandals Then came Bad Religion, Lagwagon, Millencolin, Swingin’ Utters Less Than Jake, My Chemical Romance and so many more cool and important bands.
“As someone who loved those games, I felt that having Tony Hawk appear with us in the ‘Play Dead’ video was a full-circle moment and yet another dream come true. On set, we bonded over many of the same offbeat pop-culture cornerstones, from punk to the irreverent ’80s comedies like The Naked Gun, which shaped my brain as much as horror did. And he was kind enough to put up with Dingbar.”
Is ‘Play Dead’ a good hint at where the band are heading next?
“I’ll leave it to our fans to trace the trajectory since our last full-length album and keep guessing. Together [recent singles] ‘The Art Of Dying’, ‘The Great Unknown’, ‘The Laugh Track’, ‘Twisting The Knife’ and ‘Play Dead’ paint a picture of the diverse places our creative spirits wander within the musical identity we’ve built and continue to expand as Ice Nine Kills. ‘Twisting The Knife’ gave us our first Number One Active Rock Radio hit in America. Following it up with something as heavy and intense as ‘Play Dead’ is exactly the kind of colouring outside the lines we love to do.”
Ice Nine Kills’ ‘Play Dead’ single artwork.
‘Twisting The Knife’ was part of the Scream 7 soundtrack. What’s it been like to go from making musical love letters to iconic horror franchises on ‘The Silver Screen’ albums to actually being part of those worlds?
“For us, having Ice Nine Kills connected in an official way to Terrifier, Scream, Ready Or Not, and now Dead by Daylight is still hard to fully wrap our heads around. As someone who grew up obsessed with horror, I find it both surreal and incredibly meaningful.
“Scream has always loomed large for us creatively, and its music has been just as essential to that impact as the films themselves, beginning with Marco Beltrami’s incredible score. The original Scream soundtrack, in particular, left a huge mark on me, from Soho’s ‘Whisper To A Scream’ to Nick Cave And The Bad Seeds’ unmistakable ‘Red Right Hand.’ Those songs immediately put me back in that era whenever I hear them.
“To now have our own music become part of that franchise’s musical history is one of the biggest honours we could imagine. It also means a great deal to help reconnect rock music and horror cinema. There was a time when those two worlds felt deeply intertwined, and although that bond has not been as visible in recent years, we’re proud to contribute in some small way to bringing that energy back.”

There have been plenty of ‘elevated’ horrors in recent years such as Obsession and Weapons. That’s got to be exciting for a band who readily pulls from that world?
“Several excellent horror films, big and small, have emerged in recent years. Historically, there are always peaks and valleys, but the genre never truly dies, and there are always invigorating, challenging or just outright fun entries to uncover if you know where to look. At home, I still tend to rewatch the same classics I’ve always loved, and there are plenty of places left to explore. We could make a hundred albums and never run out of killer cinematic inspiration.”
Why do you think horror has such a wide appeal at times when the world feels uncertain?
“Even when it injects cutting social commentary (from multiple points of view) or draws on true crimes for inspiration, horror as an art form offers a unique kind of escapism that lets us set aside real-world terrors in favour of fantasy thrills and chills. Death has terrified, intrigued, and bewildered humankind for as long as we’ve been able to grasp its reality. Horror is a way to engage with those fears and questions in safe, smart, and often wonderfully silly ways.”
Ice Nine Kills’ collab with ‘Dead By Daylight’ is out now. The band have also confirmed details of a UK arena tour for early 2027 which will include their biggest ever headline gig at London’s O2 Arena on March 28. You can get tickets here.
The post Ice Nine Kills on their “intense” ‘Dead By Daylight’ collab and why horror will never die appeared first on NME.

title: വിനീഷ്യസോ ജപ്പാന്റെ വേഗമോ? സാമുറായികൾക്ക് വേഗപ്പൂട്ടിടുമോ ബ്രസീൽ?
How Abdulaziz Osman is building the infrastructure layer behind the digital economy
description: The next decade will not be defined solely by software, artificial intelligence, or digital assets.It will be defined by the infrastructure powering them.Behind every artificial intelligence model, every cloud application, every digital payment, and every blockchain transaction lies a vast ecosystem of energy systems, data centers, computing hardware, networking infrastructure, and operational expertise.As the global economy becomes increasingly digital, the organizations building this infrastructure are becoming some of the most strategically important businesses in the world.Among the companies operating at the intersection of this transformation is BitHash, a UAE-based digital infrastructure company founded by entrepreneur Abdulaziz Osman.Over the past several years, BitHash has evolved from a digital asset infrastructure operator into a broader platform focused on computing infrastructure, renewable energy integration, hosting solutions, and next-generation digital infrastructure ecosystems.Today, the company reports:50 MW deployed or under developmentMore than 10,000 ASIC miners deployedOperations across five global locations20 MW renewable energy capacity30 MW major infrastructure milestones achievedWhile these numbers reflect significant growth, Abdulaziz Osman believes they represent only the beginning of a much larger opportunity."We are entering a new infrastructure cycle," he says."Artificial intelligence, data centers, digital assets, and energy are converging into a single ecosystem. The organizations that build and operate this infrastructure will help define the future global economy."Chapter One: The Entrepreneurial JourneyEvery entrepreneur's story begins long before their company is founded.For Abdulaziz Osman, the journey began with a simple observation:The world's greatest opportunities are often hidden beneath the surface.Like many ambitious professionals, Osman began his career in the corporate world.The environment offered stability, structure, and predictability.Yet as global technological transformation accelerated, he found himself increasingly drawn toward entrepreneurship.What fascinated him was not simply technology itself.It was the infrastructure behind it.Throughout history, every major economic transformation has depended upon infrastructure.Railroads powered industrialization.Electricity transformed manufacturing.Telecommunications connected nations.The internet reshaped commerce.Cloud computing revolutionized enterprise technology.Infrastructure always came first.The products and services that captured public attention were built upon foundations created years earlier.This realization would ultimately become the foundation upon which BitHash was built."The biggest opportunities often exist where few people are looking," Osman explains."Everyone sees the finished product. Few people focus on the infrastructure making it possible."Leaving corporate life was not easy.Entrepreneurship required risk.It required uncertainty.It required resilience.Like most founders, Osman encountered setbacks, unexpected challenges, and moments when progress seemed slow.Yet those experiences reinforced a philosophy that continues guiding him today:Consistency beats intensity.Discipline beats motivation.Execution beats theory."Success rarely comes from one breakthrough moment," he says."It comes from showing up every day, solving problems, and continuing forward when outcomes remain uncertain."Chapter Two: Seeing Beyond BitcoinWhen many people hear the phrase Bitcoin mining, they immediately think of cryptocurrency.They think about price charts.Market cycles.Volatility.Speculation.Abdulaziz Osman sees something entirely different.He sees infrastructure.Behind every Bitcoin transaction exists a sophisticated ecosystem of energy systems, networking architecture, cooling technologies, data centers, logistics, and operational management.The deeper Osman studied the industry, the more convinced he became that the true long-term opportunity was not speculation.It was infrastructure.This distinction fundamentally shaped BitHash's strategy.While others focused on market cycles, BitHash focused on building systems.While others followed short-term trends, BitHash concentrated on long-term infrastructure development."Bitcoin mining is no longer simply a cryptocurrency business," Osman says."It is an infrastructure business."This philosophy enabled BitHash to position itself for opportunities extending far beyond digital assets.Infrastructure remains valuable regardless of market cycles.Computing power remains necessary.Energy remains necessary.Data centers remain necessary.The future belongs to those who build and manage these systems efficiently.Chapter Three: The Rise of the Infrastructure EconomyThroughout history, infrastructure has driven economic growth.Today, another infrastructure revolution is underway.Artificial intelligence.Data centers.Cloud computing.Digital assets.Renewable energy.High-performance computing.These sectors increasingly depend upon one another.Together they form what Osman describes as the Infrastructure Economy.Artificial intelligence requires data centers.Data centers require energy.Energy requires infrastructure.Digital assets require computing power.Computing power requires cooling systems and networking architecture.The industries are no longer operating independently.They are converging.Organizations capable of managing these interconnected systems may become some of the most influential companies of the coming decade.This convergence forms the foundation of BitHash's long-term vision.The company does not see itself solely as a mining operator.It sees itself as a digital infrastructure company.One capable of supporting multiple computing ecosystems as demand continues expanding globally.Chapter Four: Artificial Intelligence and the Computing RevolutionFew technologies have generated as much excitement as artificial intelligence.From large language models and autonomous systems to enterprise automation and predictive analytics, AI is transforming nearly every industry.Yet AI is fundamentally an infrastructure story.Training advanced AI models requires enormous computing resources.Deploying those models requires:Data centersHigh-performance computing hardwareNetworking infrastructureCooling technologiesReliable powerEvery advancement in AI increases demand for infrastructure.Industry forecasts suggest AI-related infrastructure investment could exceed hundreds of billions of dollars globally over the coming decade.This transformation presents significant opportunities for infrastructure operators.The expertise required to manage large-scale computing environments increasingly applies across multiple sectors.Whether supporting AI, blockchain, cloud computing, or enterprise applications, the underlying requirements remain remarkably similar.Energy.Computing power.Cooling.Connectivity.Operational excellence.These capabilities form the foundation of BitHash's long-term strategy."We believe AI will become one of the largest infrastructure opportunities of our generation," Osman says."The demand for computing power is only beginning."Chapter Five: Data Centers Become Strategic AssetsIn many ways, data centers have become the factories of the digital age.Every online transaction.Every cloud application.Every AI query.Every enterprise platform.Every digital asset transaction.Depends upon data center infrastructure.Without data centers, the modern digital economy simply cannot function.As digital transformation accelerates globally, institutional investors increasingly view data centers as strategic assets.The sector continues attracting significant investment from:Private equity firmsInfrastructure fundsTechnology companiesSovereign wealth fundsFamily officesThe rationale is straightforward.Computing demand continues growing.Computing demand requires infrastructure.BitHash believes this trend represents one of the defining investment themes of the next decade.The company continues evaluating opportunities within digital infrastructure ecosystems capable of supporting future demand across multiple industries.Chapter Six: Renewable Energy StrategyEnergy is becoming one of the most important competitive advantages in the digital economy.Without energy, computing cannot operate.Without affordable energy, computing cannot scale.Without sustainable energy, long-term growth becomes increasingly difficult.Recognizing this reality, BitHash has incorporated renewable energy into its infrastructure roadmap.The company currently reports 20 MW of renewable energy capacity.For Osman, renewable energy is not simply an environmental initiative.It is an infrastructure strategy.Organizations capable of integrating energy production with computing infrastructure may enjoy significant long-term advantages."Energy will be one of the defining strategic assets of the next decade," Osman says."The companies that successfully integrate infrastructure and energy strategy will be positioned to grow."Chapter Seven: Building at ScaleInfrastructure development requires execution.Vision alone is not enough.Success requires planning.Capital allocation.Operational excellence.Risk management.Over the years, BitHash has focused on building infrastructure capable of supporting long-term growth.Today, the company reports:Key Milestones50 MW deployed or under developmentMore than 10,000 ASIC miners deployedOperations spanning five global locations20 MW renewable energy capacity30 MW major infrastructure milestones achievedThese achievements represent years of deployment, operational management, and infrastructure development.For Osman, however, they are milestones rather than destinations."We are still early in our journey," he says."The infrastructure opportunity ahead is significantly larger than what has already been achieved."Chapter Eight: Global ExpansionThe future of infrastructure is global.Technology moves globally.Capital moves globally.Energy markets operate globally.Computing demand is global.As a result, BitHash has pursued an international growth strategy.Today, the company operates across five global locations.The UAE remains central to this strategy.Its strategic location, business-friendly environment, and commitment to innovation make it an ideal foundation for international expansion.From this base, BitHash continues evaluating opportunities across emerging and established markets.The objective is not simply geographic expansion.It is strategic positioning.Building infrastructure where long-term demand is expected to grow.Chapter Nine: Leadership and CultureEvery organization reflects its leadership.At BitHash, culture is shaped by several core principles:Resilience.Accountability.Execution.Long-term thinking.Entrepreneurship requires navigating uncertainty.Markets evolve.Technology changes.Challenges emerge.Organizations capable of adapting while maintaining focus often achieve sustainable success.According to Osman, culture ultimately determines execution.And execution determines outcomes."Great businesses are not built overnight," he says."They are built through thousands of small decisions made consistently over time."Chapter Ten: Looking Toward the FutureThe world is entering a new infrastructure era.Artificial intelligence continues expanding.Data center demand continues growing.Renewable energy adoption continues accelerating.Digital assets continue maturing.Each trend reinforces the importance of infrastructure.For BitHash, the future lies at the intersection of these industries.The company continues investing in infrastructure development, energy integration, computing ecosystems, and international expansion.Its objective is not merely to participate in technological transformation.Its objective is to help build the systems enabling it."The next generation of digital infrastructure will be built where energy, computing power, and capital intersect," Osman says."The organizations that understand this convergence today will help define the global economy tomorrow."About Abdulaziz OsmanAbdulaziz Osman is the Founder and Chief Executive Officer of BitHash. He is recognized for his work in digital infrastructure, Bitcoin mining, renewable energy integration, data center development, and next-generation computing ecosystems.About BitHashBitHash is a UAE-based digital infrastructure company focused on Bitcoin mining, hosting solutions, renewable energy integration, data center development, and digital infrastructure services.Company Milestones50 MW deployed or under development10,000+ ASIC miners deployed5 global operating locations20 MW renewable energy capacity30 MW infrastructure milestones achievedLinkedin :-   www.linkedin.com/in/abdulaziz-osman-crypto-mining-expertWebsite :-  www.bithash.aeEmail:-  Info@bithash.aeThis is sponsored content and has not been written by Forbes India journalists. Forbes India has not independently verified the information contained herein and makes no representation regarding its accuracy, completeness, or reliability. Readers should make their independent inquiries and take informed decisions.The pages slugged ‘Brand Connect’ are equivalent to advertisements and are not written and produced by Forbes India journalists.

title: ବ୍ୟାଙ୍କ ଆକାଉଣ୍ଟକୁ ସିଧା ଯିବ ୫୦,୦୦୦ ପର୍ଯ୍ୟନ୍ତ ସବସିଡି ଟଙ୍କା! ଘୋଷଣା ହେଲା ସରକାରଙ୍କ ନୂଆ ଇଭି ଗାଇଡଲାଇନ୍‌
description:
ଦିଲ୍ଲୀ ସରକାର ପ୍ରଦୂଷଣ କମାଇବା ଏବଂ ଇଲେକ୍ଟ୍ରିକ୍ ଯାନ (EV) କୁ ପ୍ରୋତ୍ସାହିତ କରିବା ପାଇଁ ନୂଆ ଇଭି ପଲିସି ୨୦୨୬-୩୦ (EV Policy 2026-30) ର ଚିଠା (ଡ୍ରାଫ୍ଟ) ଜାରି କରିଛନ୍ତି। ଏହି ପଲିସି ଅଧୀନରେ ଇଲେକ୍ଟ୍ରିକ୍ ଦୁଇଚକିଆ ଯାନ କିଣୁଥିବା ଗ୍ରାହକଙ୍କୁ ପ୍ରଥମ ବର୍ଷ ୩୦,୦୦୦ ଟଙ୍କା ଏବଂ ତିନିଚକିଆ ଯାନ କିଣୁଥିବା ଗ୍ରାହକଙ୍କୁ ୫୦,୦୦୦ ଟଙ୍କାର ସବସିଡି ମିଳିବ। ଏହାସହ BS-IV ଚାରିଚକିଆ ଯାନର ମାଲିକମାନଙ୍କୁ ଗାଡ଼ି ସ୍କ୍ରାପ୍ (ଭାଙ୍ଗିବା) କରିବା ବାବଦରେ […]
The post ବ୍ୟାଙ୍କ ଆକାଉଣ୍ଟକୁ ସିଧା ଯିବ ୫୦,୦୦୦ ପର୍ଯ୍ୟନ୍ତ ସବସିଡି ଟଙ୍କା! ଘୋଷଣା ହେଲା ସରକାରଙ୍କ ନୂଆ ଇଭି ଗାଇଡଲାଇନ୍‌ appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.
content:
ଦିଲ୍ଲୀ ସରକାର ପ୍ରଦୂଷଣ କମାଇବା ଏବଂ ଇଲେକ୍ଟ୍ରିକ୍ ଯାନ (EV) କୁ ପ୍ରୋତ୍ସାହିତ କରିବା ପାଇଁ ନୂଆ ଇଭି ପଲିସି ୨୦୨୬-୩୦ (EV Policy 2026-30) ର ଚିଠା (ଡ୍ରାଫ୍ଟ) ଜାରି କରିଛନ୍ତି। ଏହି ପଲିସି ଅଧୀନରେ ଇଲେକ୍ଟ୍ରିକ୍ ଦୁଇଚକିଆ ଯାନ କିଣୁଥିବା ଗ୍ରାହକଙ୍କୁ ପ୍ରଥମ ବର୍ଷ ୩୦,୦୦୦ ଟଙ୍କା ଏବଂ ତିନିଚକିଆ ଯାନ କିଣୁଥିବା ଗ୍ରାହକଙ୍କୁ ୫୦,୦୦୦ ଟଙ୍କାର ସବସିଡି ମିଳିବ। ଏହାସହ BS-IV ଚାରିଚକିଆ ଯାନର ମାଲିକମାନଙ୍କୁ ଗାଡ଼ି ସ୍କ୍ରାପ୍ (ଭାଙ୍ଗିବା) କରିବା ବାବଦରେ ୧ ଲକ୍ଷ ଟଙ୍କାର ସ୍କ୍ରାପିଂ ଇନସେଣ୍ଟିଭ୍ (ପ୍ରୋତ୍ସାହନ ରାଶି) ଦିଆଯିବ।
ଏହି ନୀତି ଅନୁଯାୟୀ, ଜାନୁଆରୀ ୨୦୨୭ରୁ କେବଳ ଇଲେକ୍ଟ୍ରିକ୍ ଅଟୋ ହିଁ ପଞ୍ଜୀକୃତ (ରେଜିଷ୍ଟ୍ରେସନ) ହେବ ଏବଂ ଏପ୍ରିଲ୍ ୨୦୨୮ରୁ କେବଳ ନୂଆ ଇଲେକ୍ଟ୍ରିକ୍ ଦୁଇଚକିଆ ଯାନର ରେଜିଷ୍ଟ୍ରେସନ କରାଯିବ। ଦିଲ୍ଲୀର ବାୟୁ ଗୁଣବତ୍ତା (ଏୟାର କ୍ୱାଲିଟି) ସୁଧାରିବା ଏବଂ ଯାନବାହନ ପ୍ରଦୂଷଣ (ଯାହା ରାଜଧାନୀରେ ପ୍ରାୟ ୨୩% ପ୍ରଦୂଷଣର କାରଣ) କମାଇବା ଦିଗରେ ଏହି ପଲିସି ଏକ ବଡ଼ ପଦକ୍ଷେପ ଅଟେ।
ସରକାରଙ୍କ ଲକ୍ଷ୍ୟ ହେଉଛି ନୂଆ ଗାଡ଼ିଗୁଡ଼ିକ ମଧ୍ୟରେ ଇଭିର ଅଂଶଧନ ବୃଦ୍ଧି କରିବା ଏବଂ ପୁରୁଣା ପ୍ରଦୂଷଣକାରୀ ଗାଡ଼ିଗୁଡ଼ିକୁ ପର୍ଯ୍ୟାୟକ୍ରମେ ହଟାଇବା। ଏହି ସବସିଡି ଡାଇରେକ୍ଟ ବେନିଫିଟ୍ ଟ୍ରାନ୍ସଫର (DBT) ମାଧ୍ୟମରେ ସିଧାସଳଖ ଗ୍ରାହକଙ୍କ ଆକାଉଣ୍ଟକୁ ଦିଆଯିବ। ଗ୍ରାହକ ଜଣକ ଦିଲ୍ଲୀର ବାସିନ୍ଦା ହୋଇଥିବା ଆବଶ୍ୟକ ଏବଂ ଗାଡ଼ିଟି ଦିଲ୍ଲୀରେ ହିଁ ରେଜିଷ୍ଟର ହୋଇଥିବା ଦରକାର। ଇଭି କିଣିବା ଦ୍ୱାରା ରୋଡ୍ ଟ୍ୟାକ୍ସ ଏବଂ ରେଜିଷ୍ଟ୍ରେସନ ଫିସ୍ ଉପରେ ୧୦% ରିହାତି ମଧ୍ୟ ମିଳିବ (୩୦ ଲକ୍ଷ ଟଙ୍କା ପର୍ଯ୍ୟନ୍ତର ଇଭି ଉପରେ, ମାର୍ଚ୍ଚ ୨୦୩୦ ପର୍ଯ୍ୟନ୍ତ)।
ଦୁଇଚକିଆ ଯାନ ପାଇଁ ସବସିଡି ବ୍ୟାଟେରୀ କ୍ଷମତା (kWh) ଆଧାରରେ ସ୍ଥିର କରାଯାଇଛି:


ପ୍ରଥମ ବର୍ଷ: ପ୍ରତି kWh ପିଛା ୧୦,୦୦୦ ଟଙ୍କା, ସର୍ବାଧିକ ୩୦,୦୦୦ ଟଙ୍କା ପର୍ଯ୍ୟନ୍ତ।


ଦ୍ୱିତୀୟ ବର୍ଷ: ଏହା ୨୦,୦୦୦ ଟଙ୍କା ମଧ୍ୟରେ ସୀମିତ ରହିବ।


ତୃତୀୟ ବର୍ଷ: ଏହା ୧୦,୦୦୦ ଟଙ୍କା ପର୍ଯ୍ୟନ୍ତ ସୀମିତ ରହିବ।


ତିନିଚକିଆ ଯାନ (L5M) ପାଇଁ: ପ୍ରଥମ ବର୍ଷ ୫୦,୦୦୦ ଟଙ୍କା, ଦ୍ୱିତୀୟ ବର୍ଷ ୪୦,୦୦୦ ଟଙ୍କା ଏବଂ ତୃତୀୟ ବର୍ଷ ୩୦,୦୦୦ ଟଙ୍କାର ସବସିଡି ମିଳିବ। ଏହାସହ ଇଲେକ୍ଟ୍ରିକ୍ ମାଲବାହୀ ଗାଡ଼ି (Goods Vehicles) ପାଇଁ ମଧ୍ୟ ଜବରଦସ୍ତ ପ୍ରୋତ୍ସାହନ ମିଳିବ।

The post ବ୍ୟାଙ୍କ ଆକାଉଣ୍ଟକୁ ସିଧା ଯିବ ୫୦,୦୦୦ ପର୍ଯ୍ୟନ୍ତ ସବସିଡି ଟଙ୍କା! ଘୋଷଣା ହେଲା ସରକାରଙ୍କ ନୂଆ ଇଭି ଗାଇଡଲାଇନ୍‌ appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.

title: কলিৰ যুগ, ৰামৰ নো কি দোষ...
description:
মৃদুল কুমাৰ সন্দিকৈ
ৰাম ৰাম! কিবা এটা নঘটিব লগা ঘটি গ’লে, মানুহৰ মুখত স্বাভাৱিকতে ওলায় ৰামৰ নাম। যেনে- ৰাম ৰাম! এয়া কি শুনিছো। ঠিক একেই অৱস্থা হৈছে ৰামৰ ওপৰত অগাধ বিশ্বাস ৰখা কোটি কোটি ভক্তৰ। কোনোদিনেই তেওঁলোকে কল্পনা কৰা নাছিল প্ৰভূ ৰামৰ নামতো ৰাম ভক্ত বুলি পৰিচিত এচামে এনে নীচ কাণ্ড কৰিব। 
অভিযোগ নতুন নাছিল। ৰামৰ নামত কেলেংকাৰী হৈছিল বুলি পূৰ্বৰ পৰাই অভিযোগ উত্থাপন হৈছিল। ৰাম মন্দিৰ নিৰ্মাণৰ নামত দান-বৰঙণি সংগ্ৰহৰ ক্ষেত্ৰত হোৱা প্ৰায় ১৪০০ কোটি টকীয়া সেই কেলেংকাৰীৰ সময়ত তল পৰি ৰৈছিল।
অযোধ্যাত ৰাম মন্দিৰ নিৰ্মাণ কৰাক লৈ যিখন যুঁজ হৈছিল, সেই যুঁজত ৰামৰেই জয় হৈছিল। কৰ সেৱকসকলে বাবৰি মছজিদ ভাঙি ৰামৰ জন্মস্থানত ৰাম মন্দিৰেই হ’ব লাগিব বুলি বহু ত্যাগ কৰিছিল। সেইবোৰ এতিয়া ইতিহাসৰ ক’লা কাহিনী। 
বহু যুঁজ-বাগৰৰ পাছত ২০১৯ত বিবাদমান ভূমিত ৰাম মন্দিৰেই নিৰ্মাণ হব বুলি উচ্চতম ন্যায়ালয়ে দিয়া ঐতিহাসিক ৰায়দানৰ পাছত ৰাম মন্দিৰ নিৰ্মাণ কৰা সপোন বাস্তৱৰ দিশে আগবাঢ়িছিল। পূৰ্ণ পৰ্যায়ত এই মন্দিৰ নিৰ্মাণৰ বাবে প্ৰায় ২০ লাখ স্বেচ্ছাসেৱক, ভক্তই দান-বৰঙণি সংগ্ৰহ কৰিছিল।
মুক্তহস্তে ৰামৰ ওপৰত বিশ্বাস ৰখা সনাতনীসকলে দান আগবঢ়াইছিল। আনকি মন্দিৰ নিৰ্মাণৰ সিদ্ধান্তৰে সকলো প্ৰস্তুতি সম্পূৰ্ণ হোৱাৰ পাছত তেতিয়াৰ ৰাষ্ট্ৰপতি ৰামনাথ কোবিন্দে আনুষ্ঠানিকভাৱে ৫ লাখ টকা দান আগবঢ়াই প্ৰথমজন দাতা হৈছিল।
কোনো কোনোৱে কেৱল ধনেই নহয়, সোণ-ৰূপ, নিৰ্মাণৰ বাবে প্ৰয়োজনীয় আন সামগ্ৰী, নিজৰ মাটি বিক্ৰী কৰি কোটি টকা ৰাম মন্দিৰ নিৰ্মাণৰ হেতু আগবঢ়াইছিল। ২০২৪চনৰ ২২ জানুৱাৰীত আনুষ্ঠানিকভাৱে অযোধ্যাত ৰাম মন্দিৰ উদ্বোধন কৰা হৈছিল।
সেই প্ৰথম দিনটোতেই ৫ লাখৰো অধিক ভক্তই ৰাম মন্দিৰ দৰ্শন কৰিছিল। তাৰপাছত গড়ে ১.৫ লাখকৈ ভক্তই ৰাম মন্দিৰ দৰ্শন কৰি আহিছে প্ৰতিদিনে। তেওঁলোকে মন্দিৰ দৰ্শন কৰিবলৈ যাওতে খালী হাতে নাযায়। বিশ্বাস, পৰম্পৰা আৰু শ্ৰদ্ধাৰে ৰামৰ চৰণত দি আহে কিবা এটা। 
সেই ৰাম মন্দিৰতে ওলাল কেলেংকাৰী। অযোধ্যাৰ ৰাম মন্দিৰৰ প্ৰণামী ধন হৰলুকি হোৱাৰ খবৰ প্ৰথম পোহৰলৈ আহোতে ইয়াক এটা সাধাৰণ অভিযোগৰ শাৰীতে থোৱা হৈছিল। কিন্তু পৰৱৰ্তী সময়ত সেই অভিযোগৰ ভিত্তিত পোহৰলৈ অহা তথ্য-প্ৰমাণে উত্তৰ-প্ৰদেশৰ মুখ্যমন্ত্ৰীক বাধ্য কৰালে সমগ্ৰ অভিযোগ সন্দৰ্ভত বিশেষ তদন্তকাৰী গোট গঠন কৰিবলৈ।
শ্ৰীৰাম মন্দিৰ তীৰ্থক্ষেত্ৰ ন্যাসৰ সদস্য কৃষ্ণমোহনে ৰাম জনমভূমি থানাত ২৪ জুন, ২০২৬ত এটা গোচৰ ৰুজু কৰিলে। তাৰপূৰ্বে তদন্তকাৰী গোটে এই অভিযোগ সঁচা বুলি দাখিল কৰা প্ৰতিবেদনৰ পাছতে সেই তৎপৰতা গ্ৰহণ কৰা হৈছিল। উক্ত গোচৰৰ ভিত্তিতেই আৰক্ষীয়ে পৰৱৰ্তী সময়ত গ্ৰেপ্তাৰ কৰিলে ৮জনকৈ লোকক।
তেওঁলোক ক্ৰমে- অভিনাশ শুক্লা, অনুকল্প মিশ্ৰ, লবকুশ মিশ্ৰ, মনীষ কুমাৰ যাদৱ, কৰুণেশ পাণ্ডে, ৰামশংকৰ মিশ্ৰ, শোভাষ শ্ৰীবাস্তৱ, ৰামশংকৰ যাদৱ ওৰফে টিনু যাদৱ। লক্ষণীয় কথাটো হ’ল- শ্ৰীৰাম জনমভূমি তীৰ্থক্ষেত্ৰ ন্যাসৰ সচিব চম্পট ৰয়ৰ ঘনিষ্ঠ বুলি পৰিচিত তেওঁৰ গাড়ী চালক টিনু যাদৱক আৰক্ষীয়ে গ্ৰেপ্তাৰ কৰাৰ পাছত এই কেলেংকাৰীয়ে নতুন মূৰ লৈছিল।
বাধ্যত পৰি সচিব চম্পট ৰয়ে ন্যাসৰ উক্ত পদৰ পৰা পদত্যাগ কৰিব লগা হয় । একেদৰে এই ন্যাসৰ অন্যতম প্ৰভাৱশালী সদস্য ডাঃ অনিল মিশ্ৰয়ো তেনেবোৰ কাৰণতে নৈতিক দায়িত্ব স্বীকাৰ কৰি ন্যাসৰ পৰা অব্যাহতি লয়। ৰাম মন্দিৰ প্ৰণামীৰ ধন জমা ৰখোৱা বেংকৰ বিষয়া-কৰ্মচাৰীৰ সৈতে মিলি সেইবোৰ তেওঁলোকে আত্মসাৎ কৰিছিল।
৭ জুন, ২০২৬ত ৰাম মন্দিৰ প্ৰণামী চুৰি ঘটনাৰ কথা অস্বীকাৰ কৰিছিল উত্তৰপ্ৰদেশ চৰকাৰে। তীৰ্থক্ষেত্ৰ ন্যাসেও সেই অভিযোগ ভিত্তিহীন আখ্যা দিছিল। উত্তৰপ্ৰদেশ চৰকাৰে গঠন কৰা তিনিজনীয়া তদন্তকাৰী গোটে ১৫ দিন চিচিটিভি ফুটেজ, অন্যান্য নথিপত্ৰ পৰীক্ষা কৰি অভিযোগ উত্থাপিত হোৱাৰ দৰে মন্দিৰৰ ধন হৰলুকি হোৱাৰ তথ্য পোহৰলৈ আনিছিল।
আনকি সেই কেলেংকাৰীৰ ধনৰ পৰিমাণ ২০০ কোটিৰো অধিক হ’ব বুলি চৰ্চা চলিছে। কোটি কোটি জনতাৰ বাবে অতি স্পৰ্শকাতৰ বিষয় এয়া। খোদ ৰাম মন্দিৰতেই যদি এনেবোৰ কেলেংকাৰী হয়, তেনেহ’লে সাধাৰণ লোকে কেনেকৈ বিশ্বাস কৰিব য’তেই ধন ত’তেই কেলেংকাৰী নহয় বুলি?
ৰামৰ নামত দিয়া প্ৰণামী ধন চুৰি কৰি লুকুৱাবলৈ এই সকলে শৌচালয়কো ব্যৱহাৰ কৰিছিল। ৰাম মন্দিৰত শ্ৰীৰাম জন্মভূমি তীৰ্থক্ষেত্ৰ ট্ৰাষ্টে কেইবাটা পৰ্যায়ৰ চিচিটিভি মনিটৰিং, বেংক বিষয়াৰ নিৰীক্ষণৰ ব্যৱস্থা কৰি থৈছিল। তাৰপাছতো সংঘটিত হৈ গ’ল এই কেলেংকাৰী।
এই দানসমূহ সংগ্ৰহ কৰিবৰ বাবে ৰাম মন্দিৰ চৌহদত আছে ৬৫টা দানপাত্ৰ। মন্দিৰৰ চৌহদৰ বিভিন্ন স্থানত সেইবোৰ ৰখা হৈছিল। সেই বাকচবোৰ দুটা চাবিৰ দ্বাৰা চিচিটিভি কেমেৰাত সকলো দৃশ্য বন্দী কৰিহে খোলাৰ ব্যৱস্থা আছিল। যেতিয়া এই বাকচবোৰ পূৰ্ণ হয়, তেতিয়া ন্যাসৰ বিষয়ববীয়াই বেংকৰ প্ৰতিনিধিৰ উপস্থিতিত তাৰ দুৱাৰ খুলিছিল।
টকা আৰু মূল্যবান সামগ্ৰীসমূহ পৃথকে পৃথকে ভাগ কৰি সেইবোৰ গণনা ৰূমলৈ প্ৰেৰণ কৰা হৈছিল। প্ৰণামী ধন গণনা কৰিবলৈ দুটা ছিফ্টত কৰ্মচাৰী আছিল। প্ৰতিদিনাই ৪০জন বিত্তিধাৰী লোকে বেংক বিষয়াৰ সহযোগত গণনাকাৰীৰ উপস্থিতিত সেইবোৰৰ হিচাপ ৰাখিছিল। 
প্ৰথমে নোটসমূহ ১০, ২০, ৫০, ১০০, ৫০০ আদি বাণ্ডিলত ভাগ কৰি লৈ সেইবোৰ মেচিনৰ জৰিয়তে গণনা কৰা হৈছিল। নকল বা ফটা নোট থাকিলে সেইবোৰ উলিয়াই দিয়া হৈছিল। এনে কাউন্টিং ডেস্কসমূহত চাৰিওফালৰ পৰাই কেমেৰা সংলগ্ন কৰা আছিল।
সোণ-ৰূপ আদি জোখ-মাখ কৰাৰ বাবে আছিল পৃথক ডেস্ক। সেইবোৰতো সঠিকভাৱে ওজন কৰি তাৰ ৰেকৰ্ড লিপিবদ্ধ কৰা হৈছিল। তাৰপাছত এইবোৰ মাটিৰ তলত থকা বিশেষ কোঠাত ৰখোৱাৰ ব্যৱস্থা কৰা হৈছিল। নগদ ধনবোৰ ২-৩বাৰ হিচাপ কৰাৰ অন্তত বেংকলৈ প্ৰেৰণ কৰা হৈছিল।
প্ৰতিদিনাই ইয়াৰ দৈনিক ৰিপৰ্ট প্ৰস্তুত কৰা হৈছিল। ইয়াৰ পাছতো ভগৱান ৰামৰ ঘৰতেই ৰামৰ নামত দিয়া ধন আত্মসাৎ কৰিবলৈ ন্যাসৰ কোনো উচ্চপদস্থ বিষয়া , বেংকৰ বিষয়া-কৰ্মচাৰীৰ সহযোগৰ অবিহনে সম্ভৱ নহয়। আৰক্ষীয়ে এই কাণ্ডক এতিয়া গভীৰভাৱে ল’বলৈ বাধ্য হৈছে। কিয়নো এয়া অতি স্পৰ্শকাতৰ বিষয়। 
ন্যাসৰ সদ্যপদত্যাগী সচিব চম্পট ৰয়ক ২৯ জুন, ২০২৬, সোমবাৰে তদন্তকাৰী বিষয়াই কেইবাঘন্টা ধৰি জেৰা চলায়। আটক কৰা ৮ অভিযুক্তক আদালতত হাজিৰ কৰি ইতিমধ্যে কাৰাগাৰলৈ প্ৰেৰণ কৰা হৈছে। তেওঁলোকৰ বেংক একাউন্ট, বেংকত থকা ল’কাৰ আৰু আত্মীয়ৰ বেংক একাউন্টত থকা ধনৰ অনুসন্ধান চলিছে।
অবিশ্বাস্য যেন লাগিলেও এতিয়া এয়াই সত্য। ৰামৰ নামতো ৰামৰ ভক্তৰ দ্বাৰাই সংগঠিত হ’ল কোটি কোটি টকাৰ কেলেংকাৰী। যি ৰামক লৈ বিশ্বাস, আস্থা আৰু ভক্তিৰ মাজত সাধাৰণ লোক বুৰ গৈ থাকে, সেই ৰামৰ নামতে তেনে মুখাধাৰী ৰামভক্তই চলালে লুটপাত। কিয়নো এয়া কলি যুগ, ঘোৰ কলি যুগ...।

title: Industry experts chart the future of India’s bond and fixed income markets
description: India’s fixed income market enters a new era of growth as investors increasingly look for balanced and resilient investment strategies. The market is witnessing increased retail participation, regulatory reforms, and growing relevance in portfolio allocation.As fixed income continues to gain momentum in India’s financial ecosystem, IndiaBonds presents CNBC-TV18 India Fixed Income Summit powered by Mirae Asset Mutual Fund, a platform uniting key voices shaping the future of India’s fixed income markets.The grand event brought together regulators, exchanges, market intermediaries, policymakers, institutional investors and industry leaders to explore emerging trends, investor behaviour and opportunities driving India’s bond markets, while offering expert insights on building a stronger, transparent, inclusive and investor-friendly fixed income ecosystem.From regulatory reforms, technology-led transformation and market accessibility to evolving investment strategies, infrastructure financing and wealth diversification, this summit dives deep into the trends defining the next phase of growth in India’s fixed income ecosystem.Among the event sponsors were IndiaBonds, Mirae Asset Mutual Fund, AK Capital Services, Nippon India Mutual Fund, NaBFID, and NSE, highlighting strong industry support for discussions around the present landscape and future direction of India’s fixed income market.The event commenced with a welcome address by Latha Venkatesh (Consulting Editor, CNBC-TV18), who welcomed the attendees and set the stage for meaningful conversations on India’s fixed income market, bond market development and the future of debt capital markets.The Size and Scale of India’s Debt MarketThe Indian debt market is a critical component of the nation’s financial ecosystem. Its considerable market size not only highlights the maturity and depth of India’s debt instruments but also emphasises the potential for future growth.As of March 31st, 2026, the total size of the Indian debt market stands at approximately US$2.76 trillion, while the world’s bond market stands at a staggering US$145 trillion. It is noteworthy that although India’s bond market is large, there is an immense opportunity for further expansion.According to Aditi Mittal (Co-Founder, IndiaBonds), “India's bond market is undergoing rapid democratisation, driven by growing retail participation and greater accessibility. While significant progress has been made, the real opportunity lies ahead as corporate bonds become accessible to every investor and every demat account.”Bond Markets Powering India’s Growth StoryFor decades, bonds and fixed income largely remained in background conversations. But now, they are emerging as a key focus area in India’s financial ecosystem, driven by technology and infrastructure development.Vishal Goenka (Co-Founder, IndiaBonds) emphasised the need to deepen India’s fixed income ecosystem, expand bond market participation and bring key industry conversations to one stage. In his opening address, he mentions, “a strong and trusted bond market is essential for India's next phase of growth, providing long-term capital for infrastructure, diversified funding for businesses, and broader investment opportunities for households.”Maninder Cheema (Executive Director, SEBI) also shared her perspective on the evolution of India’s bond market. According to her, “The road to building a deeper, more liquid, transparent and globally credible bond market in India begins with establishing trust, Request for Quote (RFQ) platforms, market-making frameworks, online bond platforms, retail participation, and credit derivatives.”Technology Creating Access and TransparencyTechnology has significantly improved retail access to the bond market. It enables real-time portfolio tracking, seamless transactions, and regular price discovery, bringing the bond investing experience closer to that of equities. As a result, bond investing is becoming more transparent, convenient, and accessible to a wider base of retail investors.Besides, the integration of retail online bond platforms is opening up new opportunities for retail investors to access corporate bonds and debt investments. These platforms allow retail investors to seamlessly explore, invest, and trade bonds.Role of Credit Cycle in Shaping Fixed Income StrategiesThe panel explored the current stage of the credit cycle and its implications for India's fixed income markets. The discussion highlighted how evolving funding conditions, sector-specific risks, and changing capital costs are influencing credit spreads, bond pricing, and investment opportunities across the fixed income landscape.Suyash Choudhary (CIO - Fixed Income, Bandhan Mutual Fund) says, “The current credit cycle is becoming increasingly sector-specific, with funding pressures and external shocks affecting industries differently. In such an environment, credit selection and risk assessment become critical for fixed income investors.”Amit Tripathi (CIO - Fixed Income, Nippon India Mutual Fund) adds, “Liquidity in the secondary market for corporate bonds has been a long-standing challenge, but with a well-functioning corporate bond repo ecosystem, there is great potential to improve this. It could make it easier for everyone to hold, finance, buy, and sell these bonds smoothly.”Why Fixed Income Matters Fixed income instruments are gradually evolving beyond traditional FDs, with a wider range of debt mutual fund categories now offering different duration, liquidity and yield options for investors. Despite attractive yields and better liquidity compared to traditional FDs, fixed income allocation remains low among retail investors.According to Basant Bafna (Head of Fixed Income, Mirae Asset Mutual Fund), “Investors can align fixed income investments with financial goals for long-term financial planning. But one of the biggest gaps in the Indian investment landscape is awareness around fixed income products and how they can fit into long-term financial planning.”Indian Bond Market and Way ForwardA K Mittal (MD & CEO, AK Capital Services) shared his views on the history of the Indian bond market and way forward. He quotes, “India’s bond market is much smaller than the US and China. For the market to grow, financial products must reach smaller towns and regions. Moreover, investor education is crucial for expanding bond market reach.”In another panel discussion, Rajkiran Rai G (MD, NaBFID) discussed on how bond markets can support India’s infrastructure financing needs, with a focus on scaling municipal bond issuances, creating sustainable funding channels for urban development, preparing urban local bodies for bond markets, and building wider participation in India’s fixed income market.The event concluded with a closing keynote by Ashish Kumar Chauhan (MD & CEO, NSE) focusing on the future of fixed income investing, capital market development, digital infrastructure, market access and the role of participation in deepening India’s bond market.Check out the https://ms.cnbctv18.com/india-fixed-income-summit/ for more insightful conversations, expert perspectives, and actionable insights that decode the rapidly transforming fixed income landscape in India.The pages slugged ‘Brand Connect’ are equivalent to advertisements and are not written and produced by Forbes India journalists.

আপোনাৰ সন্তানো বয়স অনুসৰি ওখ হোৱা নাই নেকি ?
description:
ডিজিটেল ডেস্ক: যেতিয়া এটা শিশু ডাঙৰ হয়, শৰীৰৰ বিকাশৰ সৈতে তেওঁলোকৰ উচ্চতাও বৃদ্ধি হয়। বয়স অনুসৰি শৰীৰৰ উচ্চতা বৃদ্ধি কৰাটো খুবেই গুৰুত্বপূৰ্ণ। এবছৰ বয়সৰ পিছত শিশুৰ উচ্চতা প্ৰতি বছৰে ২ ইঞ্চিলৈকে বৃদ্ধি হয়।১২ৰ পৰা ১৪ বছৰ বয়সত উচ্চতা প্ৰতি বছৰে ৪ ইঞ্চি বৃদ্ধি হয়। কিন্তু আজিকালি বেয়া জীৱনশৈলী আৰু ভুল খাদ্যাভ্যাসৰ বাবে বয়স অনুসৰি শিশুৰ উচ্চতা বৃদ্ধি নহয়। শৈশৱৰ পৰাই শিশুসকলে পুষ্টিকৰ খাদ্য খোৱাটো গুৰুত্বপূৰ্ণ, যিয়ে তেওঁলোকৰ উচ্চতা দ্ৰুতগতিত বৃদ্ধি কৰাত গুৰুতৰ ভূমিকা গ্ৰহণ কৰে।শিশুৰ খাদ্যৰ যত্ন লৈ আপুনি তেওঁলোকৰ বয়স অনুপাতে উচ্চতা বৃদ্ধিত সহায় কৰিব পাৰে।শিশুৰ উচ্চতা বৃদ্ধৰ বাবে কি কি খাদ্য তেওঁলোকৰ খাদ্য তালিকাত অন্তভূক্ত কৰিব লাগে, আজি জানো আহক-
বয়স অনুসৰি উচ্চতা কিমান হ'ব লাগে ?
এবছৰীয়া শিশুৰ উচ্চতা ২৯.২ ইঞ্চি,২বছৰীয়া শিশুৰ উচ্চতা ৩৩.৫ ইঞ্চি, ৩ বছৰীয়া শিশুৰ উচ্চতা ৩৭ ইঞ্চি, ৪ বছৰীয়া শিশুৰ উচ্চতা ৩৯.৫ ইঞ্চি, ৫ বছৰীয়া শিশুৰ উচ্চতা ৪২.৫ ইঞ্চি, ৬ বছৰীয়া শিশুৰ উচ্চতা ৪৫.৫ইঞ্চি, ৭বছৰীয়া শিশুৰ উচ্চতা ৪৭.৭ ইঞ্চি, ৮ বছৰত ৫০.৫ ইঞ্চি, ৯ বছৰত ৫২.৫ ইঞ্চি, ১০ বছৰত ৫৪.৫ ইঞ্চি, ১১ বছৰত ৫৬.৭ ইঞ্চি, ১২ বছৰত ৫৯.০ ইঞ্চি উচ্চতা, ১৩ বছৰত ৬১.৭ ইঞ্চি আৰু ১৪ বছৰ বয়সৰ ওপৰৰ শিশুৰ উচ্চতা ৬২.৫ ইঞ্চি হ'ব লাগে। 
শিশুৰ উচ্চতা বৃদ্ধি কৰিবলৈ কি খুৱাব লাগে ?
গাখীৰ
শিশুৰ বাবে আটাইতকৈ গুৰুত্বপূৰ্ণ আহাৰ হৈছে গাখীৰ। গাখীৰত প্ৰ'টিন, কেলচিয়াম আৰু অন্যান্য পুষ্টি থাকে, যি শিশুৰ সামগ্ৰিক বিকাশত সহায় কৰে। গাখীৰ খোৱাটোৱে শিশুৰ স্বাস্থ্য আৰু উচ্চতা দুয়োটাতে প্ৰভাৱ পেলায়। 
ছ’য়াবিন
শিশুক প্ৰচুৰ পৰিমাণে প্ৰ'টিন খুৱাব লাগে, যিয়ে তেওঁলোকৰ উচ্চতা বৃদ্ধি কৰে।ইয়াৰ বাবে শিশুক ছ’য়াবিন খুৱাব।ছ’য়াবিনত থকা এমিন’ এচিড আৰু অন্যান্য পুষ্টিয়ে হাড়ো শক্তিশালী কৰে। 
কণী
কণীও এক স্বাস্থ্যকৰ আহাৰ। ই শিশুসকলক প্ৰ'টিন, ৰাইবোফ্লেভিন, বায়োটিন আৰু আইৰণৰ পুষ্টি প্ৰদান কৰে।কণীয়ে শাৰীৰিক আৰু মানসিক বিকাশতো যথেষ্ট সহায় কৰে।
সেউজীয়া পাচলি
বহুতো শিশুৱে সেউজীয়া পাচলি নাখায়, যিয়ে শৰীৰৰ বিকাশ স্থবিৰ কৰে। সেয়েহে, শিশুক সৰুৰে পৰাই সেউজীয়া শাক-পাচলি খোৱাৰ অভ্যাস কৰিব লাগে।বিশেষকৈ পালেং শাক, বন্ধাকবি আৰু ব্ৰকলি তেওঁলোকৰ আহাৰত অন্তৰ্ভুক্ত কৰিব। এই পাচলিবোৰত মাইক্ৰ'নিউট্ৰিয়েণ্ট থাকে, যাৰ ফলত শিশুৰ শাৰীৰিক বিকাশ ভাল হয় আৰু উচ্চতা বৃদ্ধি হয়।
শুকান ফল, বাদাম
শুকান ফলৰ ভিতৰত শিশুক কাঠবাদাম, আখৰোট, পিস্তা, কাজু, কিচমিচ, খেজুৰ আদি খুৱাব পাৰে। বাদামক পুষ্টিৰ শক্তিক্ষেত্ৰ বুলি কোৱা হয়। ইয়াত ভিটামিন, খনিজ পদাৰ্থ, স্বাস্থ্যকৰ চৰ্বি, প্ৰ'টিন আৰু অমেগা-৩ ফেটি এচিড থাকে, যিয়ে হাড় শক্তিশালী কৰাতো সহায় কৰে।
Also Read: আপোনাৰ সন্তান বুদ্ধিমান হয় নে নহয় আজিয়েই জানি লওঁক

title: Passport: ପାସପୋର୍ଟ ପାଇଁ ଏବେ ଗଣିବାକୁ ପଡିବ ଅଧିକ ଟଙ୍କା
description:
ନୂଆଦିଲ୍ଲୀ: ଯଦି ଆପଣ ବିଦେଶ ଯାତ୍ରା ପାଇଁ ଯୋଜନା କରୁଛନ୍ତି କିମ୍ବା ନୂତନ ପାସପୋର୍ଟ କରିବାକୁ ଯାଉଛନ୍ତି, ତେବେ ଏହି ଖବର ଆପଣଙ୍କ ପାଇଁ ଗୁରୁତ୍ୱପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ। ଭାରତ ସରକାର ପାସପୋର୍ଟ ଶୁଳ୍କରେ ଗୁରୁତ୍ୱପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ପରିବର୍ତ୍ତନ କରିଛନ୍ତି। ନୂତନ ନିୟମ ଅନୁଯାୟୀ, ନୂତନ ପାସପୋର୍ଟ ପାଇବା, ପୁନଃ ପାସପୋର୍ଟ ପ୍ରଦାନ କରିବା ଏବଂ ତତ୍କାଳ ସେବା ପାଇବା ପାଇଁ ଏବେ ପୂର୍ବ ଅପେକ୍ଷା ଅଧିକ ଖର୍ଚ୍ଚ ହେବ। ସଂଶୋଧିତ ଫିସ୍ ୧ ଜୁଲାଇ, ୨୦୨୬ ରୁ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟକାରୀ ହେବ।
ଶୁଳ୍କ କେତେ ବୃଦ୍ଧି ପାଇବ?
ପାସପୋର୍ଟ (ସଂଶୋଧନ) ନିୟମ, ୨୦୨୬ ଅନୁଯାୟୀ ସରକାର ନୂତନ ଶୁଳ୍କ ଘୋଷଣା କରିଛନ୍ତି। ୩୬ ପୃଷ୍ଠା ବିଶିଷ୍ଟ ମାନକ ପାସପୋର୍ଟ ଏବଂ ଏହାର ପୁନଃ ପ୍ରଦାନ ପାଇଁ ଫିସ୍ ₹୧,୫୦୦ ରୁ ବୃଦ୍ଧି କରାଯାଇ ୨,୫୦୦ କରାଯାଇଛି। ଯଦି ଆପଣ ତତ୍କାଳ ସେବା ମାଧ୍ୟମରେ ପାସପୋର୍ଟ ପାଇବାକୁ ଚାହାଁନ୍ତି, ତେବେ ଆପଣଙ୍କୁ ଏବେ ₹୫,୦୦୦ ଦେବାକୁ ପଡିବ, ଯାହା ପୂର୍ବରୁ ₹୩,୫୦୦ ଥିଲା।
ଏହି କ୍ଷେତ୍ରରେ ମଧ୍ୟ ପରିବର୍ତ୍ତନ କରାଯାଇଛି
ଏହା ବ୍ୟତୀତ, ୬୦ ପୃଷ୍ଠା ବିଶିଷ୍ଟ ପାସପୋର୍ଟ ପାଇଁ ଶୁଳ୍କ ମଧ୍ୟ ବୃଦ୍ଧି କରାଯାଇଛି। ଏବେ ଏକ ନୂତନ ୬୦ ପୃଷ୍ଠାର ପାସପୋର୍ଟ ଜାରି କରିବା କିମ୍ବା ପୁନଃ ଜାରି କରିବା ପାଇଁ ₹୩୫୦୦ ଖର୍ଚ୍ଚ ହେବ। ପୂର୍ବରୁ ଏହାର ମୂଲ୍ୟ ₹୨୦୦୦ ଥିଲା। ୬୦ ପୃଷ୍ଠାର ପାସପୋର୍ଟ ପାଇଁ ତତ୍କାଳ ସେବା ଶୁଳ୍କକୁ ₹୬୦୦୦ କୁ ବୃଦ୍ଧି କରାଯାଇଛି। ହଜିଯାଇଥିବା ପାସପୋର୍ଟ ପୁନଃ ପ୍ରଦାନ କରିବା ଏବଂ ଅନ୍ୟ କିଛି ପାସପୋର୍ଟ ସମ୍ବନ୍ଧୀୟ ସେବା ପାଇଁ ଶୁଳ୍କ ମଧ୍ୟ ସଂଶୋଧନ କରାଯାଇଛି।
ଆହୁରି ପଢନ୍ତୁ: Odisha Government: ସମବାୟ ସମିତିଗୁଡ଼ିକ ଦ୍ୱାରା ସାର ବଣ୍ଟନକୁ ପ୍ରୋତ୍ସାହିତ କରିବା ପାଇଁ ୪୨ କୋଟି ଟଙ୍କାର ସୁଧ ରିହାତି ଯୋଜନାକୁ ମଞ୍ଜୁର କଲେ ରାଜ୍ୟ ସରକାର
ସମୟାନୁସାରେ ନବୀକରଣ କରନ୍ତୁଯଦି ଆପଣଙ୍କର ପାସପୋର୍ଟର ମିଆଦ ଶେଷ ହେବାକୁ ଯାଉଛି କିମ୍ବା ଏହାର ପୃଷ୍ଠାଗୁଡ଼ିକ ପ୍ରାୟ ପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ହୋଇଗଲାଣି, ତେବେ ଶେଷ ମୁହୂର୍ତ୍ତ ପର୍ଯ୍ୟନ୍ତ ଅପେକ୍ଷା କରନ୍ତୁ ନାହିଁ। ସମୟାନୁସାରେ ଆପଣଙ୍କର ପାସପୋର୍ଟ ନବୀକରଣ କରିବା ଦ୍ୱାରା କେବଳ ଚାପ ହ୍ରାସ ହେବ ନାହିଁ ବରଂ ତତ୍କାଳ ସେବାର ଅତିରିକ୍ତ ଖର୍ଚ୍ଚ ମଧ୍ୟ କମିଯିବ। ମନେରଖନ୍ତୁ ଯେ ଅନେକ ଦେଶ ଭିସା ଜାରି କରିବା ପୂର୍ବରୁ ସର୍ବନିମ୍ନ ଛଅ ମାସ ବୈଧତା ସହିତ ପାସପୋର୍ଟ ଆବଶ୍ୟକ କରନ୍ତି।
ଆହୁରି ପଢନ୍ତୁ: Debasnana Purnima 2026: ମହାପ୍ରଭୁଙ୍କ ସ୍ନାନଯାତ୍ରା: ଗଜପତି ମହାରାଜାଙ୍କୁ ଭେଟିଲେ ମୁଖ୍ୟମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ, ୧୦୮ ଗରା ସୁବାସିତ ଜଳରେ ମହାପ୍ରଭୁଙ୍କ ସ୍ନାନ
କିଛି କ୍ଷେତ୍ରରେ, ଏୟାରଲାଇନ୍ସ କମ୍ ବୈଧତା ଥିବା ପାସପୋର୍ଟ ପାଇଁ ବୋର୍ଡିଂକୁ ମନା କରିପାରେ। ତେଣୁ, ବିଦେଶ ଯାତ୍ରା ଯୋଜନା କରିବା ସମୟରେ, ପ୍ରଥମେ ଆପଣଙ୍କ ପାସପୋର୍ଟର ମିଆଦ ଶେଷ ତାରିଖ ଯାଞ୍ଚ କରିବାକୁ ନିଶ୍ଚିତ କରନ୍ତୁ। ଯଦି ଆପଣ ବେଳେବେଳେ ବିଦେଶ ଯାତ୍ରା କରନ୍ତି, ତେବେ ୩୬-ପୃଷ୍ଠାର ପାସପୋର୍ଟ ଯଥେଷ୍ଟ ହୋଇପାରେ। ତଥାପି, ଯେଉଁମାନେ ବାରମ୍ବାର ବିଦେଶ ଯାତ୍ରା କରନ୍ତି, ସେମାନଙ୍କ ପାଇଁ ୬୦-ପୃଷ୍ଠାର ପାସପୋର୍ଟ ଏକ ଭଲ ବିକଳ୍ପ, କାରଣ ଏହାର ଅଧିକ ପୃଷ୍ଠା ବାରମ୍ବାର ପୁନଃ-ପ୍ରଦାନର ଆବଶ୍ୟକତାକୁ ହ୍ରାସ କରେ।

title: Loopring Shuts Down Decentralised Exchange, Halts Trading Operations
description: Loopring will distribute final user balances after ending DEX operations
content: Loopring has shut down its decentralised exchange and automated market maker after citing weak adoption, limited business development, and increasing competition from newer zkEVM solutions. The Ethereum scaling pioneer, which launched one of the first zk-rollup implementations, said it will distribute users’ remaining balances to their Ethereum addresses. The closure adds to a growing list of crypto projects winding down operations in 2026 amid changing market conditions.

title: Staind frontman Aaron Lewis responds to his soon-to-be-released MAGA album cover already being used as shredded packaging for Taylor Swift merch
description:
"I certainly wouldn’t be trying to bring her into this or blame her for anything"
The post Staind frontman Aaron Lewis responds to his soon-to-be-released MAGA album cover already being used as shredded packaging for Taylor Swift merch appeared first on NME.
content:
Aaron Lewis has responded after a Taylor Swift fan found his upcoming album being used as shredded packaging for the pop star’s merch.

READ MORE: Taylor Swift – ‘The Life Of A Showgirl’ review: magical when the songwriter just lets herself be

In a social media post, the Staind frontman responded to a Swift fan’s unboxing video that showed her piecing together bits of shredded paper that, when put back together, made up the cover of Lewis’s unreleased album, ‘Give Me Back My Country’.
“Oh look, there’s my new album, that hasn’t even been released yet, shredded as packaging paper in Taylor Swift merch,” Lewis wrote on X/Twitter. “Ain’t that some shit.”
Fans who ordered the CD collection for Swift’s new track ‘I Knew It, I Knew You‘ for the Toy Story 5 soundtrack took to social media to show that the merchandise arrived wrapped in paper that featured lyrics, art, and album pages from Lewis’s album, which is due out July 17.
Because of her penchant for leaving fans Easter eggs to decode, some thought it was a deliberate move from the ‘Midnights’ singer, although it remains unclear why exactly his album materials were used.

Oh look, there’s my new album, that hasn’t even been released yet, shredded as packaging paper in Taylor Swift merch. Ain’t that some shit. pic.twitter.com/77KhZ1ziI2
— Aaron Lewis (@Aaronlewismusic) June 25, 2026

His record is being released through Big Machine Label Group, which is Swift’s former label, while the merchandise is being handled by Universal Music Group.
Lewis – who started out in alt rock outfit Staind but has since become more well known for his pro-Trump, politically conservative country tracks – has since spoken to USA Today about the situation.
“I don’t have any social media. I didn’t have it when I was younger. It’s never felt important to me,” he told the publication. “I never even had a MySpace. So I don’t see anything of that type of stuff. And when this was brought to me, I was just like, ‘What is going on? This is just weird.’”
Lewis went on to say he was not happy about the mix-up. “That’s the cover to my brand new record that hasn’t even been put out yet. As artists, we put our trust in the distribution companies to get our material way up front and trust that they’ll be responsible with what it is that we give them.”
He added that he is not blaming Swift for the incident, saying: “We live in two very, very different worlds. And she’s such a huge star that her world doesn’t intertwine with anyone’s worlds. I certainly wouldn’t be trying to bring her into this or blame her for anything. It just so happens that it was my record cover in her gift box for her fans.”

@taylorswift13 and I are 13 twins… pic.twitter.com/uVieknmRMR
— Aaron Lewis (@Aaronlewismusic) September 18, 2016

As noted by Stereogum, Swift was once pictured alongside Lewis at Nashville’s Music City & Wine Festival, pointing out his 13 neck tattoo, which is famously her lucky number.
That being said, it’s looking unlikely that he’ll be invited to her wedding. Over the weekend, however, reports emerged claiming that her longtime friend Stevie Nicks is rumoured to be performing.
The post Staind frontman Aaron Lewis responds to his soon-to-be-released MAGA album cover already being used as shredded packaging for Taylor Swift merch appeared first on NME.

title: Bridge Collapse ବାଗଲତା ପଡ଼ାରେ ଭାଙ୍ଗିଲା ପୋଲ, ଗାଁ ଲୋକଙ୍କ କଷ୍ଟ ବଢ଼ିଲା
Watch local primary school kids perform ‘My Hero’ for Foo Fighters ahead of Liverpool Anfield show
description:
“Thank you for braving the heat and for sharing your talents”
The post Watch local primary school kids perform ‘My Hero’ for Foo Fighters ahead of Liverpool Anfield show appeared first on NME.
content:
Local primary school kids performed ‘My Hero’ for the Foo Fighters ahead of their shows at Liverpool’s Anfield Stadium last week.

READ MORE: Foo Fighters live in Liverpool: rock club vibes on a stadium scale from our greatest supergroup

Dave Grohl and co. are currently on the road for their European ‘Take Cover’ tour, which comes in support of their brand new album ‘Your Favorite Toy‘. The dates kicked off at the huge Liverpool venue last week, with the first show taking place on Thursday (June 25) and the second being held on Saturday (27).
Ahead of the opening night, children from the Anfield Road Primary School – in a group called The Bell Tower Beats – came together at the stadium to perform for the band, playing the Foo’s hit song ‘My Hero’.
As seen in footage shared on the band’s official Instagram account, the children are seen standing on the stage at the stadium, and begin by playing the song’s melody on ukuleles before singing it to the Foo Fighters and a few members of the crew.
A couple of the kids play other instruments including the bass and the tambourine, while their teacher stands at the front and leads the way while playing an acoustic guitar. At various moments in the video, Grohl is seen smiling while sitting in the standing area of the venue.

  










View this post on Instagram

























“Ahead of our shows in Liverpool, we were treated to a very special performance from The Bell Tower Beats of @anfieldroadprimary and THEY ROCKED ANFIELD STADIUM!!!” wrote Foo Fighters on Instagram.
“Thank you for braving the heat and for sharing your talents,” the caption added, making reference to the heatwave that affected the UK and much of Europe throughout last week.
NME caught their first gig in Liverpool and gave it a glowing four-star review, which read: “That laid-back rock club vibe is what makes this work. Foos don’t have the bells, whistles, pyro, or blockbuster special effects of other standard stadium acts, just tunes and banter.”
“Who’d have thought that ‘This Is A Call’, ‘For All the Cows’ and ‘Big Me’ – written for their 1995 debut and for sweaty little rooms – would land like Queen classics on this pitch?” it added.
At the second night, Foos paid homage to The Beatles in their hometown by breaking out a cover of ‘I Want You (She’s So Heavy)’.

The cover came as Grohl is friends with Paul McCartney, has previously shared that the music legend gave his daughter her very first piano lesson, and also joined Macca on stage at Glastonbury 2022 to cover The Beatles’ ‘I Saw Her Standing There’ and Wings’ ‘Band On The Run’.
As well as more headline stadium shows, Foos will also make various festival appearances at Mad Cool, NOS Alive and more. Support across various dates will include Royel Otis, Inhaler, IDLES, Otoboke Beaver, Fat Dog and Die Spitz. Get any remaining tickets here.
Their latest album, ‘Your Favorite Toy’, dropped in April and got three and a half stars from NME. “‘Your Favorite Toy’ is a few more tracks of that depth away from being the most vital Foo Fighters record since 1997’s ‘The Colour and the Shape’,” the review read. “For now, at least, they have remembered that no-frills punk, played fast and loud, suits them much better than middle-of-the-road dad-rock.”
The post Watch local primary school kids perform ‘My Hero’ for Foo Fighters ahead of Liverpool Anfield show appeared first on NME.

title: త్రిభాషా విధానంపై CBSE కీలక ప్రకటన
description: CBSE Board Exam:సీబీఎస్‌ఈ బోర్డు తాజాగా త్రిభాషా విధానంపై సీబీఎస్‌ఈ క్లారిటీ ఇచ్చింది. విద్యా విధానంలో భాగంగా విద్యార్థులపై భారం తగ్గించేందుకు ఈ నిర్ణయం తీసుకున్నట్లు తెలిపింది....
content:
CBSE Board Exam:సీబీఎస్‌ఈ బోర్డు తాజాగా త్రిభాషా విధానంపై సీబీఎస్‌ఈ క్లారిటీ ఇచ్చింది. విద్యా విధానంలో భాగంగా విద్యార్థులపై భారం తగ్గించేందుకు ఈ నిర్ణయం తీసుకున్నట్లు తెలిపింది. ప్రస్తుత విద్యా సంవత్సరంలో ఆయా తరగతుల విద్యార్థులు పాటించాల్సిన నియమాలను బోర్డు వివరించింది. పాఠశాలలు ఈ మార్పులను తక్షణమే అమలు చేయాలని ఆదేశాలు జారీ చేసింది. విద్యార్థులు, తల్లిదండ్రులు ఈ నిబంధనలను అర్థం చేసుకోవడం చాలా అవసరం.



Read also: Thalliki Vandanam Schemes: జూలై 10న ఖాతాల్లోకి తల్లికి వందనం నిధులు !

ఏ తరగతులకు మినహాయింపు ఉంటుంది



ప్రస్తుతం 7, 8, 9, 10 తరగతులు చదువుతున్న విద్యార్థులకు ఈ త్రిభాషా నిబంధన నుంచి బోర్డు మినహాయింపు కల్పించింది. ఈ తరగతుల విద్యార్థులకు మూడో భాషా పరీక్షలు బయట నిర్వహించరు. బదులుగా స్కూల్ స్థాయిలోనే ఇంటర్నల్ మార్కులతో మూల్యాంకనం చేస్తారు. కేవలం 6వ తరగతి చదివే వారికి మాత్రమే ఈ విధానం తప్పనిసరిగా వర్తిస్తుంది. ఇది విద్యార్థులపై పరీక్షల ఒత్తిడిని గణనీయంగా తగ్గిస్తుందని బోర్డు భావిస్తోంది.



CBSE Board Exam:బోర్డు పరీక్షల అమలు తేదీలు



వచ్చే 2026-27 విద్యా సంవత్సరం నుంచి 6వ తరగతి విద్యార్థులకు బోర్డు పరీక్షలు నిర్వహించడం తప్పనిసరి. కొత్త విద్యా విధానం అనుసరించి విద్యా ప్రమాణాలు పెంచే దిశగా ఈ అడుగు పడింది. ప్రతి పాఠశాల ఈ బోర్డు పరీక్షల కోసం విద్యార్థులను సిద్ధం చేయాలని సూచించింది. పారదర్శకమైన మూల్యాంకనం ద్వారా విద్యార్థుల భాషా నైపుణ్యాలను మెరుగుపరచడమే ఈ నిర్ణయం ప్రధాన ఉద్దేశ్యం.

title: వైద్య పరీక్షల కోసం ముంబైకి వెళ్లిన పవన్ కల్యాణ్
description: Pawan Kalyan Mumbai Visit: ఆంధ్రప్రదేశ్ ఉప ముఖ్యమంత్రి, జనసేన పార్టీ అధినేత పవన్ కల్యాణ్ వైద్య పరీక్షల నిమిత్తం సోమవారం ముంబైకి పయనమయ్యారు. గత కొంతకాలంగా...
content:
Pawan Kalyan Mumbai Visit: ఆంధ్రప్రదేశ్ ఉప ముఖ్యమంత్రి, జనసేన పార్టీ అధినేత పవన్ కల్యాణ్ వైద్య పరీక్షల నిమిత్తం సోమవారం ముంబైకి పయనమయ్యారు. గత కొంతకాలంగా ఆయనను వేధిస్తున్న భుజం నొప్పికి చికిత్స తీసుకునేందుకు ముంబైలోని ప్రముఖ ‘కోకిలాబెన్ ధీరూభాయ్ అంబానీ’ ఆసుపత్రికి వెళ్లనున్నారు. ఈ పర్యటనలో పవన్ కల్యాణ్‌తో పాటు ఆయన సతీమణి అన్నా కొణిదెల కూడా ఉన్నారు.







Read also: MLC Nagababu: గిరిజన హక్కుల కోసమే పవన్ ఆ శాఖ తీసుకున్నారు.. నాగబాబు







రొటేటర్ కఫ్ సమస్యతో ఇబ్బంది



పవన్ కల్యాణ్ గత కొన్ని రోజులుగా రెండు భుజాలకు సంబంధించిన ‘రొటేటర్ కఫ్’ (రొటేటర్ కఫ్ కండరాలు చిట్లడం) సమస్యతో బాధపడుతున్నారు. సాధారణంగా ఇవి భుజ కదలికలను నియంత్రించే కండరాలు. గతంలో వరుసగా సినిమా షూటింగ్‌లలో పాల్గొన్న సమయంలో తగిలిన గాయాల వల్లే ప్రస్తుతం ఈ నొప్పి తిరగబెట్టినట్లు తెలుస్తోంది. సార్వత్రిక ఎన్నికల ప్రచార సమయంలోనూ ఈ నొప్పితో తీవ్రంగా ఇబ్బంది పడినప్పటికీ, ఆయన లెక్కచేయకుండా ప్రచారాన్ని కొనసాగించారు.



ఇటీవలే ఆయనకు సైనస్ శస్త్రచికిత్స కూడా జరిగింది. ప్రస్తుతం ఏపీ ప్రభుత్వంలో కీలక బాధ్యతలు స్వీకరించిన నేపథ్యంలో, ఆరోగ్యంపై ప్రత్యేక శ్రద్ధ పెట్టాలని పవన్ భావించారు. ఇందులో భాగంగానే పూర్తిస్థాయి వైద్య పరీక్షలు మరియు అవసరమైన చికిత్స కోసం ఆయన ముంబై ఆసుపత్రిని ఆశ్రయించారు.

title: Ram Mandir Donation Case: 'Theft' Uncovered Early, FIR Came Later — Exclusive
description: Times Now Unearths Sequence of Events in the Ram Mandir Donation Case: Funds in the Ram Mandir donation case were recovered days before an FIR was filed.
content: Action began in the alleged embezzlement of donations at the Ram Mandir in Ayodhya days before it officially surfaced. A distinct pattern has emerged, indicating that the Temple Trust began recovering the allegedly embezzled money even before a formal complaint was filed. According to sources, Trust General Secretary Champat Rai, who has now submitted his resignation, first received information about the suspected donation theft on June 3- 4. Following an internal verification, Trust officials, along with police, reached the residence of the accused on June 5, where nearly rupees 58 lakhs was recovered. In the CCTV footage, accessed by Times Now, Avinash Shukla can be seen being taken away by the officials.Sources further claim that the remaining amount was returned by the accused through their bank accounts by June 8.The timeline of events:June 4: Information about the alleged theft reaches the Trust.June 5: Around Rs 58 lakh was recovered from the accused's premises following a raid.June 6-8: Remaining amount returned through bank accounts.Notably, the case came to light only on June 7 after the allegations of misappropriation surfaced. The FIR, lodged at the instance of trust member Krishna Mohan, was registered following the recommendations of the preliminary report of a three-member Special Investigation Team (SIT) constituted by the Uttar Pradesh government.https://youtu.be/zr5vx0D9ef8The three-member SIT, headed by Lucknow Divisional Commissioner Vijay Vishwas Pant, was constituted on June 13 at the Trust's request. The SIT submitted its preliminary report to the state government on June 23.The agencies are examining why recoveries were made before the registration of a formal complaint and whether there were any procedural lapses in the initial handling of the case. All eight accused arrested in connection with the alleged embezzlement were on Monday remanded to 14 days judicial custody by a local court. The eight people are - Avinash Shukla, Anukalp Mishra, Lav Kush Mishra, Manish Kumar Yadav, Karunesh Pandey, Ram Shankar Mishra, Subhash Srivastava and Ramashankar alias Tinnu Yadav. The accused were produced before Special Judge, Anti Corruption Court, Rajat Verma, through video conferencing after their earlier judicial custody expired, Special Prosecution Officer Umesh Dubey said. Police did not apply for the custody of the accused, he added.Earlier, the Shri Ram Janmabhoomi Teerth Kshetra (Trust) in an official press statement, the Trust said, "We are shocked, hurt, and deeply saddened by the incidents reported over the past few days regarding the Shri Ram Mandir (Ayodhya). We are committed to ensuring a fair investigation and reassuring the devotees."The Trust also announced that it had received the resignations of Champat Rai, general secretary of the Shri Ram Janmabhoomi Teerth Kshetra (Trust), and Trustee Anil Mishra.
