title: 'I Sweep, Mop, Yet...': Faridabad Man Dies By Suicide, Records Final Video
description: In Faridabad, a 28-year-old businessman died by suicide, reportedly due to harassment from his wife and in-laws. He was found hanging in his garment shop, where he had posted a video on Instagram accusing them of mental abuse.
content: A 28-year-old businessman in Faridabad allegedly died by suicide, alleging harassment by his wife and in-laws. The man was running a garment shop and was found hanging inside his shop, located in Sector-3, Ballabhgarh. Before taking his life, he posted a video on Instagram leveling serious allegations of mental harassment against his wife and in-laws. The police have sent the body for a post-mortem examination and initiated an investigation into the matter, including the allegations made in the video.Body Found Hanging Inside the ShopThe deceased has been identified as 28-year-old Rahul, a resident of Housing Board Colony, Sector-3. He ran a garment shop in Sector-3, which he had opened four months ago. According to the police, Rahul arrived at the shop on Sunday morning after visiting his mother at home. Shortly thereafter, he hanged himself inside the shop. Upon receiving the information, the police arrived at the scene, took custody of the body, and sent it to BK Civil Hospital for a post-mortem.Love Marriage, Separation From Parents, Harassment According to his family, Rahul had a love marriage with a woman named Jyoti about two years ago. They allege that after the marriage, his wife did not want Rahul to live with his parents, which led him to live separately. He had also recently started his new garment shop.Amit, a relative of the deceased, alleged that Rahul had been mentally distressed for a long time due to harassment by his wife and her family. They claimed that his wife had even filed a case against Rahul, after which Rahul was stressed. The family further alleged that Rahul was prevented from even meeting his parents.Records Final Instagram Video Before hanging himself, Rahul posted a video on Instagram in which he leveled serious allegations against his wife Jyoti, mother-in-law Veena, father-in-law Bittu, and sister-in-law Neetu. In the video, Rahul claimed that he used to handle all household chores, such as sweeping and washing dishes, for his wife, yet he was subjected to physical abuse and false cases were filed against him. He stated that he was under constant mental stress.      Faridabad Business Man Dies By Suicide, Blames Wife, In-Laws Rahul also said in the video that his wife and in-laws were responsible for his decision to take this step and that they should be punished according to the law. Additionally, he expressed his wish for his assets to be transferred to his mother, sister, and brothers after his death.Police Investigating Every AspectInvestigating Officer Sanjay Kumar stated that a post-mortem examination of the body is being conducted. The police are investigating the entire matter, and the video that went viral on social media has also been included in the investigation. The allegations made in the video can only be confirmed after the investigation is complete.

title: సంచలన ఆటగాడు వైభవ్ సూర్యవంశీ ఎంట్రీపై అసిస్టెంట్ కోచ్ కీలక వ్యాఖ్యలు!
description: India vs Ireland: ఐర్లాండ్ పర్యటనలో భారత టీ20 క్రికెట్ జట్టుకు కోలుకోలేని షాక్ తగిలింది. ప్రపంచ ఛాంపియన్‌గా ఉన్న టీమిండియా ఈ సిరీస్‌లో ఊహించని విధంగా...
content:
India vs Ireland: ఐర్లాండ్ పర్యటనలో భారత టీ20 క్రికెట్ జట్టుకు కోలుకోలేని షాక్ తగిలింది. ప్రపంచ ఛాంపియన్‌గా ఉన్న టీమిండియా ఈ సిరీస్‌లో ఊహించని విధంగా 0-2తో క్లీన్‌స్వీప్ (వైట్ వాష్) అయింది. ఆదివారం ఉత్కంఠభరితంగా జరిగిన రెండో టీ20 మ్యాచ్‌లో కేవలం ఒక్క పరుగు తేడాతో భారత్ ఓటమి పాలవడంతో.. జట్టు ఎంపికపై క్రికెట్ వర్గాల్లో తీవ్ర చర్చ నడుస్తోంది. ముఖ్యంగా ఐపీఎల్‌లో పరుగుల విధ్వంసం సృష్టించిన యువ సంచలనం వైభవ్ సూర్యవంశీ (Vaibhav Suryavanshi) ని జట్టులోకి తీసుకున్నప్పటికీ, రెండు మ్యాచ్‌ల్లోనూ తుది జట్టులో అవకాశం ఇవ్వకపోవడంపై అభిమానులు ఆగ్రహం వ్యక్తం చేస్తున్నారు. ఈ నేపథ్యంలో, మ్యాచ్ అనంతరం జరిగిన విలేకరుల సమావేశంలో భారత అసిస్టెంట్ కోచ్ ర్యాన్ టెన్ డోస్చేట్ (Ryan ten Doeschate) వైభవ్ సూర్యవంశీ అరంగేట్రం (Debut) పై కీలక వివరణ ఇచ్చారు.



Read Also:Cricket In Olympics: 128 ఏళ్ల తర్వాత ఒలింపిక్స్‌లోకి క్రికెట్.. క్వాలిఫికేషన్ రూల్స్ ఖరారు చేసిన ఐఓసీ!



వైభవ్ రెడీ.. కానీ సంజు శాంసన్ లాంటి సీనియర్లు ఉన్నారు!







యువ ఆటగాడి ప్రతిభపై కోచ్ డోస్చేట్ ప్రశంసలు కురిపిస్తూనే, తుది జట్టు ఎంపిక వెనుక ఉన్న సమీకరణాలను వెల్లడించారు: “వైభవ్ సూర్యవంశీ అంతర్జాతీయ క్రికెట్ ఆడేందుకు పూర్తిగా సిద్ధంగా ఉన్నాడు. అందులో ఎలాంటి సందేహం లేదు. అయితే, కేవలం మూడు నెలల క్రితమే మనం ప్రపంచ కప్ గెలవడంలో కీలక పాత్ర పోషించిన సంజు శాంసన్ లాంటి సీనియర్ ఆటగాళ్లు కూడా ప్రస్తుత జట్టులో ఉన్నారు. వైభవ్ ఐపీఎల్‌లో అద్భుత ప్రదర్శన చేశాడు. అతని బ్యాటింగ్ చూడాలని మేమంతా ఎంతో ఉత్సాహంగా ఉన్నాం. కానీ, మిగతా ఆటగాళ్లలాగే వైభవ్ కూడా ఒక నిర్ణీత ప్రక్రియను (Process) దాటి రావాల్సి ఉంటుంది. ప్రస్తుతమున్న ఆటగాళ్లకు వరుసగా అవకాశాలిస్తూ వారిలో ఆత్మవిశ్వాసాన్ని నింపడం జట్టు మేనేజ్‌మెంట్‌కు చాలా ముఖ్యం.” – భారత అసిస్టెంట్ కోచ్ ర్యాన్ టెన్ డోస్చేట్ ఈ సిరీస్ ప్రారంభానికి ముందు బ్యాటింగ్ కోచ్ సితాన్షు కోటక్ వ్యక్తంచేసిన అభిప్రాయాలనే డోస్చేట్ కూడా పునరుద్ఘాటించారు.



ఐపీఎల్‌లో పరుగుల విధ్వంసం.. MVP విజేత!



ఈ ఏడాది జరిగిన ఐపీఎల్ (IPL) సీజన్‌లో వైభవ్ సూర్యవంశీ అసాధారణ బ్యాటింగ్‌తో దేశాన్ని ఆకర్షించాడు. టోర్నీ పొడుగునా 230కి పైగా భీకరమైన స్ట్రైక్ రేట్‌తో ఏకంగా 776 పరుగులు సాధించాడు. ఈ అద్భుత ప్రదర్శనకు గాను అతను ‘మోస్ట్ వాల్యూబుల్ ప్లేయర్’ (MVP) తో పాటు ‘ఎమర్జింగ్ ప్లేయర్ ఆఫ్ ది సీజన్’ అవార్డులను కైవసం చేసుకున్నాడు. ఇంతటి సంచలన ఫామ్‌లో ఉన్న ఆటగాడిని బెంచ్‌కే పరిమితం చేయడంపైనే విమర్శలు వ్యక్తమవుతున్నాయి.



India vs Ireland: ఇంగ్లాండ్ టూర్‌లో సచిన్ రికార్డు బ్రేక్ కావడం ఖాయమా?



ఐర్లాండ్ సిరీస్ ముగియడంతో భారత్ ఇప్పుడు నేరుగా ఇంగ్లాండ్ పర్యటనకు సిద్ధమవుతోంది. జులై 1 నుంచి చెస్టర్-లీ-స్ట్రీట్ వేదికగా ఇంగ్లాండ్‌తో టీ20 సిరీస్ ప్రారంభం కానుంది. ఈ పర్యటనలోనైనా వైభవ్ సూర్యవంశీ అంతర్జాతీయ క్రికెట్‌లోకి అడుగుపెడతాడా అని ఫ్యాన్స్ ఎదురుచూస్తున్నారు. ఒకవేళ ఇంగ్లాండ్ సిరీస్‌లో వైభవ్ గనుక బరిలోకి దిగితే, భారత క్రికెట్ చరిత్రలోనే అత్యంత పిన్న వయస్కుడైన అంతర్జాతీయ ఆటగాడిగా సరికొత్త రికార్డు సృష్టిస్తాడు. ప్రస్తుతం ఈ చారిత్రాత్మక రికార్డు క్రికెట్ దేవుడు సచిన్ టెండూల్కర్ (16 ఏళ్ల 205 రోజులకు అరంగేట్రం) పేరిట ఉంది. వైభవ్ అరంగేట్రంతో సచిన్ ఆల్‌టైమ్ రికార్డ్ బద్దలు కావడం ఖాయంగా కనిపిస్తోంది.

Roadless Village Crisis ଖଟିଆରେ ବୁହାହେଲା ପ୍ରସୂତିଙ୍କ ମୃତଦେହ
AI spending boom accelerates as Big Tech pours trillions into infrastructure
description: JPMorgan raised its AI capital spending forecast through 2030 as companies continue to expand AI infrastructure.
content:
Good morning. AI-driven capital spending is scaling rapidly, and the economics remain attractive and increasingly profitable—for now, according to JPMorgan Global Research’s midyear outlook.



Analysts see a broadening AI capex cycle underpinning growth expectations, led by “AI upstream” investments in data centers, chips, and supporting infrastructure. Much of this activity remains concentrated in the U.S., which accounts for about 85% of AI and machine learning venture capital, with spillover benefits expected in China, South Korea, and Taiwan through their roles in semiconductor supply chains.



That broad investment wave is also reshaping corporate strategy, as technology companies race to expand beyond their traditional markets and capture a share of the rapidly growing AI infrastructure opportunity. For example, Qualcomm is the latest major tech company to aggressively expand into the data center market.



While traditionally best known for its smartphone and mobile chip business, the company unveiled a comprehensive AI data center strategy at its Investor Day on June 24, targeting the rapidly growing AI infrastructure market. Qualcomm said it expects its data center business to generate more than $15 billion in annual revenue by fiscal 2029. If the company achieves this goal, the data center unit will become its single largest growth business outside of smartphones.



The company is “delivering a comprehensive roadmap for next-generation AI data centers—entering at a key inflection point with momentum from multi-year, multi-generation agreements with leading customers,” Qualcomm CFO and COO Akash Palkhiwala wrote in a LinkedIn post.



Meanwhile, on June 24, memory chipmaker Micron reported a 346% surge in quarterly revenue and profit of $28.2 billion for the quarter, nearly 15 times higher than the same quarter last year. Micron’s results briefly boosted investor sentiment after a selloff in AI and tech-related stocks began earlier in the week, lifting futures for both the tech-heavy Nasdaq and the broader S&P 500, Fortune reported.



In its midyear outlook, released on June 24, JPMorgan also raised its estimate for global AI-related capital expenditures through 2030 to $5.5 trillion, up from $5.1 trillion, driven by greater capacity expansion and increased debt financing. The bank now projects AI-related debt financing will reach $4.1 trillion as loan-to-cost ratios rise.



Analysts also forecast continued growth in hyperscaler spending, with capital expenditures reaching $650 billion in 2026 and surpassing $1.1 trillion in 2027. Despite the rapid investment, profitability is expected to remain robust, with operating cash flow exceeding $900 billion by 2027. (You can read more about JPMorgan’s outlook here.)



Capital expenditures for hyperscalers like Amazon, Google, and Microsoft are reaching unprecedented levels. For example, Microsoft expects to invest roughly $190 billion in capital expenditures in calendar year 2026, a 61% increase from the previous year.



While hyperscalers continue to report rising AI-related revenue, investors remain focused on whether enterprise adoption and monetization will keep pace with the trillions being invested. For now, the AI investment cycle continues to accelerate, but whether those returns ultimately justify the scale of spending is likely to remain one of the market’s defining questions.



Sheryl Estradasheryl.estrada@fortune.com
This story was originally featured on Fortune.com

title: Kingdom Come: Deliverance 2 Has Sold 6 Million Copies, Warhorse Studios Confirms
description: Kingdom Come Deliverance 2 has sold six million copies, Warhorse Studios has confirmed. The RPG launched on PC, PS5, and Xbox Series S/X on February 4, 2025. KCD 2 has also received a 60 percent discount on Steam during the ongoing Summer Sale.

గిరిజన హక్కుల కోసమే పవన్ ఆ శాఖ తీసుకున్నారు.. నాగబాబు
description: MLC Nagababu: ఆంధ్రప్రదేశ్ రాష్ట్రంలో పార్టీని మరింత బలోపేతం చేయడంపై జనసేన పూర్తి స్థాయిలో దృష్టి సారించింది. ముఖ్యంగా ఏజెన్సీ ప్రాంతాల్లోని గిరిజనుల అభివృద్ధే లక్ష్యంగా, రాబోయే...
content:
MLC Nagababu: ఆంధ్రప్రదేశ్ రాష్ట్రంలో పార్టీని మరింత బలోపేతం చేయడంపై జనసేన పూర్తి స్థాయిలో దృష్టి సారించింది. ముఖ్యంగా ఏజెన్సీ ప్రాంతాల్లోని గిరిజనుల అభివృద్ధే లక్ష్యంగా, రాబోయే స్థానిక సంస్థల ఎన్నికల నేపథ్యంలో సరికొత్త వ్యూహాలతో జనసేన ముందుకు వెళుతోంది. అరకు పార్లమెంట్ నియోజకవర్గ పరిధిలో గిరిజనుల సంక్షేమం, అభివృద్ధిని ప్రధాన అజెండాగా చేసుకుని పనిచేస్తున్నట్లు జనసేన అగ్రనేత, ఎమ్మెల్సీ నాగబాబు అధికారికంగా వెల్లడించారు. ఈ క్రమంలోనే రానున్న స్థానిక సంస్థల ఎన్నికల్లో అరకు పార్లమెంట్‌ పరిధిలోని అన్ని అసెంబ్లీ నియోజకవర్గాల్లోనూ జనసేన అభ్యర్థులను రంగంలోకి దించేందుకు అవసరమైన సన్నాహాలు వేగవంతం చేసినట్లు ఆయన స్పష్టం చేశారు.



Read Also: Gold Mines in Kuppam: ఏపీకి మరో గోల్డ్ మైన్.. కుప్పంలో బంగారం గనులు గుర్తింపు!



Pawan took up that portfolio specifically for the sake of tribal rights… Naga Babu.



MLC Nagababu: గిరిజన హక్కుల కోసమే పవన్ ఆ శాఖ తీసుకున్నారు



గిరిజన హక్కుల పరిరక్షణ, వారి జీవన ప్రమాణాలు మెరుగుపరచడానికే డిప్యూటీ సీఎం పవన్ కల్యాణ్ ప్రత్యేకంగా పంచాయతీరాజ్, గ్రామీణాభివృద్ధి శాఖలను తీసుకున్నారని నాగబాబు గుర్తుచేశారు. గిరిజనుల కష్టాలను స్వయంగా తెలుసుకునేందుకు కురుడి, డుంబ్రిగూడ, బల్లగరువు, పోతంగి, అనంతగిరి, పాడేరు, అరకు, పెద్దబాడు వంటి మారుమూల గిరిజన ప్రాంతాల్లో పవన్ కల్యాణ్ స్వయంగా పర్యటించారని.. అక్కడి క్షేత్రస్థాయి సమస్యలను అర్థం చేసుకుని వాటి పరిష్కారానికి కృషి చేస్తున్నారని చెప్పారు.



ఏజెన్సీ ప్రాంతాల కనెక్టివిటీని పెంచేందుకు ప్రభుత్వం తీసుకుంటున్న ప్రతిష్టాత్మక చర్యలను నాగబాబు వివరించారు. ‘అడవితల్లి బాట’ అనే ప్రత్యేక కార్యక్రమం ద్వారా గిరిజన గ్రామాలకు రూ. 1,005 కోట్లతో సుమారు 1,069 కిలోమీటర్ల మేర అధునాతన రోడ్లను నిర్మించారు. పీఎం జన్మన్ నిధుల నుంచి రూ. 555 కోట్లు, జాతీయ గ్రామీణ ఉపాధి హామీ పథకం (MGNREGS) కింద రూ. 2,525 కోట్లు, వీటికి అదనంగా రాష్ట్ర ప్రభుత్వం తరఫున మరో రూ. 50 కోట్లు కేటాయించి గిరిజన ప్రాంతాల్లో మౌలిక వసతులను భారీగా మెరుగుపరుస్తున్నారు.



పర్యావరణ పరిరక్షణకే తొలి ప్రాధాన్యం



ఏజెన్సీ ప్రాంతాల్లో మైనింగ్ అంశాలపై జనసేన అగ్రనేత స్పష్టతనిచ్చారు. బాక్సైట్ మైనింగ్, హైడ్రో ప్రాజెక్టుల వంటి వ్యవహారాల్లో స్థానిక పర్యావరణానికి మరియు గిరిజనుల సాంప్రదాయ జీవన విధానానికి ఎలాంటి హాని కలగకుండా అత్యంత జాగ్రత్తలు తీసుకుంటామని నాగబాబు హామీ ఇచ్చారు. ప్రకృతిని, గిరిజన సంస్కృతిని కాపాడుతూనే అభివృద్ధిని ముందుకు తీసుకెళ్తామని ఆయన స్పష్టం చేశారు.

title: ET Now Exclusive | Kotak CEO exit vs HDFC relief; RBI decision could change everything, biggest re-rating trigger - Decoding governance overhang
description: HDFC Bank's governance concerns have eased after a legal review, but analysts say RBI approval of CEO Sashidhar Jagdishan's reappointment remains the biggest trigger for a potential stock re-rating.
content: HDFC Bank has received a significant relief after an independent legal review found no governance lapses, easing concerns that had weighed on investor sentiment in recent weeks. However, market experts believe the most important catalyst for the stock is still pending, the Reserve Bank of India's decision on the reappointment of Managing Director and CEO Sashidhar Jagdishan.https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WxWcaKOXlp0According to analysts, the legal review is a positive development as it helps clear the path for the leadership approval process. Yet, the governance-related uncertainty is unlikely to disappear entirely until the banking regulator gives its final nod to the CEO's continuation.RBI Approval Seen as the Biggest Confidence BoosterExperts suggest that RBI's stance on the CEO reappointment will serve as the strongest signal regarding the regulator's assessment of governance standards at HDFC Bank. If the central bank approves the board's recommendation, it could reassure investors that governance concerns have been addressed and remove a major overhang on the stock.Analysts argue that private sector banks, including HDFC Bank, are currently trading below their historical valuation averages despite maintaining strong operating fundamentals. A favourable RBI decision could therefore act as a re-rating trigger for the lender.Kotak Mahindra Bank Faces Leadership TransitionWhile HDFC Bank appears to be moving closer to resolving its governance concerns, Kotak Mahindra Bank is entering a period of uncertainty following the resignation of its CEO.Market participants are expected to closely watch the appointment of a new chief executive and any strategic changes that may follow. Analysts note that Kotak had recently outlined ambitious growth plans, including aspirations to become the third-largest private sector bank in India by profits and a sharper focus on specific business segments.Given the bank's size and growth stage, leadership changes could potentially influence strategic direction more significantly than at larger peers. Investors are therefore expected to remain cautious until there is greater clarity on the succession plan.Strong Bench Strength, But Questions RemainDespite the leadership transition, analysts believe Kotak Mahindra Bank has sufficient managerial depth to manage the change. However, attention will remain focused on the profile of the incoming CEO and the strategy that the new leadership team adopts.The appointment of a leader with experience in mass-market banking could potentially indicate a stronger push into broader retail banking opportunities, which some experts believe could benefit the franchise over the long term.Why Analysts Continue to Like KotakBrokerages have largely maintained their ratings on Kotak Mahindra Bank despite the CEO exit. Their optimism stems from attractive valuations after years of underperformance and early signs of improvement in the bank's liability franchise.However, concerns remain regarding the deployment of excess capital and the pace at which management can execute its growth strategy. With the leadership transition now underway, investors may have to wait longer for greater visibility on the bank's future roadmap.What Could Drive HDFC Bank's Next Re-Rating?Market experts identify three major factors that could drive a meaningful re-rating for HDFC Bank:RBI approval of the CEO's reappointmentImprovement in net interest margins (NIMs) and balance sheet growthReturn of foreign institutional investor (FII) inflows into Indian equitiesAmong these, the RBI decision is viewed as the most immediate catalyst. NIM recovery and earnings acceleration are expected to be gradual processes that could play out over the next 12 to 18 months. Meanwhile, a revival in foreign investor participation could benefit the entire private banking sector, although the timing remains uncertain.For now, analysts believe that regulatory clarity on the CEO's future remains the single most important event that investors should watch, as it could finally remove the governance cloud hanging over HDFC Bank and unlock further upside for the stock.

title: Amarnath Yatra | Tight security arrangements in place at Nunwan base camp | GKTV report
The sell-off in Strategy’s preferred stock has investors questioning everything
description: The Bitcoin bull said in 2025 that Strategy’s newest stock offering had no “downside,” but investors beg to differ.
content:
In 2025, Bitcoin’s foremost booster pitched financial alchemy. At a conference in Prague, Michael Saylor, the executive chairman of the Bitcoin hoarder Strategy, touted his company’s newest stock offering. “I give you the upside, you have no downside, and I pay you a dividend while you wait to get rich,” he said.



Saylor was extolling a perpetual preferred stock issued by Strategy that trades under the ticker STRC and is nicknamed “Stretch.” The instrument lies somewhere between stock and debt. One share of STRC is designed to trade at $100, and holders receive biweekly payouts of about 11.5% in dividends. Strategy uses the money raised from selling the stock to finance new buys of Bitcoin or cover interest payouts to its creditors.



The asset is an exotic financial offering—one Saylor said he designed with AI. While STRC doesn’t give holders ownership interest in Strategy, it is correlated with the success of Strategy’s business. The Bitcoin hoarder can only pay the dividends if it has cash, which it can only raise if lenders continue to give the firm money, which they will only do if they believe Strategy will pay them back.



The Strategy chairman said STRC had “money market–like stability,” but almost a year after its launch, that comparison appears to be… stretching it. The preferred stock is now trading at $74 as traders are likely nervous that the Bitcoin hoarder may not be able to pay out the dividends. 



“Is [STRC] not inevitably going to collapse?” asked Tarun Chitra, cofounder of the crypto risk company Gauntlet, on the crypto podcast The Chopping Block. 



‘An uncomfortable life’



The success or failure of Strategy will have a significant impact on the crypto industry. Founded as a data software company, Strategy has morphed into one of the biggest Bitcoin holders in the world, with more than $50 billion in Bitcoin on its balance sheet. And the firm has already seen its stock plummet after it sold Bitcoin in early June.



“The main question is whether this capital stack bends or breaks,” said David Lawant, head of research at the crypto custodian Anchorage Digital, referring to Strategy. “We’re definitely in a test period.”



It’s also a period when holders of STRC may feel betrayed by Saylor’s promise that his preferred stock is stable. In fact, in March, the Strategy chairman posted on X a commercial that depicted a woman bragging about how she put her savings into STRC. “You weren’t meant to live an uncomfortable life,” wrote Saylor above the video.



Three months later, Strategy’s chairman appears to be one who’s uncomfortable as he tries to assuage market jitters. “Volatility tests every capital structure,” he wrote on Thursday. But, despite skepticism from investors, Lawant, the head of research at Anchorage Digital, believes the Bitcoin behemoth can survive the market rebellion: “I think they will weather the storm.”



Ben Weiss benjamin.weiss@fortune.com@bdanweiss
This story was originally featured on Fortune.com

title: India's hot summers drive AC demand: 'Industry to grow 25% by volume, 30% by value,' says Blue Star MD  B. Thiagarajan| ET NOW Exclusive
description: In this scorching Indian summer, when El Nino is making it worse, its quite evident that AC industry is expected to grow, check this exclusive report from ET NOW with Blue Star MD  B. Thiagarajan.
content: Blue Star MD on AC Industry Outlook: Strong Summer Volumes, Margin Pressure, and Data Center Growth Blue Star Managing Director B. Thiagarajan shared insights on the room air conditioner (RAC) industry and the company’s outlook during a recent interaction. The summer season delivered healthy growth, though margins faced pressure from rising costs. According to Thiagarajan, the industry saw approximately 25 per cent volume growth and 30 per cent value growth this summer. The season started late but extended well into late June. He described the summer as positive overall from a demand perspective, contrary to initial expectations of it being challenging for consumers due to extreme heat.Margin Challenges: The main issue was cost increases. Input costs rose around 13 per cent till May, but the industry could pass on only about 5-6 per cent through price hikes. For Blue Star, the pass-through was around 8 per cent. This is expected to result in an operating margin drop of roughly 2 to 2.5 percentage points in the relevant segment for the quarter. Normally, a strong summer delivers double-digit operating margins (around 10 per cent); this year, it may be lower.Key cost factors include copper, steel, aluminium, exchange rate fluctuations, and petroleum-based inputs. Inventory built from December carried higher weighted average costs, with peak pressure coinciding with the summer. Thiagarajan noted that margin recovery could take 3-4 months and would depend on festival season demand. He remained cautious on consumer sentiment and did not assume the challenges are fully behind. Some additional price increases cannot be ruled out.For FY27 as a whole, Blue Star expects continued volume growth in the RAC segment amid intense competition. The long-term CAGR of around 19 per centt for room air conditioners is hoped to be sustained. However, full-year operating margins are now estimated at 7-7.5 per cent, compared to an earlier expectation of 8-8.5 per cent.Dealer Inventory and Cost Trends: Dealer inventory levels have come down substantially and are not a concern. Costs related to energy label changes, new designs, and raw materials remain elevated. Crude oil softening is noted, but broader input costs (metals and plastics) have not eased significantly yet.Data Center Segment – Strong Growth Driver Blue Star sees meaningful opportunities beyond RACs in its B2B businesses. The data centre cooling segment stands out with unprecedented demand.MEP/EPC contracting: Market size estimated at RS 3,000-4,000 cr. Blue Star holds leadership with close to 40 per cent market share and an order book nearing Rs2,000 crore.Chillers for data centres: Market size Rs 1,250-1,500 crore, with Blue Star at 15-20 per cent share in the relevant segment.High-tech cooling (e.g., liquid cooling/CDU): An emerging area where the company is finalising partnerships. Current market is small (₹250-500 crore) but growing rapidly. cnbc.comOverall, the data centre segment (including related cooling solutions) is targeted to contribute around 20% of Blue Star’s revenue by FY29. The company expects its total revenue to reach a minimum of around ₹20,000 crore by FY29, with approximately ₹4,000 crore coming from the data centre vertical. Manufacturing sectors such as solar, EV, and semiconductors are also performing well.Thiagarajan highlighted that while RAC growth depends on seasons and consumer sentiment, the B2B segments, particularly data centres linked to AI infrastructure, provide a strong and diversified growth avenue for the company.

title: Courteney Cox and Snow Patrol’s Johnny McDaid split after decade together
description:
The couple previously split in 2015
The post Courteney Cox and Snow Patrol’s Johnny McDaid split after decade together appeared first on NME.
content:
Courteney Cox and Snow Patrol member Johnny McDaid have separated after more than a decade together.
The couple first started dating in 2013, getting engaged shortly after before calling it off in 2015, later reconciling but remaining un-engaged. According to People and the Daily Mail, the couple have now decided to split up, having last been photographed together in September 2025.
Back in 2024, Cox revealed that their initial split in the mid-2010s took place during a therapy session, sharing on Minnie Questions with Minnie Driver: “So three years in, we broke up and it was really intense. We broke up in therapy. I didn’t know it was coming, whether I should have or not.”
She added: “He just broke up within the first minute. And I was like, what? We were engaged and I was so shocked. I was in so much pain.”
“He wasn’t trying to surprise me. He was in that much pain in the relationship. There was that much that needed to be dealt with that he had to protect himself around his heart.”

Recalling the impact on herself, the actress shared: “I learned how to reclaim my voice, boundaries. What were my motives in life? Like, what was my part in this?”
She admitted that she was “so thankful for that breakup”, because when they got back together, “it was a different relationship, but also because it really taught me how I operated in the world”.
Before their planned wedding over a decade ago, McDaid’s collaborator Ed Sheeran expressed a wish at the time to officiate their nuptials.
Sheeran revealed a few years ago that he pranks the Friends star every time he goes to her house, ordering gimp masks on her Amazon Alexa device each time she is out of the room.
“Unbeknownst to me, Courteney’s assistant found it,” he told The Late Late Show with James Corden in 2021. “She opened the post and she finds this mask and instantly goes, ‘Oh, I don’t think I was meant to see that’ and leaves it on Courteney’s bed. And Courteney comes up, and she’s like, ‘Where did this come from?’”
He added: “Anyway, she found out the story, and now every time I go back there, I order her another gimp mask. And she has maybe 12, and then, I hide them in people’s bedrooms. So they’ll go in a drawer, and they’ll just find this leather S&M mask.”
Elsewhere, Snow Patrol are in the middle of a UK and Ireland tour, which includes a huge show at London’s Crystal Palace Park on July 3. You can find any remaining tickets here.

title: Want more innovation? Stronger trade secret laws help
description: The conversation around intellectual property (IP) is typically dominated by patents and copyright, but there is one often overlooked pillar: trade secrets.Trade secrets represent over US$5 trillion in value and roughly two-thirds of all intangible assets in the United States alone. They are also, by definition, invisible. A study Colleen Cunningham and I recently published in Management Science provides rare, granular evidence on how firms manage confidential information in high-stakes environments.Our findings suggest that stronger trade secret protection can induce firms to innovate even when no registered IP, like patents, is claimed. What’s more, it can spur firms to share innovations with other companies.A quasi-natural experiment in the oil patchManagers face a persistent dilemma that can be called a “knowledge leakage trap”: The more valuable an innovation is, the riskier it may be to use, because deploying a new process or recipe requires sharing it with employees, contractors or partners who may eventually take that knowledge to a competitor. One CEO we interviewed put it bluntly: “Our trade secrets are constantly getting passed around.”This fear results in firms holding back their most advanced inventions. The problem is particularly acute in sectors where employee mobility and uneven bargaining power between partners are common. Besides oil and gas, such sectors include chemical, cosmetic and food products, semiconductors, and advanced manufacturing.Our study looks at over 47,000 hydraulic fracturing wells in the US between 2014 and 2018. In certain US states, stringent regulations require firms to disclose the chemical ingredients in their fracturing fluids unless those ingredients are substantiated trade secrets. This creates rare documentation of actual trade secret use at the level of individual wells.The Defend Trade Secrets Act of 2016 (DTSA) served as the external shock to trade secret protection for our study. This was the first US federal legislation to create a unified jurisdiction for trade secret cases in the country. Legal experts at the time described it as the most significant expansion of federal intellectual property law in at least 30 years. By comparing how firms in states with weaker pre-existing trade secret protections responded to the DTSA against those in states where protection was already stronger, we could isolate the effect of strong protection.We found that in states where the legal change represented the biggest shift – Arkansas, Louisiana and Pennsylvania – the proportion of wells using at least one trade secret ingredient rose by 22 percentage points after the DTSA came into force. The share of ingredients kept secret per well increased by 3.7 percentage points (from a baseline of 2.2%). Not only did firms introduce new secret ingredients at higher rates, but they also didn’t use fewer disclosed novel ingredients or reduce their patenting activity. Wells with trade secret ingredients produced, on average, 26% more oil and 6% more gas than those without.Perhaps the most counterintuitive finding was that firms ostensibly shared more secret information with other firms after the law changed, as measured by sourcing trade secrets from third parties. In other words, firms trusted that the legal environment would help protect them from leaks. The conventional assumption is that stronger trade secret protection means more hoarding. Our data suggest the opposite may be true.What this means for executivesSecrecy tends to work best where reverse engineering is difficult, when the pace of technological change is fast, and where patenting is not the automatic default. Chemical formulations, algorithms, manufacturing processes and production techniques all fit that profile.Also Read: How text and data drive the future of copyright in AIOur research also suggests that secrecy and patenting aren’t mutually exclusive. Increased trade secret use among the firms in our sample did not come at the cost of disclosed innovation. Instead, firms used more secrets and introduced more novel disclosed ingredients, and didn’t patent less.Treating secrecy as an afterthought to a patents-first strategy means leaving significant value unprotected and, in many cases, unused. In fact, rather than viewing trade secrets as a passive alternative to patents, executives can use them as a catalyst for experimentation and competitive advantage.Our study suggests several ways to do so:Leverage trade secrecy in high-leakage environments: Stronger legal frameworks like the DTSA allow firms to increase trade secret use, particularly in regions where non-compete enforcement is low or competition is stiff. The European Union’s Trade Secrets Directive serves a similar purpose.Prioritise secrecy for "complex recipes": Inventions that involve a combination of ingredients or processes – which are harder to reverse engineer but valuable and hence tempting for a partner to misappropriate – benefit most from trade secret protection.Secrecy as a catalyst: Managers should exploit legal protections to move innovations out of the lab and into real-world applications where they can reap immediate ROI. Contrast this with patenting, where approval could take years. To a large extent, this is why firms in the business of fast-moving technologies such as software have relied heavily on secrecy and trade secret protection. An example is the recent pivot by Alphabet’s DeepMind to more secretive measures.Complement patenting with secrecy: Secrecy doesn't have to replace patenting or other types of disclosures. In fact, we found that firms often increased their use of both disclosed and secret novel inputs post-DTSA. This suggests that a robust secrecy strategy can enhance a firm’s broader innovation portfolio.A book chapter I recently co-wrote provides further detailed advice to managers on how to create and capture value from their business secrets.Secrecy and openness can complement each otherPrior research has suggested that stronger reliance on secrecy could dampen the flow of knowledge that feeds invention, leading to fewer patents filed and less disclosures for rivals to build on. Our findings suggest that the picture is more nuanced.What we observed was more experimentation, not less. Bolstered by stronger legal protection, firms deployed novel recipes, sourced more broadly, disclosed new inputs more, and didn’t retreat from patenting. Secrecy and openness, it turns out, are not as opposed as one might think.

title: ପାନ ଦୋକାନୀଙ୍କୁ ହତ୍ୟା ଉଦ୍ୟମ ଘଟଣା: ଅଭିଯୁକ୍ତଙ୍କୁ ବାନ୍ଧିଲା ପୋଲିସ
description:
ଦିଗପହଣ୍ଡି,୨୯।୬(ଅଶେଷ ନାଥ ମିଶ୍ର): ଗଞ୍ଜାମ ଜିଲା ଦିଗପହଣ୍ଡି ବ୍ଲକ ଆଙ୍କୋରଡ଼ା ଗାଁ ଛକରେ ପାନ ଦୋକାନ କରିଥିବା ରୁଦ୍ର ପ୍ରଧାନ ଏବଂ ତାଙ୍କ ବାପା ସଞ୍ଜୟ ପ୍ରଧାନଙ୍କୁ ଛୁରିରେ ଭୁଷି ହତ୍ୟା ଉଦ୍ୟମ କରିଥିବା ଚୁଡୁଙ୍ଗପୁର ଗ୍ରାମର ବି. କୃଷ୍ଣ ପାତ୍ର ଓରଫ ଗୋପୀ(୨୮) ଏବଂ ବି. ଉମା ପାତ୍ରଙ୍କୁ ସୋମବାର ଦିଗପହଣ୍ଡି ପୋଲିସ ଗିରଫ କରି କୋର୍ଟ ଚାଲାଣ କରିଛନ୍ତି। ଥାନା ମାମଲା ନଂ.୨୬୯/୨୬ ଭାରତୀୟ ନ୍ୟାୟ ସଂହିତା ର ଦଫା – ୩୨୯(୪)/୨୯୬/୧୧୫/୧୧୮(୧)/୧୧୭(୨)/୧୦୯/୩୦୩(୨)/୩୫୧(୨)/୩(୫) ଅନୁଯାୟୀ, […]
The post ପାନ ଦୋକାନୀଙ୍କୁ ହତ୍ୟା ଉଦ୍ୟମ ଘଟଣା: ଅଭିଯୁକ୍ତଙ୍କୁ ବାନ୍ଧିଲା ପୋଲିସ appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.

title: Unclaimed insurance money in India: How to check if you have insurance funds waiting to be claimed
బెల్ట్ షాపుల అక్రమాలపై ఎక్సైజ్ అధికారులకు వినతిపత్రం
description: Talari Rangaiah YSRCP: కళ్యాణదుర్గం నియోజకవర్గవ్యాప్తంగా అధికార కూటమి పార్టీ అండదండలతో బెల్ట్ షాపులు విచ్చలవిడిగా వెలిసాయోని, మద్యం విక్రయాల పేరుతో జరుగుతున్న భారీ అక్రమ వసూళ్లను...
content:
Talari Rangaiah YSRCP: కళ్యాణదుర్గం నియోజకవర్గవ్యాప్తంగా అధికార కూటమి పార్టీ అండదండలతో బెల్ట్ షాపులు విచ్చలవిడిగా వెలిసాయోని, మద్యం విక్రయాల పేరుతో జరుగుతున్న భారీ అక్రమ వసూళ్లను తక్షణమే అరికట్టి బాధ్యులపై కఠిన చర్యలు తీసుకోవాలని మాజీ ఎంపీ, వైఎస్సార్ కాంగ్రెస్ పార్టీ (YSRCP) నియోజకవర్గ సమన్వయకర్త తలారి రంగయ్య డిమాండ్ చేశారు. నియోజకవర్గంలో సమాంతర మద్యం మాఫియా నడుస్తోందని ఆయన ఆరోపించారు. సోమవారం నాడు కళ్యాణదుర్గం పట్టణంలోని ఎక్సైజ్ పోలీస్ స్టేషన్‌కు పార్టీ ముఖ్య నాయకులు, కార్యకర్తలతో కలిసి భారీ ర్యాలీగా వెళ్లిన తలారి రంగయ్య.. బెల్ట్ షాపుల అక్రమాలపై ఎక్సైజ్ సీఐకి (Excise CI) అధికారిక వినతిపత్రం సమర్పించారు.



ఈ సందర్భంగా మాజీ ఎంపీ తలారి రంగయ్య ప్రెస్ మీట్‌లో మాట్లాడుతూ.. నియోజకవర్గ పరిధిలో ఎక్సైజ్ చట్టాలను తుంగలో తొక్కి ఏకంగా 372 బెల్ట్ షాపులను యథేచ్ఛగా నిర్వహిస్తున్నారని గణాంకాలతో సహా వెల్లడించారు.



Read also: Bhogapuram Airport Updates: త్వరలోనే భోగాపురం ఎయిర్‌పోర్ట్‌ ప్రారంభం.. తేదీపై కలెక్టర్ కీలక ప్రకటన



ఎమ్మెల్యే అమిలినేనికి అక్రమ సొమ్ము – తలారి రంగయ్య సంచలన ఆరోపణ



మద్యం కొనుగోలు చేసే సామాన్య ప్రజల నుండి, కూలీల నుండి ప్రతి బాటిల్ పైనా నిబంధనలకు విరుద్ధంగా అదనపు వసూళ్లు (Maddening JLT Rates) చేస్తున్నారని తలారి రంగయ్య ఆరోపించారు. ఈ 372 బెల్ట్ షాపుల ద్వారా ప్రతిరోజూ వసూలవుతున్న లక్షలాది రూపాయల అక్రమ సొమ్ము నేరుగా స్థానిక కూటమి ఎమ్మెల్యే అమిలినేని సురేంద్ర బాబుకే చేరుతోందని ఆయన సంచలన ఆరోపణ చేశారు. అధికార బలాన్ని అడ్డం పెట్టుకుని నియోజకవర్గంలో ప్రభుత్వ మద్యం వ్యవస్థకు సమాంతరంగా ప్రైవేట్ మద్యం సామ్రాజ్యాన్ని నడుపుతున్నారని దుయ్యబట్టారు. ఈ దందా వల్ల గ్రామీణ ప్రాంతాల్లో శాంతిభద్రతలకు విఘాతం కలగడమే కాకుండా, పేద కుటుంబాలు రోడ్డున పడుతున్నాయని ఆవేదన వ్యక్తం చేశారు.



Talari Rangaiah YSRCP: స్పందించకుంటే గవర్నర్, రాష్ట్రపతికి ఫిర్యాదు – వైఎస్సార్సీపీ హెచ్చరిక



నియోజకవర్గంలో బహిరంగంగా సాగుతున్న ఈ బెల్ట్ షాపుల అక్రమ వసూళ్లపై ఎక్సైజ్ మరియు ఉత్పాదక శాఖ అధికారులు తక్షణమే స్పందించాలని రంగయ్య డిమాండ్ చేశారు. ఉన్నతాధికారుల నేతృత్వంలో సమగ్ర విచారణ జరిపి, బెల్ట్ షాపులను రద్దు చేయడంతో పాటు వెనుక ఉన్న సూత్రధారులపై క్రిమినల్ కేసులు నమోదు చేయాలన్నారు. అధికారులు గనుక ఒత్తిళ్లకు లొంగి నిర్లక్ష్యం వహిస్తే వైఎస్సార్సీపీ ఆధ్వర్యంలో నియోజకవర్గవ్యాప్తంగా పెద్దఎత్తున ఆందోళన కార్యక్రమాలు, రాస్తారోకోలు చేపడతామని హెచ్చరించారు. అవసరమైతే ఈ వ్యవహారంపై రాష్ట్ర గవర్నర్‌తో పాటు భారత రాష్ట్రపతికి కూడా సమగ్ర నివేదికలతో వినతి పత్రాలు అందజేస్తామని స్పష్టం చేశారు.



కళ్యాణదుర్గంలో రాజకీయ వేడి పెంచిన ఈ కార్యక్రమంలో వైఎస్సార్సీపీ రాష్ట్ర కార్యదర్శి బోయ తిప్పేస్వామి, రాష్ట్ర సంయుక్త కార్యదర్శులు దొడగట్ట నారాయణ, ములకనూరు తిమ్మరాయుడు పాల్గొన్నారు. అలాగే లీగల్ సెల్ జిల్లా ఉపాధ్యక్షుడు హనుమంతరెడ్డి, నియోజకవర్గ పరిధిలోని ఐదు మండలాల పార్టీ కన్వీనర్లు, జెడ్పీటీసీలు, ఎంపీపీలు, అనుబంధ సంఘాల నాయకులు మరియు వందలాది మంది వైఎస్సార్సీపీ కార్యకర్తలు పాల్గొన్నారు.

title: India leads major democracies in electoral transparency: CEC
description:
Srinagar, Jun 29: Chief Election Commissioner Gyanesh Kumar on Monday said India was leading the world's major democracies with a transparent electoral process in which every stage of the exercise is audited by the political parties and candidates.
"We discussed the components of the world's most transparent electoral process --” preparation of the voter list, polling and counting. These are concurrently audited by all political parties and candidates," Kumar, who is on a three-day visit to Kashmir, told reporters here.
Earlier in the day, Kumar addressed a gathering of booth-level officers (BLOs) in Budgam district, about 12 km from Srinagar.
He said India currently holds the chair of International Institute for Democracy and Electoral Assistance (International IDEA), an intergovernmental organisation that supports sustainable democracy worldwide.
"Seeing this process of Indian elections, in 2026 Bharat is currently leading all the large democratic countries of the world, and is also the chairperson of International IDEA," he said.
The Chief Election Commissioner described BLOs as the pillars of democracy.
"Once again, through all of you, my greetings to all the voters of Jammu & Kashmir, and greetings to all BLOs, BLO supervisors, AEROs, EROs, and DEOs," he added.

ఇక పదో తరగతిలో ఫెయిల్ ఉండదు.. సర్కార్ సరికొత్త ప్లాన్!
description: Telangana SSC Results:తెలంగాణలో పదో తరగతి చదివే విద్యార్థులకు ఇది శుభవార్త. విద్యాశాఖ తాజా గణాంకాల ప్రకారం తెలంగాణ టెన్త్ క్లాసు పాస్ పెర్సెంటేజ్ 2026 రికార్డు...
content:
Telangana SSC Results:తెలంగాణలో పదో తరగతి చదివే విద్యార్థులకు ఇది శుభవార్త. విద్యాశాఖ తాజా గణాంకాల ప్రకారం తెలంగాణ టెన్త్ క్లాసు పాస్ పెర్సెంటేజ్ 2026 రికార్డు స్థాయిలో 99.10 శాతానికి చేరింది. మార్చి పరీక్షలు మరియు సప్లిమెంటరీ ఫలితాల తర్వాత ఉత్తీర్ణత శాతం గణనీయంగా పెరిగింది. చదువులో వెనుకబడిన విద్యార్థులు కూడా పైచదువులకు వెళ్లేలా అధికారులు ప్రత్యేక ప్రణాళిక సిద్ధం చేశారు. పరీక్షల్లో ఉత్తీర్ణత సాధించని విద్యార్థుల భవిష్యత్తును దృష్టిలో ఉంచుకొని విద్యాశాఖ కీలక నిర్ణయం తీసుకుంది. ఎవరూ చదువుకు దూరం కాకూడదనే ఉద్దేశంతో సర్కార్ సరికొత్త మార్గాలను అన్వేషిస్తోంది

TOSS ద్వారా విద్యార్థులకు కొత్త అవకాశం



సప్లిమెంటరీ పరీక్షలు రాసిన తర్వాత కూడా ఫెయిల్ అయిన విద్యార్థులకు ఇప్పుడు తెలంగాణ సార్వత్రిక విద్యాపీఠం ద్వారా మరో అవకాశం కల్పిస్తున్నారు. ఇలా ఫెయిల్ అయిన వారందరినీ TOSS ద్వారా పరీక్షలు రాయించి ఉత్తీర్ణులు చేయాలని అధికారులు భావిస్తున్నారు. దీనివల్ల పదో తరగతి ఫెయిల్ అయిన విద్యార్థులు కూడా అదే ఏడాది ఇంటర్మీడియట్ కోర్సుల్లో ప్రవేశం పొందే వీలుంటుంది. పరీక్షల్లో మినహాయింపు సబ్జెక్టుల సంఖ్యను పెంచడం ద్వారా విద్యార్థులపై ఒత్తిడి తగ్గించాలని విద్యాశాఖ యోచిస్తోంది. ప్రభుత్వం ఈ ప్రతిపాదనలకు ఆమోదం తెలిపితే వంద శాతం ఉత్తీర్ణత లక్ష్యం సులభంగా నెరవేరుతుంది.



Telangana SSC Results:వచ్చే ఏడాది నుంచి ఫెయిల్ అయ్యే విద్యార్థులు ఉండరు



రాష్ట్రవ్యాప్తంగా పాఠశాల విద్యాశాఖ గణాంకాల ప్రకారం సుమారు 5.12 లక్షల మంది విద్యార్థులు పదో తరగతి ఉత్తీర్ణులయ్యారు. ఇప్పటికీ కొందరు విద్యార్థులు కొన్ని సబ్జెక్టుల్లో వెనుకబడి ఉన్నా వారికోసం ప్రత్యేక తరగతులు నిర్వహించనున్నారు. రాబోయే ఒకటి లేదా రెండేళ్లలో ఫెయిల్ అనే పదం లేకుండా పూర్తి స్థాయిలో అక్షరాస్యత సాధించడమే లక్ష్యంగా విద్యాశాఖ పనిచేస్తోంది. విద్యార్థులు భయం వీడి కష్టపడితే ఉన్నత విద్యకు ఏ అడ్డంకి ఉండదని నిపుణులు సూచిస్తున్నారు. పరీక్షలు రాసి పాస్ అవ్వడం ద్వారా మీ భవిష్యత్తుకు చక్కని పునాది వేసుకోండి.

title: Woman BSF constable found hanging inside Jammu camp
description:
Jammu, Jun 29: A young woman constable of the Border Security Force (BSF) was found hanging in her room at the force's frontier headquarters here on Monday, officials said.
The deceased, Constable Bishnu Priya Roy, was undergoing a three-month Lab Assistant Course that began on May 25 and was staying in accommodation allotted to her at the Command Hospital inside the BSF frontier headquarters in the Paloura area on the outskirts of the city, they said.
Roy was found hanging from a ceiling fan with a rope. Her body was shifted to a hospital for post-mortem examination.
The cause of death is yet to be ascertained. Police have initiated inquest proceedings and further investigation is underway.

title: কইনাধৰা শাখা সাহিত্য সভাৰ কৃতি ছাত্ৰ-ছাত্ৰীৰ অভিনন্দন অনুষ্ঠান
description:
ডিজিটেল সংবাদ, গুৱাহাটী : কইনাধৰা  শাখা সাহিত্য সভাৰ উদ্যোগত কইনাধৰাস্থিত ৰতিকান্ত তালুকদাৰ সোঁৱৰণী মঞ্চত দেওবাৰে বৃহত্তৰ কইনাধৰা অঞ্চলৰ সদ্যঘোষিত উচ্চ মাধ্যমিক আৰু উচ্চতৰ মাধ্যমিকত সুখ্যাতিৰে উত্তীৰ্ণ ২৭ গৰাকী ছাত্ৰ-ছাত্ৰীক সম্বৰ্দ্ধনা জনোৱা হয়। শাখা সাহিত্য সভাৰ সভাপতি তথা সাহিত্যিক- বিজ্ঞানী ড০ অৰুণ শৰ্মাৰ সভাপতিত্বত অনুষ্ঠিত সভাৰ উদ্দেশ্য ব্যাখ্যা কৰে সভাৰ সম্পাদক বাসৱ কলিতাই।  
অসম পশু চিকিৎসা বিজ্ঞান মহাবিদ্যালয়ৰ অৱসৰী অধ্যাপক ড০ মিনেশ্বৰ হাজৰিকাই নিৰ্দিষ্ট বক্তাৰ ভাষণত বিদ্যাৰ্থী উপযোগী বক্তব্য দাঙি ধৰে। কামৰূপ মহানগৰ জিলা সাহিত্য সভাৰ সভাপতি  প্ৰফুল্ল বৰ্মণ আৰু সম্পাদক অৰুণ কুমাৰ মহন্তই বিশিষ্ট অতিথিৰ বক্তব্য প্ৰদান কৰে।
সভাত সাংস্কৃতিক মহাসভা, অসমৰ সভাপতি পবিত্ৰ কুমাৰ শৰ্মা, কইনাধৰা উন্নয়ণ সমিতিৰ সম্পাদক চন্দ্ৰধৰ কলিতা, যোগগুৰু গীৰিধৰ বৈশ্য, অনিল ডেকা, পংকজ লহকৰ আৰু চন্দ্ৰধৰ কলিতাই এষাৰকৈ কয়। সভাৰ উপ-সভাপতি খগেন লাল দাসে আঁত ধৰা সভাত সুমন কুকি কাশ্যপ, মলয়া ডেকা, নৰ্মদা ডেকাই গীত-কবিতা পৰিবেশন কৰে।
সভাপতি ড০ অৰুণ শৰ্মাই গভীৰ বিশ্লেষণাত্মক ভাষণত কয় - "অভিযন্তা-চিকিৎসতকৈ  সৎ নাগৰিক হোৱাৰ সপোন  দেখিব লাগে। ম'বাইলৰ ব্যৱহাৰ অতি সাৱধানেৰে কৰিব লাগে। শিক্ষা গ্ৰহণ কৰি পিতৃ-মাতৃক স্বদেশত এৰি পাহৰি যাব নালাগে। বৃদ্ধাশ্ৰম বৃদ্ধি পোৱাটো পৰিতাপৰ বিষয়। এজন সৰ্বাংগসুন্দৰ অসম গঢ়াৰ সপোন এই শতিকাৰ ছাত্ৰ-ছাত্ৰীয়ে দেখিব লাগে।"

title: নগাঁও শিক্ষা বিষয়াৰ কাৰ্যালয়ত উপস্থিত বিদ্যালয় শিক্ষা বিভাগৰ সচিব কৃষ্ণা বৰুৱা
description:
ডিজিটেল সংবাদ, নগাওঁঃ  নগাঁও জিলাৰ শিক্ষা বিভাগত সংঘটিত হোৱা এক বৃহৎ দুৰ্নীতিৰ তদন্তৰ বাবে নগাঁও সংমণ্ডলৰ বিদ্যালয়সমূহৰ পৰিদৰ্শকৰ কাৰ্যালয়ত উপস্থিত হয় বিদ্যালয়  শিক্ষা বিভাগৰ সচিব কৃষ্ণা বৰুৱা। জিলাখনত একাংশ ব্যক্তিগত খণ্ডৰ শিক্ষানুষ্ঠানৰ পঞ্জীয়ন,ডাইচ ক'ড  আৰু ছেবা ক'ড আবণ্টনৰ নামত দীৰ্ঘদিন ধৰি চলি অহা অনিয়ম আৰু দুৰ্নীতিৰ বিৰুদ্ধে ৰাজ্যৰ শিক্ষামন্ত্ৰী ডাঃ ৰণোজ পেগুৱে এক উচ্চস্তৰীয় তদন্ত ঘোষণা কৰাৰ পাছতেই এই তৎপৰতা পৰিলক্ষিত হৈছে।
শিক্ষামন্ত্ৰীৰ নিৰ্দেশ মৰ্মে বিদ্যালয় শিক্ষা সচিব কৃষ্ণা বৰুৱাই নগাঁও জিলা শিক্ষা বিষয়াৰ কাৰ্যালয়ত উপস্থিত হৈ আনুষ্ঠানিকভাৱে এই স্পৰ্শকাতৰ বিষয়টোৰ তদন্ত প্ৰক্ৰিয়া আৰম্ভ কৰে।কাৰ্যালয়ত উপস্থিত হৈ তদন্তকাৰী জ্যেষ্ঠ বিষয়াগৰাকীয়ে নগাঁও জিলাৰ বিদ্যালয়সমূহৰ পৰিদৰ্শক মৃদুল কুমাৰ নাথৰ সৈতে প্ৰায় দুই ঘণ্টাজোৰা এক দীঘলীয়া আলোচনাত মিলিত হয়। এই বৈঠকত ভুৱা শিক্ষানুষ্ঠানক নিয়মবহিৰ্ভূতভাৱে ডাইচ ক'ড আৰু অনুমতি প্ৰদান কৰাৰ অভিযোগ সন্দৰ্ভত তথ্য সংগ্ৰহ কৰা হয়।
আনফালে,বিভাগীয় দুৰ্নীতিৰ সৈতে জড়িত থকাৰ সন্দেহ থকা কেবাখনো ফাইল আৰু গুৰুত্বপূৰ্ণ নথি-পত্ৰ তদন্তকাৰী বিষয়াই নিজৰ জিম্মাত লৈ পৰীক্ষা কৰে। লগতে তদন্ত কাৰ্যসূচীৰ মাজতে সংবাদ মাধ্যমৰ মুখামুখি হৈ বিদ্যালয় শিক্ষা সচিব কৃষ্ণা বৰুৱাই  মন্তব্য প্ৰদান কৰি কয় যে- "অভিযোগসমূহৰ সত্যতা নিৰূপণৰ বাবে সকলো নথি-পত্ৰ আৰু তথ্য বিতংভাৱে পৰ্যবেক্ষণ কৰা হৈছে। এই তদন্ত প্ৰক্ৰিয়া সম্পূৰ্ণ হোৱাৰ পাছতহে কেলেংকাৰীৰ প্ৰকৃত তথ্য আৰু ইয়াৰ আঁৰত কোন কোন বিষয়া-কৰ্মচাৰী জড়িত আছে, সেয়া স্পষ্টকৈ পোহৰলৈ আহিব।"
উল্লেখ্য যে, কোনো ধৰণৰ আন্তঃগাঁথনি বা চৰকাৰী নিয়ম নীতি নথকাকৈয়ে একাংশ ব্যক্তিগত শিক্ষানুষ্ঠানে ধনৰ বিনিময়ত ডাইচ ক'ড আৰু ছেবাৰ স্বীকৃতি লাভ কৰাৰ গুৰুতৰ অভিযোগ উত্থাপন হৈছিল। এই তদন্তই নগাঁও জিলা শিক্ষা বিভাগৰ ভিতৰচ’ৰাত চলি থকা এক ডাঙৰ দালাল চক্ৰ ফাদিল কৰিব বুলি এতিয়া সচেতন মহলে আশা প্ৰকাশ কৰিছে।

title: US-Iran Confusion Deepens: Trump Announces Doha Meet, Tehran Denies Any Plan
description: Trump announced imminent Doha talks with Iran, but Tehran denied any plan for meetings.
content: United States President Donald Trump claimed Iran has requested a meeting in Doha scheduled for tomorrow, but Tehran quickly denied any such plan, exposing a sharp contradiction amid ongoing tensions and backchannel diplomacy. This comes amid heightened tensions following recent incidents in the Strait of Hormuz."IRAN HAS REQUESTED A MEETING. IT WILL TAKE PLACE TOMORROW IN DOHA!" Trump posted on his social media platform, Truth Social. However, Iran's Deputy Foreign Minister Kazem Gharibabadi said earlier today that there are currently no intentions of holding meetings with US officials from the "technical teams" in Qatar this week."Although consultations with Qatar – including on following up on the implementation of the other party’s commitments – are ongoing as usual the news from some media outlets that technical talks by the working groups will be held in Doha cannot be confirmed," Iran's Deputy Foreign Minister Gharibabadi was quoted by the Tasnim news agency as saying."The first round of technical talks within the framework of the designated working groups will be held when conditions are met, and after an agreement is reached on the date and location. Consultations in this regard are continuing through intermediary countries," he added.Earlier, several media outlets, including Al Jazeera, reported the US-Iran talks are expected to take place in the Qatari capital Doha on Tuesday.This comes after after the US and Iran agreed to stop attacking one another following a tit-for-tat weekend strikes that threatened to derail the fragile ceasefire.A senior US official told Axios that both countries have "decided to stop all the kinetic activity," using military terminology that refers to strikes and other attacks. A second U.S. official confirmed that both sides will stand down "for now," adding that vessels can move freely through the strait while technical discussions continue. Meanwhile, Iran’s president said Monday that $6 billion in frozen Iranian assets would be released by Qatar.

title: German economist who correctly predicted winner of last three FIFA World Cups makes shocking prediction for Japan vs Brazil game
description: Brazil, the 5-time World Champions, will face Japan in the Round of 32 stage of the FIFA World Cup 2026 tonight. The Selecao will enter as the favourites but an interesting prediction about the match has spiced up things.
content: The Round of 32 stage of the FIFA World Cup 2026 has been set into motion on Sunday with Canada vs South Africa. The game saw co-hosts Canada find the back of the net in the dying minutes of the game to progress to the last 16. The knockout stage will get even more intense on Monday as 5-time champion and arguably the biggest heavyweight in the history of the game, Brazil, will be in action. The Selecao will compete against Japan, who showcased a phenomenal performance during the group stage.Do you know Cristiano Ronaldo once survived a scary car crash?German economist predicts Japan's victory over Brazil Given the pedigree they hold and firepower they possess, Carlo Ancelotti's superstar-filled Brazil will walk into the game as considerable favourites. However, Japan are renowned for pulling off notable upsets. They defeated Germany in the previous edition of the FIFA World Cup in 2022 and got the better of Colombia in the iteration before that. And if one were to believe a startling prediction, they are going to victimise Brazil this time.According to a German economist, Joachim Klement, Japan will eliminate Brazil in the FIFA World Cup 2026. Klement shared this projection of his before the start of the World Cup, and since these two teams are set to lock horns in the Round of 32, Klement is getting all the attention. While fans may have overlooked this prediction at first glance, Klement's impressive resume forces one to contemplate it. For the unversed, Joachim Klement correctly predicted the winner of the last three World Cups.Thus, all eyes would be on tonight's Japan vs Germany encounter. When it comes to the winner of the competition, Klement has picked the Netherlands to go all the way and lift their maiden trophy.When asked about his ability to make apt predictions, Klement completely downplayed the prowess and described it as irrational, like playing the lottery."It's completely irrational," he said. "It's like playing the lottery. I always say that if anyone places a bet based on my prediction of who will be the next world champion, they're beyond help," as quoted by ESPN."It's like tossing a coin. You might predict that the coin will land on heads four times in a row rather than tails, and that might well happen. But that doesn't guarantee it will happen again next time."The Netherlands have reached a record three World Cup finals but have never won the tournament.FIFA World Cup 2026: List of teams qualified for Round of 32, eliminated teams, knockout schedule and key matchups

title: Beware! AI-generated deepfake shows PM Modi endorsing fraudulent investment platform - PIB fact check
description: PIB fact check: ​​The manipulated video claims that investing just Rs 21,000 can generate an income of more than Rs 3.5 lakh. PIB Fact Check has confirmed that the video is completely fake and AI-generated.
content: PIB fact check: The Press Information Bureau’s Fact Check unit on Monday has issued a strong alert against a circulating deepfake video that falsely shows Prime Minister Narendra Modi promoting an investment platform promising unusually high returns.What did the video claimsThe manipulated video claims that investing just Rs 21,000 can generate an income of more than Rs 3.5 lakh. PIB Fact Check has confirmed that the video is completely fake and AI-generated. According to official statement, "Prime Minister Narendra Modi has not endorsed any such investment scheme, tool, or platform. The government has repeatedly warned citizens against get-rich-quick schemes that often turn out to be phishing or investment frauds."Also Read | Lenskart Block Deal: Rs 1944 crore share sale planned at 2.8% discount; Check detailsPIB’s advisory to publicDo not click on any links shared in such videos.Avoid sharing personal or financial information.Do not make any payments based on celebrity or leader endorsements circulating on social media.Rising threat of deepfakesThis incident adds to the growing list of deepfake videos targeting prominent Indian leaders. Authorities have urged citizens to verify information only through official government sources and report suspicious content immediately.How to report?WhatsApp: +91 87997 11259Email: factcheck@pib.gov.inFact Check: Govt debunks digitally altered video claiming Pakistan jammed India’s systems last yearThe government on Sunday has debunked a digitally altered video circulating on social media, which features Defence Secretary Rajesh Kumar Singh claiming that Pakistan jammed India’s systems on 10th May last year.In a social media post, the Fact Check Unit of the Press Information Bureau clarified that the video is an AI-generated deepfake video and is being circulated by Pakistani propaganda accounts to spread misinformation.The unit has also urged the citizens not to fall prey to such videos and report such suspicious content at 8799711259 or email factcheck@pib.gov.in.Also Read | Bajaj Auto Buyback: Record Rs 5633 crore buyback opens on July 1 - What investors need to know

title: সকলো ফিক্সপে'-ঠিকাভিত্তিক কৰ্মচাৰীৰ চাকৰি হ'ব নিয়মীয়া...
description:
ডিজিটেল সংবাদ, ওদালগুৰি : সোমবাৰে ওদালগুৰি জিলা আয়ুক্তৰ সভাকক্ষত দিনৰ প্ৰায় ১১-০০ বজাত বিটিচিৰ মুখ্য কাৰ্যবাহী সদস্য হাগ্ৰামা মহিলাৰীৰ উপস্থিতিত অনুষ্ঠিত হয় বিভাগীয় পৰ্যালোচনা সভা। সভাখনত ২০২৪-২৫ আৰু ২০২৫-২৬ বিত্তীয় বৰ্ষত বিটিচিৰ লোকনিৰ্মাণ বিভাগ,পঞ্চায়ত-গ্ৰামোন্নয়ণ বিভাগ আৰু নগৰ উন্নয়ণ বিভাগৰ অন্তৰ্গত বিভিন্ন আঁচনিৰ লগতে উন্নয়ণমূলক কামৰ বুজ লয় মহিলাৰীয়ে।
সাংবাদিকৰ সন্মুখত মন্তব্য কৰি মহিলাৰীয়ে কয়, বিগত বৰ্ষবোৰত প্ৰমোদ বড়োৰ চৰকাৰৰ সময়চোৱাত অসম চৰকাৰে বিটিচিক বহুতো কাম দিছিল। সেই কামসমূহ কি পৰ্যায়ত আছে বা কিমান উন্নয়ণ হৈছে তাৰ বুজ ল'বলৈ আহিছো।
প্ৰমোদ বড়োৰ দিনত ভিচিডিচিৰ সচিব আৰু বন বিভাগৰ লগতে কিছু চাকৰি দিয়া হৈছিল। সেই চাকৰিসমূহ নিয়ম অনুসৰি দিয়া হৈছিলনে? যদি নিয়ম অনুসৰি চাকৰি দিছে তেন্তে আমাৰ ক'বলগীয়া নাই। কিন্তু বিত্ত বিভাগৰ অনুমোদন নোহোৱা পদত নিযুক্তি দিয়া বাবেই আজি পৰ্যন্ত দৰমহা বন্ধ হৈ আছে। গতিকে চাকৰিসমূহ আইনগতভাৱে দিয়া হৈছে নে নাই আমি চাই আছো।
যদি বৈধভাৱে চাকৰি প্ৰদান কৰিছিল তেন্তে চাকৰি থাকিব আৰু অবৈধভাৱে যদি চাকৰি লাভ কৰিছিল তেন্তে সেই চাকৰি নাপাব। আনহাতে বড়োলেণ্ড গেষ্ট হাউচকে ধৰি বিভিন্ন বিভাগবোৰত ঠিকাভিত্তিক চাকৰি কৰি থকা কৰ্মচাৰীসকলৰ চাকৰি নিয়মীয়াকৰণ অহা মাৰ্চ মাহৰ ভিতৰত কৰা হ'ব বুলি তেওঁ ঘোষণা কৰে।
বিটিচিৰ ৰাইজৰ লগত ম‌ই কথা আলোচনা কৰিছো। বহুত আঁচনি হাতত লৈছো। বিটিচিৰ কামহে হ'ব লাগে, কেইজন মন্ত্ৰী লাভ কৰে নকৰে সেয়া ডাঙৰ কথা নহয়। বৰ্তমান আমাৰ চৰকাৰ ৯ মাহে হৈছে। অহা ২০ বছৰ আমাৰ চৰকাৰ থাকিব। ইফালে বিভিন্ন পক্ষ‌ই কৰা বড়োলেণ্ড দাবী সন্দৰ্ভত মহিলাৰীয়ে কয়, বড়োলেণ্ড কাক নালাগে? পালে মোকো বড়োলেণ্ড লাগে। ম‌ই বড়োলেণ্ড নালাগে বুলি কোৱা নাই।  
গতিকে কোনোৱাই বড়োলেণ্ড দিলে মোকো বড়োলেণ্ড লাগে। ম‌ইও বড়োলেণ্ডত থাকিম বুলি মহিলাৰী মন্তব্য কৰে। আজিৰ এই সভাত মন্ত্ৰী চৰণ বড়ো, ই‌এম ফ্ৰেচ মোচাহাৰীৰ লগতে কেইৱাগৰাকীও এমচিএল‌এ আৰু বিভাগীয় বিষয়াসকল উপস্থিত থাকে।

title: ଝରାଫୁଲ ହତ୍ୟା ଘଟଣା: ୫ ବର୍ଷ ପରେ ଅଭିଯୁକ୍ତଙ୍କୁ ମିଳିଲା ଏମିତି ଦଣ୍ଡ
description:
ଭୁବନେଶ୍ୱର,୨୯।୬: ବହୁଚର୍ଚ୍ଚିତ ଝରାଫୁଲ ହତ୍ୟାକାଣ୍ଡ ଘଟଣାର ରାୟ ଆସିଛି। ଦୋଷୀ ରାକେଶ ସ୍ବାଇଁଙ୍କୁ ଆଜୀବନ କାରାଦଣ୍ଡ ଦିଆଯାଇଛି। ଏହାସହ ରାକେଶଙ୍କ ସହଯୋଗୀ ଅମରେଶ ରାଉତକୁ ୫ ବର୍ଷ ଜେଲ୍‌ ଦଣ୍ଡ ଦିଆଯାଇଛି। ଏହି ରାୟ ଶୁଣାଇଛନ୍ତି ଯାଜପୁର ଅତିରିକ୍ତ ଜିଲା ଜଜ। ସୂଚନାଯୋଗ୍ୟ, ରମାଦେବୀ ବିଶ୍ୱବିଦ୍ୟାଳୟ ଛାତ୍ରୀ ଝରାଫୁଲ ନାୟକଙ୍କୁ ଭୁବନେଶ୍ୱରରେ ହତ୍ୟା କରିବା ପରେ ସ୍କୁଟିରେ ନେଇ ଯାଜପୁରରେ ଫିଙ୍ଗି ଦେଇଥିଲେ ଅଭିଯୁକ୍ତ । ମୁଖ୍ୟ ଅଭିଯୁକ୍ତ ରାକେଶ ସ୍ବାଇଁକୁ ଭୁବନେଶ୍ୱରରୁ ପୋଲିସ ଗିରଫ କରିବା […]
The post ଝରାଫୁଲ ହତ୍ୟା ଘଟଣା: ୫ ବର୍ଷ ପରେ ଅଭିଯୁକ୍ତଙ୍କୁ ମିଳିଲା ଏମିତି ଦଣ୍ଡ appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.
content:
ଭୁବନେଶ୍ୱର,୨୯।୬: ବହୁଚର୍ଚ୍ଚିତ ଝରାଫୁଲ ହତ୍ୟାକାଣ୍ଡ ଘଟଣାର ରାୟ ଆସିଛି। ଦୋଷୀ ରାକେଶ ସ୍ବାଇଁଙ୍କୁ ଆଜୀବନ କାରାଦଣ୍ଡ ଦିଆଯାଇଛି। ଏହାସହ ରାକେଶଙ୍କ ସହଯୋଗୀ ଅମରେଶ ରାଉତକୁ ୫ ବର୍ଷ ଜେଲ୍‌ ଦଣ୍ଡ ଦିଆଯାଇଛି। ଏହି ରାୟ ଶୁଣାଇଛନ୍ତି ଯାଜପୁର ଅତିରିକ୍ତ ଜିଲା ଜଜ।
ସୂଚନାଯୋଗ୍ୟ, ରମାଦେବୀ ବିଶ୍ୱବିଦ୍ୟାଳୟ ଛାତ୍ରୀ ଝରାଫୁଲ ନାୟକଙ୍କୁ ଭୁବନେଶ୍ୱରରେ ହତ୍ୟା କରିବା ପରେ ସ୍କୁଟିରେ ନେଇ ଯାଜପୁରରେ ଫିଙ୍ଗି ଦେଇଥିଲେ ଅଭିଯୁକ୍ତ । ମୁଖ୍ୟ ଅଭିଯୁକ୍ତ ରାକେଶ ସ୍ବାଇଁକୁ ଭୁବନେଶ୍ୱରରୁ ପୋଲିସ ଗିରଫ କରିବା ପରେ ଝରାଫୁଲଙ୍କ ମର୍ଡର ମିଷ୍ଟ୍ରି ଉପରୁ ଧୀରେ ଧୀରେ ପରଦା ହଟିଥିଲା। ଭୁବନେଶ୍ୱରରେ ହତ୍ୟା କରିବା ପରେ ପ୍ରମାଣ ନଷ୍ଟ କରିବା ଓ ମୃତଦେହକୁ ଫୋପାଡିବା ପାଇଁ ଅଭିଯୁକ୍ତ କରିଥିଲେ ଷଡଯନ୍ତ୍ର।
ତଦନ୍ତରୁ ଜଣାପଡିଛି, ରାକେଶ ଝରାଫୁଲଙ୍କ ପୁରୁଷ ବନ୍ଧୁ। ଯେଉଁ ସିସିଟିଭି ଫୁଟେଜ ମିଳିଥିଲା, ସେଥିରେ ସ୍କୁଟି ପଛପଟେ ବସିଥିଲେ ଅଭିଯୁକ୍ତ ରାକେଶ। ହତ୍ୟାକାଣ୍ଡ ପରେ ପୋଲିସକୁ ଭୁଆଁ ବୁଲାଇବା ପାଇଁ ଅଭିଯୁକ୍ତ ବଡ଼ ଷଡଯନ୍ତ୍ର ରଚିଥିଲେ। ମୟୂରଭଞ୍ଜ ଜିଲା ଯଶିପୁର ଥାନା ଅନ୍ତର୍ଗତ ତରୁଣ୍ଡେଇପଶି ଗ୍ରାମର ରାମାକାନ୍ତ ନାୟକଙ୍କ ଝିଅ ଝରାଫୁଲ(୨୧) ରମାଦେବୀ ବିଶ୍ବବିଦ୍ୟାଳୟର ଦର୍ଶନ ବିଭାଗର ଯୁକ୍ତ ୩ ଦ୍ବିତୀୟ ବର୍ଷର ଛାତ୍ରୀ। ସେ ୨୦୨୧ ମସିହା ଜାନୁଆରୀ ୨୬ ତାରିଖ ଦିନ ନିଜ ଘରକୁ ଯିବା ପାଇଁ ଭୁବନେଶ୍ବରରୁ ଝାଡେଶ୍ୱର ବସ୍‌ରେ ବସିଥିଲେ। ମାତ୍ର ଘରେ ପହଞ୍ଚିବା ବଦଳରେ ଯାଜପୁର ଜିଲା କୁଆଖିଆ ଥାନା ଅଞ୍ଚଳରୁ ତାଙ୍କ ମୃତଦେହ ମିଳିଥିଲା।
 

Dharitri – Odisha’s No.1 Odia Daily

title: ବାଇକକୁ ପିଟିଲା ୩୦ ଛାତ୍ରୀଛାତ୍ରଙ୍କୁ ନେଇ ଯାଉଥିବା ସ୍କୁଲ ଭ୍ୟାନ, ଜଣେ ମୃତ
description:
କେସିଙ୍ଗା,୨୯।୬(ତୁମେଶ୍ୱର ସାହୁ ): କଳାହାଣ୍ଡି ଜିଲା କେସିଙ୍ଗା ବ୍ଲକ୍ ଅନ୍ତର୍ଗତ ଉତ୍କେଲା ଗ୍ରାମରୁ କୋକୋଡମାଲକୁ ସଂଯୋଗ କରୁଥିବା ପିବ୍ଲୁଡି ରାସ୍ତା ପାର୍ଶ୍ଵରେ ଅବସ୍ଥିତ ମେର୍ଶି ଇଂରାଜୀ ବିଦ୍ୟାଳୟ ସମ୍ମୁଖରେ ଏକ ଦୁର୍ଘଟଣା ହୋଇଛି । ସୋମବାର ସ୍କୁଲ ଛୁଟି ହେବା ପରେ ଭ୍ୟାନଟି ସ୍କୁଲରୁ ପିଲାଙ୍କୁ ନେଇ ମୁଖ୍ୟ ରାସ୍ତାକୁ ଆସୁଥିବା ବେଳେ କୋକୋଡମାଲ ଗ୍ରାମରୁ ଉତ୍କେଲା ଅଭିମୁଖେ ଯାଉଥିବା ଏକ ବାଇକ୍ ସହିତ ଜୋରଦାର ଧକ୍କା ହୋଇଥିଲା । ବାଇକରେ ଯାଉଥିବା କୋକୋଡମାଲ୍ (କନ୍ଧେଇମାଲ୍)ଗ୍ରାମର ଯୁବକ […]
The post ବାଇକକୁ ପିଟିଲା ୩୦ ଛାତ୍ରୀଛାତ୍ରଙ୍କୁ ନେଇ ଯାଉଥିବା ସ୍କୁଲ ଭ୍ୟାନ, ଜଣେ ମୃତ appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.
content:
କେସିଙ୍ଗା,୨୯।୬(ତୁମେଶ୍ୱର ସାହୁ ): କଳାହାଣ୍ଡି ଜିଲା କେସିଙ୍ଗା ବ୍ଲକ୍ ଅନ୍ତର୍ଗତ ଉତ୍କେଲା ଗ୍ରାମରୁ କୋକୋଡମାଲକୁ ସଂଯୋଗ କରୁଥିବା ପିବ୍ଲୁଡି ରାସ୍ତା ପାର୍ଶ୍ଵରେ ଅବସ୍ଥିତ ମେର୍ଶି ଇଂରାଜୀ ବିଦ୍ୟାଳୟ ସମ୍ମୁଖରେ ଏକ ଦୁର୍ଘଟଣା ହୋଇଛି । ସୋମବାର ସ୍କୁଲ ଛୁଟି ହେବା ପରେ ଭ୍ୟାନଟି ସ୍କୁଲରୁ ପିଲାଙ୍କୁ ନେଇ ମୁଖ୍ୟ ରାସ୍ତାକୁ ଆସୁଥିବା ବେଳେ କୋକୋଡମାଲ ଗ୍ରାମରୁ ଉତ୍କେଲା ଅଭିମୁଖେ ଯାଉଥିବା ଏକ ବାଇକ୍ ସହିତ ଜୋରଦାର ଧକ୍କା ହୋଇଥିଲା ।
ବାଇକରେ ଯାଉଥିବା କୋକୋଡମାଲ୍ (କନ୍ଧେଇମାଲ୍)ଗ୍ରାମର ଯୁବକ ଆକାଶ ଜାଲ (୧୪)ଙ୍କ ମୃତ୍ୟୁ ହୋଇଥିବା ବେଳେ ଗୁରୁତର ଥିବା ଯୁବକଟି ପଙ୍କଜ ଜାଲ (୨୩ ) ବୋଲି ଜଣାପଡ଼ିଛି । ଦୁର୍ଘଟଣା ଏତେ ଭୟଙ୍କର ହୋଇଥିଲା ଯେ ଘଟଣା ସ୍ଥଳରେ ଆକାଶଙ୍କ ମୃତ୍ୟୁ ହୋଇଥିବା ବେଳେ ପଙ୍କଜ ଗୁରୁତର ଆହତ ହୋଇଥିଲେ । ଦୁର୍ଘଟଣା ବିଷୟରେ ଜାଣିପାରି ସ୍ଥାନୀୟ ଲୋକେ ଦୁଇ ଜଣଙ୍କୁ ଉଦ୍ଧାର କରି କେସିଙ୍ଗା ଗୋଷ୍ଠୀ ସ୍ବାସ୍ଥ୍ୟ କେନ୍ଦ୍ରକୁ ଚିକିତ୍ସା ପାଇଁ ନେଇଥିଲେ । କିନ୍ତୁ ଡାକ୍ତର ଆକାଶଙ୍କୁ ମୃତ ଘୋଷଣା କରିଥିବା ବେଳେ ଗୁରୁତର ଥିବା ପଙ୍କଜଙ୍କୁ ଭବାନୀପାଟଣା ମୁଖ୍ୟ ଚିକିତ୍ସାଳୟକୁ ସ୍ଥାନାନ୍ତରିତ କରିଥିବା ସୂଚନା ମିଳିଛି ।
ଅନ୍ୟପଟେ ସ୍କୁଲ ଭ୍ୟାନରେ ପ୍ରାୟ ୩୦ ଜଣ ଛୋଟ ଛୁଆ ବସିଥିବାବେଳେ ଏତେବଡ଼ ଦୁର୍ଘଟଣା ପରେ ମଧ୍ୟ ସୌଭାଗ୍ୟବଶତଃ ୩୦ ଜଣ ସ୍କୁଲ ପିଲା କିଛି ବି କାହାର ହୋଇ ନ ଥିବା ଜଣାପଡିଛି। ବାଇକ୍ ଯୋଗେ ଆସୁଥିବା ଦୁଇ ଜଣ ଯୁବକମାନେ ଗୋଟିଏ ପରିବାରର ଦୁଇ ଭାଇ ବୋଲି ଜଣାପଡ଼ିଛି । ଦୁର୍ଘଟଣା ଘଟାଇଥିବା ସ୍କୁଲ ଭ୍ୟାନ ଡ୍ରାଇଭରଟି ଫେରାର ମାରିଥିବାବେଳେ ଦୁର୍ଘଟଣାସ୍ଥଳର ମେର୍ଶି ସ୍କୁଲରେ କୋକୋଡମାଲ୍ ଗ୍ରାମବାସୀ କ୍ଷତିପୂରଣ ଦାବିରେ ଚାପା ଉତ୍ତେଜନା ଜାରି ରଖିଛନ୍ତି । ବର୍ତ୍ତମାନ ଦୁର୍ଘଟଣାସ୍ଥଳରେ କେସିଙ୍ଗା ପୋଲିସ ଏବଂ ଭବାନୀପାଟଣା ପୋଲିସ ଉତ୍ତେଜିତ ଲୋକଙ୍କୁ ବୁଝାସୁଝା କରୁଥିବା ଜଣାପଡିଛି । ଏ ସଂକ୍ରାନ୍ତରେ ଉତକେଲା ଫାଣ୍ଡି ଅଧିକାରୀ ଶତପଥୀ ବାବୁଙ୍କ ପଚାରିବାରୁ ତଦନ୍ତ ଜାରି ରହିଛି ବୋଲି ପ୍ରକାଶ କରିଥିଲେ । ମୃତ ଯୁବକଙ୍କ ଶବ ବ୍ୟବଚ୍ଛେଦ ପରେ ପରିବାର ବର୍ଗ ଙ୍କୁ ହସ୍ତାନ୍ତର କରାଯାଇଛି।
 

Dharitri – Odisha’s No.1 Odia Daily

The post ବାଇକକୁ ପିଟିଲା ୩୦ ଛାତ୍ରୀଛାତ୍ରଙ୍କୁ ନେଇ ଯାଉଥିବା ସ୍କୁଲ ଭ୍ୟାନ, ଜଣେ ମୃତ appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.

title: Two passenger vehicles collide on NH-44 near Kishtwari Pathar; all occupants escape unhurt
description:
Banihal, June 29: All passengers travelling in two passenger vehicles had a narrow escape after the vehicles collided head-on on the Jammu-Srinagar National Highway (NH-44) near Kishtwari Pathar in the Sher Bibi area of Banihal on Monday.
According to reports, the two vehicles were travelling in opposite directions when they collided, causing damage to both. However, all occupants escaped unhurt.
Soon after the accident, teams from Banihal Police, Traffic Police, the Army's Road Opening Party (ROP), and volunteers from the NGO Banihal Volunteers rushed to the spot and assisted the passengers.
The accident temporarily disrupted traffic movement on the highway. Traffic police later cleared the affected stretch, following which vehicular movement on NH-44 was restored smoothly.

title: How A Rats' Nest Led To Poison Pills At Mumbai's Muharram Procession
description: Fayyaz Premji was caught distributing poisonous capsules.
content: Police sources said Premji had conducted extensive research on Google and AI regarding the effects of various dosages of zinc phosphide on the human body and had easy access to Zinc Phosphide.

title: Saves The Day announce ‘Stay What You Are’ 25th anniversary UK tour
description:
The New Jersey band will play the 2001 album in full in Liverpool, London, Glasgow and more
The post Saves The Day announce ‘Stay What You Are’ 25th anniversary UK tour appeared first on NME.
content:
Saves The Day have announced a new UK tour, celebrating the 25th anniversary of ‘Stay What You Are’.
The new dates kick off later this year, and see the New Jersey emo icons revisit their 2001 album, 25 years after it’s initial release.
‘Stay What You Are’ was the third from the band and received widespread acclaim when it dropped – pushing beyond their earlier emo and hardcore sound, and marking the indie-punk’s earliest mainstream breakthrough.
Now, frontman Chris Conley and co. are hitting the road later in 2026 to play the album in full, and tour dates kick off at Trinity in Bristol on November 17.
From there, live shows include stops at London’s Electric Brixton, Nottingham’s Palais and Glasgow’s Slay, before wrapping up with a slot at Loud & Clear Festival in Liverpool on November 21.

  










View this post on Instagram

























Tickets go on sale on Wednesday (July 1) at 10am BST, and pre-sale options start tomorrow (Tuesday June 30) at the same time. Support comes from Chastity and Turn of Phrase.
Visit here for tickets.
Saves The Day’s ‘Stay What You Are’ 25th anniversary UK tour dates are:
NOVEMBER
17 — Bristol, Trinity
18 — London, Electric Brixton
19 — Nottingham, Palais
20 — Glasgow, Slay
21 — Liverpool, Loud & Clear Festival
Conley, Bryan Newman, Eben D’Amico, David Soloway and Ted Alexander recorded the 2001 album with production from Rob Schnapf.
While Saves The Day have played routinely since they dropped their latest album ‘9’ back in 2018, they have not often embarked on full-blown headline tours in recent years. In 2019, Thursday brought frontman Chris Conley up on stage during their set supporting My Chemical Romance to cover the Buzzcocks track ‘Ever Fallen In Love (With Someone You Shouldn’t’ve)’.
The post Saves The Day announce ‘Stay What You Are’ 25th anniversary UK tour appeared first on NME.

title: Stock picks of the week: 5 stocks where analysts see up to 28% upside - Full list
description: Markets are shifting focus from geopolitical developments to the Q1 FY27 earnings season. ET's Refinitiv-based analysis identifies five stocks with improving scores, analyst backing, and estimated upside potential over the next 12 months.
content: The US-Iran conflict remained in focus over the weekend, but its impact on crude oil prices and Indian equity benchmarks was limited. On Monday, the Sensex and Nifty witnessed some volatility, with analysts attributing part of the decline to profit booking after recent gains and weakness in select heavyweight stocks.Market participants are now shifting their focus to the upcoming June quarter (Q1 FY27) earnings season, with the first set of corporate results expected over the next two weeks. Investors will closely monitor earnings across sectors for signs of the impact of elevated crude oil prices and supply chain disruptions during the quarter.The market's reaction to the upcoming June quarter (Q1 FY27) earnings will be closely watched, particularly in companies that do not report earnings surprises. Analysts said stock price movements following the results could offer insights into whether current valuations already reflect the challenges faced by businesses.According to ET, a limited reaction to weaker-than-expected earnings may indicate that investors have largely factored in the expected pressure on corporate performance. On the other hand, a broader sell-off following disappointing results could signal that concerns over earnings remain elevated.With the Q1 earnings season set to gather pace in the coming weeks, investors are expected to closely track corporate commentary and market sentiment for cues on the near-term direction of equities.What to watch for?According to an analysis by The Economic Times (ET) based on Refinitiv's Stock Reports Plus dated June 29, 2026, five stocks have registered an improvement in their average scores over the past month.The screening covered stocks listed on the BSE and NSE using Refinitiv's scoring algorithms. ET further filtered the list to include only companies with analyst consensus ratings of "Strong Buy," "Buy," or "Hold", while also considering their estimated 12-month upside potential.The shortlisted stocks span sectors including pharmaceuticals, retail, power and others. ET noted that these companies had undergone a correction and are now showing signs of recovery alongside the broader market.List of stocksStock - Akums Drugs & Pharma | Recommendation - Strong Buy | Upside Potential - 28 per centStock - Torrent Power | Recommendation - Hold | Upside Potential - 20 per centStock - Linde India | Recommendation - Hold | Upside Potential - 17 per centStock - Mishra Dhatu Nigam | Recommendation - Strong Buy | Upside Potential - 16 per centStock - Trent | Recommendation - Buy | Upside Potential - 13 per cent(Disclaimer: The above article is meant for informational purposes only, and should not be considered as any investment advice. ET NOW DIGITAL suggests its readers/audience to consult their financial advisors before making any money related decisions.)

title: Axis Bank CFO Puneet Sharma resigns, bank announces re-appointment of directors
description: The private sector lender said that Sharma will be relieved from the services of the bank at the close of business on August 31, 2026
content: Axis Bank on Monday announced that Puneet Sharma, Chief Financial Officer of the bank has tendered his resignation on June 28, 2026 to pursue next phase of his professional journey. The private sector lender added that Sharma will be relieved from the services of the bank at the close of business on August 31, 2026 and shall cease to be the key managerial personnel and a part of senior management of the Bank with effect from that date.The bank also announced the re-appointment of directors;Based on the recommendations of the Nomination and Remuneration Committee, the Board of Directors of the Bank at its meeting held on June 29, 2026 has approved the following:a) Re‑appointment of CH S S Mallikarjunarao as an independent director of the bank for second term of four years with effect from February 1, 2027 up to January 31, 2031 (both days inclusive), subject to approval of the members of the bank.b) Re‑appointment of Munish Sharda as whole-time director (designated as executive director) of the bank for a further period of three years with effect from February 27, 2027 up to February 26, 2030 (both days inclusive), subject to approval of the Reserve Bank of India and the members of the bank.

title: France Recorded 1,000 Excess Deaths During Heat Wave, Officials Say
description: First estimates published by the national health agency listed hundreds more deaths per day compared with the daily death rate in previous months.
content: Officials recovering the body of someone who drowned while swimming in a canal on Friday as Paris baked under a heat wave.

title: ধুবুৰীত বাঢ়নী পানীৰ ভয়াৱহ ৰূপঃনৈপৰীয়া অঞ্চলত হাই-এলাৰ্ট জাৰি
description:
ডিজিটেল সংবাদ,ধুবুৰীঃ অসমত বানপানীৰ প্ৰথম ঢৌৱে ভয়াৱহ ৰূপ ধাৰণ কৰিছে। অবিৰত বৰষুণ, নদীসমূহৰ জলপৃষ্ঠ বৃদ্ধি আৰু ঠায়ে ঠায়ে মথাউৰি ছিগাৰ ফলত ৰাজ্যৰ কেইবাখনো জিলা প্লাৱিত  হৈ পৰিছে। এই পৰিস্থিতিৰ প্ৰতি লক্ষ্য ৰাখি ৰাজ্য চৰকাৰে বানপানীৰ প্ৰৱণতা থকা অঞ্চলসমূহত সৰ্বোচ্চ সতৰ্কতা জাৰি কৰিছে। 
উল্লেখ্য যে, ৰাজ্যৰ ভিন্ন প্ৰান্তৰ সমান্তৰালকৈ ধুবুৰীতো নৈৰ বাঢ়নী পানীয়ে ভয়াৱহ পৰিস্থিতিৰ সৃষ্টি কৰিছে। ধুবুৰী জিলা দুৰ্যোগ প্ৰশমন বিভাগৰ প্ৰকল্প বিষয়া মোফাৰ্জেল সৰকাৰে জানিবলৈ দিয়া মতে, জিলাখনৰ মাজেৰে বৈ যোৱা কেইবাখনো প্ৰধান নদী যেনে- গৌৰাং, টিপকাই, চম্পাৱতী আৰু গংগাধৰ নৈৰ পানী ধাৰাবাহিকভাৱে বৃদ্ধি পাইছে।
নদীসমূহৰ এই বাঢ়নী পানীৰ প্ৰতি লক্ষ্য ৰাখি জিলা প্ৰশাসনে ইতিমধ্যে নৈপৰীয়া অঞ্চলসমূহত হাই-এলাৰ্ট জাৰি কৰিছে। নৈৰ বাঢ়নী পানীত যাতে কোনো লোকে প্ৰৱেশ নকৰে, তাৰ বাবে জিলা প্ৰশাসনে সৰ্বত্ৰে তীক্ষ্ণ দৃষ্টি ৰাখিছে।

আনফালে, সম্ভাব্য বান আৰু বিপদৰ পৰা সৰ্বসাধাৰণ ৰাইজক ৰক্ষা কৰিবলৈ জিলা দুৰ্যোগ প্ৰশমন বিভাগে বিশেষ তৎপৰতা প্ৰদৰ্শন কৰিছে। এই উদ্দেশ্যে জিলাখনৰ বান প্ৰৱণ তথা নৈপৰীয়া বিভিন্ন স্পৰ্শকাতৰ অঞ্চলসমূহত 'আপদা মিত্ৰ' স্বেচ্ছাসেৱক আৰু ক্ষেত্ৰ বিষয়াসকলক নিয়োগ কৰা হৈছে। নদীপথ সমূহত হ’ব পৰা সম্ভাৱ্য দুৰ্ঘটনা ৰোধ কৰিবলৈ দূৰণীবটীয়া নাও চলাচলৰ ক্ষেত্ৰত বিশেষ সাৱধানতা অৱলম্বন কৰা হৈছে। প্ৰকল্প বিষয়া সৰকাৰে জনোৱা মতে, আভ্যন্তৰীণ জল পৰিবহন বিভাগক এই সন্দৰ্ভত চোকা দৃষ্টি ৰাখিবলৈ নিৰ্দেশ দিয়া হৈছে।
ইপিনে জিলা প্ৰশাসনে নৈপৰীয়া অঞ্চলৰ বাসিন্দাসকলক আতংকিত নহৈ সতৰ্ক হৈ থাকিবলৈ আৰু জৰুৰীকালীন অৱস্থাত স্থানীয় প্ৰশাসন অথবা দুৰ্যোগ প্ৰশমন বাহিনীৰ সৈতে যোগাযোগ কৰিবলৈ আহ্বান জনাইছে।

title: Mozilla President: meet the open source ‘rebel alliance’ that could break Big Tech’s grip on AI
description: Middle powers like Canada and the EU are quietly building an alternative AI future — one that's open, accountable, and not controlled by a handful of labs.
content:
Much of the public conversation about AI today focuses on what it can do. New capabilities emerge almost weekly, and with them come understandable questions about safety, trust, and control. But the questions that matter most are: Who controls the infrastructure behind AI? And what values is it designed to protect?



Answering those questions will shape not only how AI works, but whose interests it serves. As governments, businesses, and citizens grapple with the future of AI, we have a critical opportunity today to ensure the building blocks of AI are pro-human by design. The choices we make now will determine whether AI continues to be something owned and directed by a small number of actors — or a resource that can be shaped and governed more broadly in the public interest.



This became even more apparent recently, when the U.S. government’s action to suspend access to Mythos unnerved governments and companies around the world, raising concerns about one government’s ability to unilaterally cut off technology used by others.



Encouragingly, a new path is beginning to emerge, led by middle-power nations. At this year’s World Economic Forum in Davos, Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney set out a challenge for middle-power nations like his own — nations with the capacity to build a world that “encompasses our values, such as respect for human rights, sustainable development, solidarity, sovereignty, and territorial integrity.” Canada has also released its national AI strategy, which prioritizes the development of open-source AI technology.



More recently, the European Union joined Canada in “placing open source at the centre of the EU’s technological sovereignty.” This includes commitments to support open-source alternatives throughout the AI stack, backing startups, and developing new government procurement guidelines that put the EU’s thumb on the scale in favor of open-source innovation. Countries from Germany to Japan are looking at ways to integrate open source into their national strategies, while the UK has announced an Open Source Builder’s Fund, aiming to make Britain the “home of global open source AI talent.”



Open source is emerging as a powerful consensus middle path and the private sector is catching on.



Research has shown that open-source technology has created over $8.8 trillion in demand-side value: firms would have to spend 3.5 times more on software than they currently do if open source didn’t exist. Entrepreneurs and researchers are building and leveraging open-source AI tools, models, and datasets that reflect local needs and perspectives. Developers are gravitating quickly toward open-source AI. A recent a16z and OpenRouter study found that open-source models grew from roughly 1–2% of token volume in late 2024 to nearly 30% by mid-2025 — a clear marker of momentum among builders, and a significant business opportunity.



Unlike AI technology owned and controlled by a few large corporations, open-source AI is available to everyone. That not only means governments and companies can own the infrastructure on which they build — it means anyone can look under the hood. That transparency is what can make AI safe and accountable by design.



At Mozilla, we often talk about building technology that amplifies human agency rather than replacing it. In December 2022, we amended our foundational Manifesto with a Pledge for a Healthy Internet, centered on four commitments: that the internet should include all people; promote civil discourse, human dignity, and individual expression; elevate critical thinking and verifiable facts; and catalyze collaboration across communities working for the common good.



That is the path Canada, the EU, and other middle powers are leading — in collaboration with a private sector hungry for AI alternatives to the closed models that dominate today.



AI has enormous potential, but a growing unease surrounds its direction and who controls it. The antidote is building AI that is open, trustworthy, and reflective of a diversity of voices outside Silicon Valley and China’s AI labs. That future can only be built by a middle-power, open-source coalition determined to ensure AI works for human beings — not the other way around.



The opinions expressed in Fortune.com commentary pieces are solely the views of their authors and do not necessarily reflect the opinions and beliefs of Fortune.
This story was originally featured on Fortune.com

title: Nashik News : गुन्हेगारांना सुधारण्याची सुवर्णसंधी! कारागृहात ‘ज्ञान’ मिळवा अन् ९० दिवसांची ‘माफी’ मिळवा
description: नाशिक | भारत पगारे | Nashik कारागृहातील बंद्यांच्या आयुष्याला नवीन दिशा देण्यासाठी आणि त्यांच्यात सामाजिक जबाबदारीची जाणीव निर्माण करण्यासाठी महाराष्ट्राच्या कारागृह (Maharashtr Jail) व सुधारसेवा विभागाने महत्त्वपूर्ण निर्णय घेतला आहे. कारागृहात राहून पदवी, पदव्युत्तर किंवा थेट पीएच. डी. सारखे उच्च शिक्षण (Education) पूर्ण करणाऱ्या, तसेच क्रीडा क्षेत्रात विशेष प्राविण्य मिळवणाऱ्या कैद्यांना आता तब्बल ९० दिवसांपर्यंतची […]
content:
नाशिक | भारत पगारे | Nashik



कारागृहातील बंद्यांच्या आयुष्याला नवीन दिशा देण्यासाठी आणि त्यांच्यात सामाजिक जबाबदारीची जाणीव निर्माण करण्यासाठी महाराष्ट्राच्या कारागृह (Maharashtr Jail) व सुधारसेवा विभागाने महत्त्वपूर्ण निर्णय घेतला आहे. कारागृहात राहून पदवी, पदव्युत्तर किंवा थेट पीएच. डी. सारखे उच्च शिक्षण (Education) पूर्ण करणाऱ्या, तसेच क्रीडा क्षेत्रात विशेष प्राविण्य मिळवणाऱ्या कैद्यांना आता तब्बल ९० दिवसांपर्यंतची विशेष माफी (शिक्षेत सवलत) मिळणार आहे. अपर पोलीस महासंचालक व सुधारसेवा महानिरीक्षक सुहास वारके यांनी परिपत्रक जारी केले आहे.



यापूर्वीचे २०१९ आणि २०२३ मधील जुने परिपत्रक रद्द करून, अधिक स्पष्ट आणि पारदर्शक नियमावलीसह हे नवीन परिपत्रक लागू करण्यात आले आहे. या निर्णयामुळे नाशिक रोड मध्यवर्ती कारागृहासह राज्यातील तमाम कारागृहातील कैद्यांना (Prisoners) शिक्षणाच्या मुख्य प्रवाहात येण्यासाठी मोठी प्रेरणा मिळणार आहे. ही सवलत केवळ हक्क नसून, कैद्यांना सुधारण्यासाठी दिलेली एक विशेष प्रोत्साहनपर सवलत आहे. 



दरम्यान, अधीक्षकांचा स्वयंस्पष्ट अभिप्रायः कैद्याचा संपूर्ण कारागृहीन इतिहास, त्याचा वर्तणूक तक्ता आणि अधीक्षकांच्या स्वयंस्पष्ट अभिप्रायानंतरच विभागीय कार्यालयामार्फत हा प्रस्ताव अंतिम मंजुरीसाठी पुणे मुख्यालयात पाठवला जाईल.



वैशिष्टये आणि अटी




– एकत्रित शिक्षेची मर्यादाः उच्च शिक्षण आणि क्रीडा क्षेत्रातील विशेष कामगिरी या दोन्ही आघाड्यांवर मिळून कैद्याला संपूर्ण शिक्षा कालावधीत एकूण १८० दिवसांपेक्षा जास्त माफी मिळणार नाही.– कारागृहातूनच शिक्षण अनिवार्यः या विशेष शैक्षणिक माफीचा लाभ घेण्यासाठी संबंधित कैद्याने तो संपूर्ण शैक्षणिक अभ्यासक्रम कारागृहात बंदिस्त असतानाच पूर्ण केलेला असावा.– पडताळणी होणारः बोगसगिरी रोखण्यासाठी, कैद्याने मिळवलेले गुणपत्रक आणि प्रमाणपत्र.



– संबंधित विद्यापीठाकडून अधिकृतपणे पडताळणी (व्हेरिफिकेशन) करूनच त्याचे प्रस्ताव मुख्यालयाकडे पाठवणे बंधनकारक.



– दहावी, बारावी व डिप्लोमासाठी वेगळी सवलतः पदवीव्यतिरिक्त कारागृहातून १० वी, १२ वी समकक्ष परीक्षा, किंवा कोणताही डिप्लोमा, प्रमाणपत्र अभ्यासक्रम पूर्ण केल्यास, त्यांना माफी देण्याचे विशेष अधिकार संबंधित कारागृह उपमहानिरीक्षक व अधीक्षकांना देण्यात आले आहेत.




अशी मिळणार ‘विशेष माफी’!



अभ्यासक्रम/ उपक्रम        मिळणारी विशेष माफी               शेरा

पदव्युत्तर पदवी                ९० दिवसांपर्यंत            कोणत्याही एका पदवीसाठी (एकवेळ)

title: Rs 450 daily SIP vs Rs 13,500 monthly SIP: Which can generate higher corpus? See calculations
description: Daily SIP vs Monthly SIP: Let’s find out which could generate a higher corpus, Rs 450 daily or Rs 13,500 monthly in an SIP. While both approaches may seem equal on paper, the real difference lies in timing, compounding, and market participation.
content: Daily SIP vs Monthly SIP: When it comes to mutual fund investing, consistency is the key, and it matters the most, and so does the approach - how you invest. Rs 450 daily vs Rs 13,500 monthly SIP may look identical in total contribution, but their outcomes can differ due to market timing and compounding effects. If you have ever wondered whether investing small amounts every day in a systematic investment plan could outperform a monthly investment. Here’s your chance to find out which could generate a higher corpus and could work better for your financial goals.Read more: 8th Pay Commission Salary Calculator: Rs 21 lakh arrears for level 10 central govt employees? Check full salary calculation Monthly SIPA Systematic Investment Plan is a way to invest a fixed amount regularly in a mutual fund. Instead of investing a large sum at once, you contribute small amounts periodically, which helps you build wealth steadily over time. Daily SIPWhereas a Daily SIP is where a fixed amount is invested in a mutual fund every day. Unlike a monthly SIP, which invests once a month. It allows you to invest small amounts consistently, making it easier to manage cash flow while gradually building wealth. Daily SIP vs Monthly SIP: Daily SIP calculation conditionDaily investment: Rs 450Investment Period: 20 yearsExpected returns: 12 per centRs 450 daily SIP: How much could you get in 20 years?In 20 years, the total investment amount will be Rs 32,85,000; the estimated return in 20 years could be Rs 1,04,32,781; and the estimated total corpus in 20 years could be Rs 1,37,17,781. Daily SIP vs Monthly SIP: Monthly SIP calculation conditionMonthly investment: Rs 13,500Investment Period: 20 yearsExpected returns: 12 per centRs 13,500 monthly SIP: How much could you get in 20 years?In 20 years, the investment amount will be Rs 32,40,000; the estimated return in 20 years could be Rs 1,02,48,497, and the estimated total corpus in 20 years could be Rs 1,34,88,497. Rs 450 daily SIP vs Rs 13,500 monthly SIP: Which can generate a larger corpus? Thus, it is quite clear from the above calculations that a Rs 450 daily SIP invested for 20 years could generate a higher total corpus than a Rs 13,500 monthly investment for 20 years.Also read: Financial changes from July 1, 2026: 6 key updates; ITR deadline, Aadhaar, passport fees, SBI & HDFC Bank credit cards - Full details(Disclaimer: The above article is meant for informational purposes only, and should not be considered as any investment advice. ET NOW DIGITAL suggests its readers/audience to consult their financial advisors before making any money related decisions.)
